      function initDriveThruRunners() {
          const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile;
          if (!config) return;
          
          if (config.extraStaff1Hired && !driveThruRunnerAIs[0]) {
              driveThruRunnerAIs[0] = createDriveThruRunnerAI();
          }
          if (config.extraStaff2Hired && !driveThruRunnerAIs[1]) {
              driveThruRunnerAIs[1] = createDriveThruRunnerAI();
          }
      }

      function createDriveThruRunnerAI() {
          const runner = createStaffMesh(0xffc72c);
          runner.position.set(0, 0, 0); // Temporary
          createTray(runner, PLAYER_HEIGHT);
          scene.add(runner);
          return {
              mesh: runner,
              state: 'idle',
              stack: [],
              timer: 0,
              targetNode: null,
              walkSpeed: 5
          };
      }

      function updateDriveThruRunners(deltaTime) {
          const booth = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
          if (!booth) return;
          const now = Date.now();

          driveThruRunnerAIs.forEach((ai, idx) => {
              if (!ai || !ai.mesh) return;
              const squish = ai.mesh.userData.squishState;

              switch(ai.state) {
                  case 'idle':
                      switchAnimation(ai.mesh, 'idle');
                      ai.timer += deltaTime;
                      if (ai.timer > 0.5) {
                          ai.timer = 0;
                          if (ai.stack.length >= 5) {
                              ai.state = 'walkingToBooth';
                          } else {
                              // Find ready grill
                              let bestNode = null;
                              let minDist = Infinity;
                              resourceNodes.forEach(node => {
                                  if (!node.isReady) return;
                                  const d = distance(ai.mesh.position.x, ai.mesh.position.z, node.position.x, node.position.z);
                                  if (d < minDist) { minDist = d; bestNode = node; }
                              });
                              if (bestNode) {
                                  ai.targetNode = bestNode;
                                  ai.state = 'walkingToKitchen';
                              } else if (ai.stack.length > 0) {
                                  ai.state = 'walkingToBooth';
                              }
                          }
                      }
                      break;

                  case 'walkingToKitchen':
                      if (!ai.targetNode || !ai.targetNode.isReady) { ai.state = 'idle'; break; }
                      switchAnimation(ai.mesh, ai.stack.length > 0 ? 'walkCarry' : 'run');
                      const dxK = ai.targetNode.position.x - ai.mesh.position.x;
                      const dzK = ai.targetNode.position.z - ai.mesh.position.z;
                      const distK = Math.sqrt(dxK*dxK + dzK*dzK);
                      if (distK < 2.0) {
                          ai.state = 'collecting';
                          ai.timer = 0;
                      } else {
                          let avoidX = 0, avoidZ = 0;
                          [player, hiredCleanerMesh, hiredRunnerMesh, hiredStaffMesh].forEach(o => {
                              if(!o) return;
                              const dX = ai.mesh.position.x - o.position.x;
                              const dZ = ai.mesh.position.z - o.position.z;
                              const d2 = dX*dX + dZ*dZ;
                              if(d2 < 9) {
                                  const d = Math.sqrt(d2) || 0.001;
                                  avoidX += (dX/d) * (3-d);
                                  avoidZ += (dZ/d) * (3-d);
                              }
                          });

                          const vx = (dxK/distK) + avoidX * 0.5;
                          const vz = (dzK/distK) + avoidZ * 0.5;
                          ai.mesh.position.x += vx * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
                          ai.mesh.position.z += vz * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
                          ai.mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(vx, vz);
                      }
                      break;

                  case 'collecting':
                      switchAnimation(ai.mesh, 'interact');
                      ai.timer += deltaTime;
                      if (ai.timer >= 0.5) {
                          ai.timer = 0;
                          if (ai.targetNode && ai.targetNode.isReady) {
                              ai.targetNode.isReady = false;
                              ai.targetNode.regenTimer = window.gameConfig.resources.regenerationTime;
                              if (ai.targetNode.grillMesh) ai.targetNode.grillMesh.visible = false;
                              if (ai.targetNode.emptyMesh) ai.targetNode.emptyMesh.visible = true;
                              
                              for(let i=0; i<3; i++) {
                                  const item = createStackItem(getRandomMenuItemForEquipment(ai.targetNode.equipmentType));
                                  const sy = PLAYER_HEIGHT + ai.stack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT;
                                  item.position.set(0, sy, 1);
                                  ai.mesh.add(item);
                                  ai.stack.push(item);
                              }
                              playSound('pickup_sound');
                          }
                          ai.state = 'idle';
                      }
                      break;

                  case 'walkingToBooth':
                      switchAnimation(ai.mesh, 'walkCarry');
                      const txB = booth.x;
                      const tzB = booth.z + booth.depth / 2 + 1; // Walk to the side window
                      const dxB = txB - ai.mesh.position.x;
                      const dzB = tzB - ai.mesh.position.z;
                      const distB = Math.sqrt(dxB*dxB + dzB*dzB);
                      if (distB < 2.0) {
                          ai.state = 'depositing';
                          ai.timer = 0;
                      } else {
                          let avoidX = 0, avoidZ = 0;
                          [player, hiredCleanerMesh, hiredRunnerMesh, hiredStaffMesh].forEach(o => {
                              if(!o) return;
                              const dX = ai.mesh.position.x - o.position.x;
                              const dZ = ai.mesh.position.z - o.position.z;
                              const d2 = dX*dX + dZ*dZ;
                              if(d2 < 9) {
                                  const d = Math.sqrt(d2) || 0.001;
                                  avoidX += (dX/d) * (3-d);
                                  avoidZ += (dZ/d) * (3-d);
                              }
                          });

                          const vx = (dxB/distB) + avoidX * 0.5;
                          const vz = (dzB/distB) + avoidZ * 0.5;
                          ai.mesh.position.x += vx * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
                          ai.mesh.position.z += vz * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
                          ai.mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(vx, vz);
                      }
                      break;

                  case 'depositing':
                      switchAnimation(ai.mesh, 'interact');
                      ai.timer += deltaTime;
                      if (ai.timer >= 0.2) {
                          ai.timer = 0;
                          if (ai.stack.length > 0 && driveThruBurgerStack.length < booth.maxBurgers) {
                              const item = ai.stack.pop();
                              const menuData = item.userData.menuItem;
                              ai.mesh.remove(item);
                              addBurgerToDriveThru(menuData);
                              playSound('pickup_sound');
                          } else {
                              ai.state = 'idle';
                          }
                      }
                      break;
              }

              updateTray(ai.mesh, ai.stack);
              if (ai.mesh.userData.mixer) ai.mesh.userData.mixer.update(deltaTime);
          });
      }

      function createDriveThruStaffTile() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile;
        if (!config || config.deleted || config.staffHired) return;

        const result = createBaseTile(config);
        driveThruStaffTileMesh = result.tileMesh;
        driveThruStaffTileGlow = result.glowMesh;

        updateDriveThruStaffProgress();
        updateDriveThruStaffCostDisplay();

        if (gameMode === 'edit') {
           editableObjects.push({
              mesh: driveThruStaffTileMesh,
              type: 'driveThruStaffTile',
              configKey: 'driveThruStaffTile',
              name: 'Drive-Thru Staff Tile',
              getData: () => ({ x: config.x, z: config.z }),
              setPosition: (x, z) => {
                config.x = x;
                config.z = z;
                driveThruStaffTileMesh.position.set(x, 0, z);
                driveThruStaffTileGlow.position.set(x, 0.05, z);
              }
           });
        }
      }

      function updateDriveThruStaffProgress() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile;
        if (!config || !driveThruStaffTileMesh) return;
        
        let targetCost = config.cost;
        if (config.staffHired && !config.extraStaff1Hired) targetCost = 1500;
        else if (config.extraStaff1Hired) targetCost = 3000;

        const tempConfig = { ...config, cost: targetCost };
        updateTileProgress(driveThruStaffTileMesh, tempConfig);
      }

      function updateDriveThruStaffCostDisplay() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile;
        if (!config || !driveThruStaffTileMesh) return;
        
        let targetCost = config.cost;
        if (config.staffHired && !config.extraStaff1Hired) targetCost = 1500;
        else if (config.extraStaff1Hired) targetCost = 3000;

        const tempConfig = { ...config, cost: targetCost };
        updateUnlockTileCostDisplay(driveThruStaffTileMesh, tempConfig);
      }

      function createHiredDriveThruStaff() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
        if (!config) return;

        const createStaff = (offset) => {
          const staffGroup = createStaffMesh(0xffc72c);
          staffGroup.position.set(config.x + offset, 0, config.z + config.depth / 2 - 1.5);
          scene.add(staffGroup);
          return staffGroup;
        };

        if (window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.staffHired) {
          hiredDriveThruStaffMesh = createStaff(0);
        }
        
        // Workers 2 and 3 are now runners
        initDriveThruRunners();
      }

      function updateDriveThruStaffTile(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile;
        if (!config || config.deleted || config.extraStaff2Hired) return;

        // Ensure visuals exist if drive-thru is unlocked
        if (window.gameConfig.driveThruTile?.unlocked && !driveThruStaffTileMesh) {
           createDriveThruStaffTile();
        }

        if (!driveThruStaffTileMesh) return;

        isInDriveThruStaffTile = isPlayerInZone(config);
        const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
        
        let targetCost = config.cost;
        if (config.staffHired && !config.extraStaff1Hired) targetCost = 1500;
        else if (config.extraStaff1Hired) targetCost = 3000;

        const totalDeposited = (config.moneyDeposited || 0) + (config.moneyInFlight || 0);

        if (isInDriveThruStaffTile && vaultBalance > 0 && totalDeposited < targetCost) {
          driveThruStaffDepositTimer += deltaTime;
          if (driveThruStaffDepositTimer >= DRIVE_THRU_STAFF_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
            driveThruStaffDepositTimer = 0;
            const depositAmount = getDepositAmount(targetCost, moneyValue, totalDeposited);
            if (depositAmount > 0) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-depositAmount);
              config.moneyInFlight = (config.moneyInFlight || 0) + depositAmount;
              createFlyingItem(
                { x: player.position.x, y: player.position.y + 2, z: player.position.z },
                { x: config.x, y: 0.5, z: config.z },
                'money',
                () => {
                  config.moneyInFlight = Math.max(0, (config.moneyInFlight || 0) - depositAmount);
                  config.moneyDeposited = (config.moneyDeposited || 0) + depositAmount;
                  playSound('collect_sound');
                  updateDriveThruStaffProgress();
                  updateDriveThruStaffCostDisplay();
                  if (config.moneyDeposited >= targetCost) {
                    playSound('upgrade_sound');
                    createSmokeParticlesAt(config.x, 0.5, config.z);
                    
                    if (!config.staffHired) {
                      config.staffHired = true;
                      showHireNotification('driveThru');
                      spawnDriveThruStaffAtTileAndWalk(config.x, config.z, 0);
                      config.moneyDeposited = 0;
                    } else if (!config.extraStaff1Hired) {
                      config.extraStaff1Hired = true;
                      showHireNotification('driveThru');
                      // spawnDriveThruStaffAtTileAndWalk(config.x, config.z, 1);
                      if (!driveThruRunnerAIs[0]) {
                        driveThruRunnerAIs[0] = createDriveThruRunnerAI();
                        driveThruRunnerAIs[0].mesh.position.set(config.x, 0, config.z);
                      }
                      config.moneyDeposited = 0;
                    } else if (!config.extraStaff2Hired) {
                      config.extraStaff2Hired = true;
                      showHireNotification('driveThru');
                      // spawnDriveThruStaffAtTileAndWalk(config.x, config.z, 2);
                      if (!driveThruRunnerAIs[1]) {
                        driveThruRunnerAIs[1] = createDriveThruRunnerAI();
                        driveThruRunnerAIs[1].mesh.position.set(config.x, 0, config.z);
                      }
                      destroyTileVisuals(driveThruStaffTileMesh, driveThruStaffTileGlow);
                      driveThruStaffTileMesh = null;
                    }
                    updateDriveThruStaffProgress();
                    updateDriveThruStaffCostDisplay();
                  }
                },
                true
              );
            }
          }
        }
        if (driveThruStaffTileGlow) {
           driveThruStaffTileGlow.scale.setScalar(1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05);
        }
      }

      function spawnDriveThruStaffAtTileAndWalk(startX, startZ, slotIndex) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
        if (!config) return;
        const staff = createStaffMesh(0xffc72c);
        staff.position.set(startX, 0, startZ);
        scene.add(staff);
        
        const offsets = [0, -1.5, 1.5];
        const walkData = {
          mesh: staff,
          targetX: config.x + offsets[slotIndex],
          targetZ: config.z + config.depth / 2 - 1.5,
          walkSpeed: 3
        };

        if (slotIndex === 0) driveThruStaffWalking = walkData;
        else if (slotIndex === 1) driveThruStaffWalking2 = walkData;
        else if (slotIndex === 2) driveThruStaffWalking3 = walkData;
      }

      function t(key, options = {}) {
        if (typeof i18next !== 'undefined' && i18next) {
          return i18next.t(key, options);
        }
        return key;
      }

      function applyTranslations() {
        const nodes = document.querySelectorAll('[data-i18n]');
        nodes.forEach((el) => {
          const key = el.getAttribute('data-i18n');
          if (key) {
            el.textContent = t(key);
          }
        });
      }

      function initI18n() {
        if (i18nReady || typeof i18next === 'undefined') {
          return Promise.resolve();
        }
        return i18next
          .use(i18nextBrowserLanguageDetector)
          .init({
            resources: i18nResources,
            fallbackLng: 'en',
            supportedLngs: ['en', 'es', 'bn', 'vi', 'mr', 'ur', 'ar'],
            interpolation: { escapeValue: false },
            detection: {
              order: ['querystring', 'navigator', 'htmlTag'],
              lookupQuerystring: 'lang',
              caches: [],
            },
          })
          .then(() => {
            i18nReady = true;
            if (i18nReady) {
            applyTranslations();
        }
          })
          .catch((err) => {
            lib.log('i18n init failed: ' + err.message);
          });
      }

      function setLanguage(lang) {
        if (typeof i18next === 'undefined' || !i18next) return;
        i18next.changeLanguage(lang).then(() => {
          if (i18nReady) {
            applyTranslations();
        }
        });
      }

      function createTutorialArrow() {
        const arrowGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Cone (head)
        const headGeom = new THREE.ConeGeometry(0.6, 1.2, 16);
        const headMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ color: 0x90ee90 });
        const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeom, headMat);
        head.rotation.x = Math.PI; // point down
        head.position.y = -0.6;
        arrowGroup.add(head);

        // Cylinder (body)
        const bodyGeom = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.25, 0.25, 1.5, 16);
        const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeom, headMat);
        body.position.y = 0.75;
        arrowGroup.add(body);

        scene.add(arrowGroup);
        tutorialArrowMesh = arrowGroup;
        tutorialArrowMesh.visible = false;

        // Create Tutorial Rope (Line connecting player to target)
        const ropeGeom = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.3, 0.3, 1, 8);
        ropeGeom.rotateX(Math.PI / 2); // Orient so length is along Z axis for easier scaling
        const ropeMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ 
          color: 0x90ee90,
          transparent: true, 
          opacity: 0.8,
          depthTest: false
        });
        tutorialRopeMesh = new THREE.Mesh(ropeGeom, ropeMat);
        tutorialRopeMesh.renderOrder = 999;
        tutorialRopeMesh.visible = false;
        scene.add(tutorialRopeMesh);
      }

      function getCachedGeometry(key, createFn) {
        if (!cachedGeometries[key]) {
          cachedGeometries[key] = createFn();
          cachedGeometries[key].dispose = function () {};
        }
        return cachedGeometries[key];
      }

      function getCachedMaterial(key, createFn) {
        if (!cachedMaterials[key]) {
          cachedMaterials[key] = createFn();
          cachedMaterials[key].dispose = function () {};
        }
        return cachedMaterials[key];
      }

      function cacheDOMElements() {
        cachedDOMElements = {
          currencyValue: document.getElementById('currency-value'),
          stackCount: document.getElementById('stack-count'),

      // ============================================
      // SELF-ORDER KIOSK SYSTEM
      // ============================================

function createSelfOrderKiosks() {
        if (!window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks) return;

        window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks.forEach((config, index) => {
          if (config.deleted || config.hidden) return;

          const group = new THREE.Group();

          // Base/Stand
          const baseGeom = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8, 1.2, 0.4);
          const baseMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0xbdc3c7,
            roughness: 0.6,
          });
          const base = new THREE.Mesh(baseGeom, baseMat);
          base.position.y = 0.6;
          base.castShadow = true;
          group.add(base);

          // Screen
          const screenGeom = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.2, 1.6, 0.1);
          const screenMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x34495e,
            roughness: 0.4,
          });
          const screen = new THREE.Mesh(screenGeom, screenMat);
          screen.position.set(0, 1.6, 0.15);
          screen.rotation.x = -0.1;
          screen.castShadow = true;
          group.add(screen);

          // Glowing display
          const displayGeom = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1.0, 1.4);
          const displayMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0xffffff,
            emissive: 0xecf0f1,
            emissiveIntensity: 0.4,
            roughness: 0.2,
          });
          const display = new THREE.Mesh(displayGeom, displayMat);
          display.position.set(0, 1.6, 0.21);
          display.rotation.x = -0.1;
          group.add(display);

          // Kiosk "pay here" glowing slot
          const slotGeom = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.3, 0.05, 0.05);
          const slotMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x2ecc71,
            emissive: 0x2ecc71,
            emissiveIntensity: 0.5,
          });
          const slot = new THREE.Mesh(slotGeom, slotMat);
          slot.position.set(0, 0.8, 0.3);
          group.add(slot);

          // Order icon floating above (different for each kiosk)
          const iconCanvas = document.createElement('canvas');
          iconCanvas.width = 128;
          iconCanvas.height = 128;
          const ctx = iconCanvas.getContext('2d');
          ctx.font = '80px Arial';
          ctx.textAlign = 'center';
          ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
          ctx.fillText(config.icon || '📱', 64, 64);
          const iconTex = new THREE.CanvasTexture(iconCanvas);
          iconTex.minFilter = THREE.LinearFilter;
          const iconMesh = new THREE.Mesh(
            new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1, 1),
            new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
              map: iconTex,
              transparent: true,
              side: THREE.DoubleSide,
            })
          );
          iconMesh.position.y = 3;
          group.add(iconMesh);
          group.userData.icon = iconMesh;

          group.position.set(config.x, 0, config.z);
          group.rotation.y = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(config.rotation || 0);

          scene.add(group);

          // Add a subtle glow on the floor
          const glowGeom = new THREE.RingGeometry(1, 1.5, 32);
          const glowMat = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: config.color,
            transparent: true,
            opacity: 0.3,
            side: THREE.DoubleSide,
          });
          const glow = new THREE.Mesh(glowGeom, glowMat);
          glow.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
          glow.position.set(config.x, 0.02, config.z);
          scene.add(glow);

          // Store in array
          if (selfOrderKiosks[index]) {
            selfOrderKiosks[index].mesh = group;
            selfOrderKiosks[index].glow = glow;
          }
        });
      }

      function updateSelfOrderKioskPosition(kioskId, x, z) {
        const kiosk = selfOrderKiosks.find((k) => k.id === kioskId);
        if (!kiosk || !kiosk.config || !kiosk.mesh) return;

        kiosk.mesh.position.x = x;
        kiosk.mesh.position.z = z;
        if (kiosk.glow) {
          kiosk.glow.position.x = x;
          kiosk.glow.position.z = z;
        }

        kiosk.config.x = x;
        kiosk.config.z = z;
      }

      function updateSelfOrderKiosks(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit' || !window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted) return;

        const now = Date.now();
        const cameraPos = camera.position;

        selfOrderKiosks.forEach((kiosk) => {
          const config = kiosk.config;
          if (!config || config.deleted || !kiosk.mesh) return;

          // Spawn logic
          kiosk.spawnTimer += deltaTime;
          const spawnRate = getCustomerSpawnRate() * 1.5;
          if (
            kiosk.spawnTimer > spawnRate &&
            kiosk.queue.length < config.maxQueue &&
            !isTotalCustomerCapReached()
          ) {
            kiosk.spawnTimer = 0;
            const isVIP = Math.random() < (window.gameConfig.vipCustomers?.spawnChance || 0.15);
            const mesh = createCustomerMesh(isVIP);

            const startX = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 5;
            const startZ = config.z + 5;
            mesh.position.set(startX, 0, startZ);
            scene.add(mesh);

            const rotRad = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(config.rotation || 0);
            const dirZ = Math.cos(rotRad);
            const dirX = Math.sin(rotRad);

            const qPos = kiosk.queue.length;
            const targetX = config.x + dirX * (2 + qPos * SELF_ORDER_SPACING);
            const targetZ = config.z + dirZ * (2 + qPos * SELF_ORDER_SPACING);

            kiosk.queue.push({
              mesh: mesh,
              state: 'walking',
              targetX: targetX,
              targetZ: targetZ,
              queuePosition: qPos,
              isVIP: isVIP,
              orderTime: 0,
            });
          }

          // Process Queue
          for (let i = kiosk.queue.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const c = kiosk.queue[i];
            const mesh = c.mesh;

            // Simple collision avoidance with player
            const dxP = player.position.x - mesh.position.x;
            const dzP = player.position.z - mesh.position.z;
            const distSqP = dxP * dxP + dzP * dzP;
            if (distSqP < 2) {
              const distP = Math.sqrt(distSqP) || 0.001;
              const push = (2 - distP) * 0.1;
              mesh.position.x -= (dxP / distP) * push;
              mesh.position.z -= (dzP / distP) * push;
            }

            // Simple collision avoidance with other customers
            kiosk.queue.forEach((other, j) => {
               if (i === j) return;
               const dxO = other.mesh.position.x - mesh.position.x;
               const dzO = other.mesh.position.z - mesh.position.z;
               const distSqO = dxO * dxO + dzO * dzO;
               if (distSqO < 1.5) {
                  const distO = Math.sqrt(distSqO) || 0.001;
                  const push = (1.5 - distO) * 0.1;
                  mesh.position.x -= (dxO / distO) * push;
                  mesh.position.z -= (dzO / distO) * push;
               }
            });

            const squish = mesh.userData.squishState || {
              scaleY: 1,
              scaleXZ: 1,
              targetScaleY: 1,
              targetScaleXZ: 1,
            };

            if (mesh.userData.emojiMesh) {
              updateCustomerEmojiVisibility(c, now);
              mesh.userData.emojiMesh.lookAt(cameraPos);
            }

            if (c.state === 'walking') {
              switchAnimation(mesh, 'run');
              const dx = c.targetX - mesh.position.x;
              const dz = c.targetZ - mesh.position.z;
              const distSq = dx * dx + dz * dz;

              if (distSq > 0.05) {
                const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
                mesh.position.x += (dx / dist) * 3.5 * deltaTime; // Reduced from 5 to reduce lag
                mesh.position.z += (dz / dist) * 3.5 * deltaTime; // Reduced from 5 to reduce lag
                mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dx, dz);

                const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.012 + i) * 0.5 + 0.5;
                squish.targetScaleY = 0.9 + walkCycle * 0.2;
                squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.1 - walkCycle * 0.2;
              } else {
                if (c.queuePosition === 0) {
                  c.state = 'ordering';
                } else {
                  c.state = 'waiting';
                }
                mesh.rotation.y = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(config.rotation || 0) + Math.PI;
                squish.scaleY = 0.8;
                squish.scaleXZ = 1.2;
              }
            } else if (c.state === 'waiting') {
              switchAnimation(mesh, 'idle');
              const breathe = Math.sin(now * 0.004 + i * 0.5);
              squish.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.04;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.03;
            } else if (c.state === 'ordering') {
              switchAnimation(mesh, 'interact');
              c.orderTime += deltaTime;
              const interactCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.02);
              squish.targetScaleY = 1 + interactCycle * 0.05;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - interactCycle * 0.05;

              if (c.orderTime >= SELF_ORDER_ORDER_TIME) {
                createSmokeParticlesAt(config.x, 2, config.z);

                const cashierConfig = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
                if (cashierConfig && !cashierConfig.deleted) {
                  c.state = 'walking';
                  const queuePosition = customerQueue.filter(
                    (cq) => cq.state === 'waiting' || cq.state === 'walking'
                  ).length;
                  const target = getCustomerQueueTarget(cashierConfig, queuePosition);
                  c.targetX = target.x;
                  c.targetZ = target.z;
                  c.queuePosition = queuePosition;
                  updateCustomerEmoji(c, c.isVIP ? '⭐' : '🙂');
                  customerQueue.push(kiosk.queue.splice(i, 1)[0]);
                } else {
              const tipMult =
                    (c.isVIP ? window.gameConfig.vipCustomers?.tipMultiplier || 3 : 1) *
                    getRushHourTipMultiplier() *
                    getPrestigeProfitMultiplier();
                  const itemVal = window.gameConfig.resources.itemValue || 100;
                  
                  const startPos = { x: kiosk.mesh.position.x, y: 1.5, z: kiosk.mesh.position.z };
                  const targetPos = { x: player.position.x, y: player.position.y + 2, z: player.position.z };
                  
                  createFlyingItem(startPos, targetPos, 'money', () => {
                    modifyVaultBalance(itemVal * tipMult);
                    playSound('sell_sound');
                  }, true);

                  c.state = 'leaving';
                  c.targetX = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 5;
                  c.targetZ = 15;
                  updateCustomerEmoji(c, c.isVIP ? '🤩' : '😄');
                  kiosk.leavers.push(kiosk.queue.splice(i, 1)[0]);
                }

                for (let j = 0; j < kiosk.queue.length; j++) {
                  const qc = kiosk.queue[j];
                  qc.queuePosition--;
                  const rotRad2 = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(config.rotation || 0);
                  qc.targetX = config.x + Math.sin(rotRad2) * (2 + qc.queuePosition * SELF_ORDER_SPACING);
                  qc.targetZ = config.z + Math.cos(rotRad2) * (2 + qc.queuePosition * SELF_ORDER_SPACING);
                  qc.state = 'walking';
                }
              }
            }

            const sSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
            squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * sSpeed;
            squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * sSpeed;
            mesh.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);
          }

          // Process Leavers
          for (let i = kiosk.leavers.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            const c = kiosk.leavers[i];
            const mesh = c.mesh;
            const squish = mesh.userData.squishState;

            if (mesh.userData.emojiMesh) {
              updateCustomerEmojiVisibility(c, now);
              mesh.userData.emojiMesh.lookAt(cameraPos);
            }

            switchAnimation(mesh, 'run');
            const dx = c.targetX - mesh.position.x;
            const dz = c.targetZ - mesh.position.z;
            const distSq = dx * dx + dz * dz;

            if (distSq > 1) {
              const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
              mesh.position.x += (dx / dist) * 4 * deltaTime; // Reduced from 6 to reduce lag
              mesh.position.z += (dz / dist) * 4 * deltaTime; // Reduced from 6 to reduce lag
              mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dx, dz);

              const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.012 + i) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.9 + walkCycle * 0.2;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.1 - walkCycle * 0.2;

              const sSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
              squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * sSpeed;
              squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * sSpeed;
              mesh.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);
            } else {
              scene.remove(mesh);
              mesh.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
              kiosk.leavers.splice(i, 1);
            }
          }

          // Animate icon
          if (kiosk.mesh && kiosk.mesh.userData.icon) {
            kiosk.mesh.userData.icon.position.y = 3 + Math.sin(now * 0.003) * 0.2;
            kiosk.mesh.userData.icon.lookAt(cameraPos);
          }
        });
      }
      // ============================================
      // GENERIC TILE CREATION HELPERS
      // ============================================
      class RoundedBoxGeometry extends THREE.BufferGeometry {
        constructor(width = 1, height = 1, depth = 1, segments = 4, radius = 0.1) {
          super();

          segments = Math.max(1, Math.floor(segments));
          radius = Math.min(radius, Math.min(width, height, depth) / 2);

          const shape = new THREE.Shape();
          const eps = 0.00001;
          const r = radius - eps;

          // rounded rectangle shape
          shape.absarc(eps, eps, eps, -Math.PI / 2, -Math.PI, true);
          shape.absarc(eps, height - r * 2, eps, Math.PI, Math.PI / 2, true);
          shape.absarc(width - r * 2, height - r * 2, eps, Math.PI / 2, 0, true);
          shape.absarc(width - r * 2, eps, eps, 0, -Math.PI / 2, true);

          const extrudeSettings = {
            depth: depth - radius * 2,
            bevelEnabled: true,
            bevelSegments: segments,
            steps: 1,
            bevelSize: radius,
            bevelThickness: radius,
            curveSegments: segments,
          };

          const geometry = new THREE.ExtrudeGeometry(shape, extrudeSettings);
          geometry.center();

          this.copy(geometry);
        }
      }

      function createBaseTile(
        config = {
          x: 0,
          y: 0,
          z: 0,
          cost: 5,
          width: 4,
          depth: 4,
        }
      ) {
        const tileMesh = new THREE.Group();
        tileMesh.position.set(config.x, 0, config.z);
        const color = config.color ? new THREE.Color(config.color) : new THREE.Color(0xfdbf78);
        const sizeW = config.width || 4;
        const sizeD = config.depth || 4;

        // --- BOTTOM GLOW/OUTLINE ---
        const outline = new THREE.Mesh(
          new RoundedBoxGeometry(sizeW + 0.4, 0.1, sizeD + 0.4, 4, 0.4),
          new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: 0xffffff,
            transparent: true,
            opacity: 0.5
          })
        );
        outline.position.y = 0.05;
        tileMesh.add(outline);

        // --- MAIN BASE ---
        const base = new THREE.Mesh(
          new RoundedBoxGeometry(sizeW, 0.2, sizeD, 4, 0.4),
          new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: color.clone().multiplyScalar(0.8),
            roughness: 0.8,
          })
        );
        base.position.y = 0.1;
        tileMesh.add(base);

        // --- INNER TILE (The part that fills up) ---
        const innerSize = 0.85;
        const innerTile = new THREE.Mesh(
          new RoundedBoxGeometry(sizeW * innerSize, 0.1, sizeD * innerSize, 4, 0.3),
          new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: color,
            roughness: 0.6,
          })
        );
        innerTile.position.y = 0.2;
        tileMesh.add(innerTile);

        // --- PROGRESS OVERLAY ---
        const progressMesh = new THREE.Mesh(
          new RoundedBoxGeometry(sizeW * innerSize, 0.11, sizeD * innerSize, 4, 0.3),
          new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x2ecc71,
            emissive: 0x2ecc71,
            emissiveIntensity: 0.2
          })
        );
        progressMesh.position.y = 0.21;
        progressMesh.scale.set(1, 1, 0.001);
        tileMesh.add(progressMesh);

        tileMesh.userData.progressMesh = progressMesh;
        tileMesh.userData.innerSize = sizeD * innerSize;

        // --- COST TEXT ---
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        canvas.width = 256;
        canvas.height = 128;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const textTexture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
        const textMesh = new THREE.Mesh(
          new THREE.PlaneGeometry(sizeW * 0.7, sizeD * 0.35),
          new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ map: textTexture, transparent: true })
        );
        textMesh.position.set(0, 0.26, 0);
        textMesh.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
        tileMesh.add(textMesh);

        tileMesh.userData.costCtx = ctx;
        tileMesh.userData.costTexture = textTexture;

        scene.add(tileMesh);
        tileMesh.userData.targetProgress = 0;
        return { tileMesh, glowMesh: outline };
      }

      /**
       * Creates the cost display with progress bar for unlockable tiles
       * Used by: grill, fryer, drink station, cashier, trash, fountain, drive-thru, vault
       */
      function createTileCostDisplay(tileMesh, config) {}

      /**
       * Updates the progress bar target for lerping
       */
      function updateTileProgress(
        tileGroup,
        config,
        depositedField = 'moneyDeposited',
        costField = 'cost'
      ) {
        if (!tileGroup || !tileGroup.userData) return;
        const progressMesh = tileGroup.userData.progressMesh;
        if (!progressMesh) return;

        let progress = Math.min(config[depositedField] / config[costField], 1);
        progress = Math.max(0, progress);

        tileGroup.userData.targetProgress = progress;
      }

      /**
       * lerps the progress bar to its target (call each frame)
       */
      function lerpTileProgress(tileGroup) {
        if (!tileGroup || !tileGroup.userData) return;
        const progressMesh = tileGroup.userData.progressMesh;
        if (!progressMesh) return;

        const current = tileGroup.userData.currentProgress || 0;
        const target = tileGroup.userData.targetProgress || 0;
        if (Math.abs(target - current) < 0.001) {
          tileGroup.userData.currentProgress = target;
          applyProgressMesh(tileGroup, target);
          return;
        }

        const newProgress = lerp(current, target, 0.15);
        tileGroup.userData.currentProgress = newProgress;
        applyProgressMesh(tileGroup, newProgress);
      }

      /**
       * Applies progress value to mesh scale/position
       */
      function applyProgressMesh(tileGroup, progress) {
        if (!tileGroup || !tileGroup.userData) return;
        const progressMesh = tileGroup.userData.progressMesh;
        if (!progressMesh) return;

        progressMesh.scale.z = Math.max(0.001, progress);
        progressMesh.position.z = - (tileGroup.userData.innerSize / 2) * (1 - progress);
      }

      /**
       * Resets progress for a tile (e.g. on unlock)
       */
      function resetTileProgress(tileGroup) {
        if (!tileGroup || !tileGroup.userData) return;
        tileGroup.userData.currentProgress = 0;
        tileGroup.userData.targetProgress = 0;
        applyProgressMesh(tileGroup, 0);
      }

      /**
       * lerps all tile progress bars (call each frame in game loop)
       */
      function lerpTileProgressBars() {
        const tiles = [
          fountainTileMesh,
          fountain2TileMesh,
          selfOrderKioskTileMesh,
          driveThruTileMesh,
          grillTileMesh,
          cashierTileMesh,
          trashTileMesh,
          runnerStaffTileMesh,
          staffHireTileMesh,
          cleanerStaffTileMesh,
        ];
        for (const tileGroup of tiles) {
          if (tileGroup && tileGroup.userData && tileGroup.userData.progressMesh) {
            lerpTileProgress(tileGroup);
          }
        }

        diningTableTileMeshes.forEach((e) => lerpTileProgress(e.mesh));
      }

      /**
       * Generic cost display update for unlock tiles
       */
      function updateUnlockTileCostDisplay(tileGroup, config) {
        const costCtx = tileGroup.userData.costCtx;
        const costTexture = tileGroup.userData.costTexture;
        if (!costCtx || !costTexture) return;

        const remainingCost = Math.max(0, config.cost - config.moneyDeposited);

        costCtx.clearRect(0, 0, 256, 128);
        
        // Draw background pill
        costCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4)';
        costCtx.beginPath();
        costCtx.roundRect(10, 10, 236, 108, 50);
        costCtx.fill();

        costCtx.fillStyle = 'white';
        costCtx.font = 'bold 80px Arial';
        costCtx.textAlign = 'center';
        costCtx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        costCtx.fillText('$' + formatCurrencyAbbrev(remainingCost), 128, 64);
        costTexture.needsUpdate = true;
      }

      /**
       * Removes all tile visuals (platform, glow, cost display, progress bar)
       */
      function destroyTileVisuals(tileMesh, glowMesh) {
        if (!tileMesh) return;

        scene.remove(tileMesh);
        if (glowMesh) scene.remove(glowMesh);

        const keys = [
          'borderMesh',
          'icon',
          'progressBg',
          'progressMesh',
          'progressFill',
          'costPlane',
          'costCanvas',
          'costCtx',
          'costTexture',
        ];
        keys.forEach((key) => {
          if (tileMesh.userData[key]) {
            if (tileMesh.userData[key].geometry) tileMesh.userData[key].geometry.dispose();
            if (tileMesh.userData[key].material) tileMesh.userData[key].material.dispose();
            scene.remove(tileMesh.userData[key]);
          }
        });

        if (tileMesh.geometry) tileMesh.geometry.dispose();
        if (tileMesh.material) tileMesh.material.dispose();
      }

      /**
       * Check if player is within a tile's zone area
       */
      function isPlayerInZone(config, paddingX = 0, paddingZ = 0) {
        return (
          Math.abs(player.position.x - config.x) < config.width / 2 + paddingX &&
          Math.abs(player.position.z - config.z) < config.depth / 2 + paddingZ
        );
      }

      // ============================================
      // LOADING SCREEN
      // ============================================

      function updateLoadingProgress(step, textKeyOrText) {
        completedLoadSteps++;
        const progress = Math.min((completedLoadSteps / totalLoadSteps) * 100, 100);

        const loadingBar = document.getElementById('loading-bar');
        const loadingText = document.getElementById('loading-text');

        if (loadingBar) {
          loadingBar.style.width = progress + '%';
        }
        if (loadingText && textKeyOrText) {
          const translated = i18nReady ? t(textKeyOrText) : textKeyOrText;
          loadingText.textContent = translated;
        }
      }

      function hideLoadingScreen() {
        const loadingScreen = document.getElementById('loading-screen');
        if (loadingScreen) {
          loadingScreen.classList.add('hidden');
          // Remove from DOM after animation
          setTimeout(() => {
            loadingScreen.style.display = 'none';
          }, 500);
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // INITIALIZATION
      // ============================================

      function initThreeJS() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('game-canvas');

        const zoomToggle = document.getElementById('zoom-toggle');
        if (zoomToggle) {
          zoomToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isZoomedOut = !isZoomedOut;
          });
        }

        const camLeftBtn = document.getElementById('cam-left-btn');
        if (camLeftBtn) {
          camLeftBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            targetCameraAngle -= Math.PI / 2;
          });
        }

        const camRightBtn = document.getElementById('cam-right-btn');
        if (camRightBtn) {
          camRightBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            targetCameraAngle += Math.PI / 2;
          });
        }

        // Create scene
        scene = new THREE.Scene();
        scene.background = new THREE.Color(window.gameConfig.settings.skyColor);

        // Create camera (third-person perspective)
        camera = new THREE.PerspectiveCamera(60, 720 / 1280, 0.1, 1000);
        camera.position.set(0, 25, 25);
        camera.lookAt(0, 0, 0);

        // Create renderer
        renderer = new THREE.WebGLRenderer({
          canvas,
          antialias: false,
          powerPreference: performanceSettings.enableShadows ? 'high-performance' : 'low-power',
        });
        // Disabled antialias for mobile perf
        renderer.setSize(720, 1280);
        const pixelRatio = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, performanceSettings.pixelRatioCap);
        renderer.setPixelRatio(pixelRatio);
        // Capped ratio for performance
        renderer.shadowMap.enabled = performanceSettings.enableShadows;
        if (performanceSettings.enableShadows) {
          renderer.shadowMap.type = THREE.PCFShadowMap;
        }
        // Changed to PCF for perf

        // Lighting
        const ambientLight = new THREE.AmbientLight(0xffffff, 0.6);
        scene.add(ambientLight);

        const directionalLight = new THREE.DirectionalLight(0xffffff, 0.8);
        directionalLight.position.set(10, 20, 10);
        directionalLight.castShadow = performanceSettings.enableShadows;
        if (performanceSettings.enableShadows) {
          directionalLight.shadow.mapSize.width = performanceSettings.shadowMapSize;
          // Reduced shadow resolution
          directionalLight.shadow.mapSize.height = performanceSettings.shadowMapSize;
          directionalLight.shadow.camera.near = 0.5;
          directionalLight.shadow.camera.far = 50;
          directionalLight.shadow.camera.left = -30;
          directionalLight.shadow.camera.right = 30;
          directionalLight.shadow.camera.top = 30;
          directionalLight.shadow.camera.bottom = -30;
        }
        scene.add(directionalLight);

        createTutorialArrow();
      }

      // Restaurant dimensions
      const RESTAURANT_WIDTH = 40;
      // X axis
      const RESTAURANT_DEPTH = 60;
      // Z axis

      function createGround() {
        const halfWidth = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2;
        const halfDepth = RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2;
        const kitchenDividerZ = -10;
        // Kitchen starts at z = -10
        const kitchenDepth = halfDepth + kitchenDividerZ;
        // Kitchen area depth
        const diningDepth = halfDepth - kitchenDividerZ;
        // Dining area depth

        // Load floor textures from config
        const floorTextureLoader = new THREE.TextureLoader();
        const diningFloorAssetId = window.gameConfig.settings.diningFloorAsset || 'floor_tile';
        const kitchenFloorAssetId =
          window.gameConfig.settings.kitchenFloorAsset || 'kitchen_floor_tile';
        const floorAsset = lib.getAsset(diningFloorAssetId);
        const kitchenFloorAsset = lib.getAsset(kitchenFloorAssetId);

        // Dining floor material
        let diningFloorMaterial;
        if (floorAsset && floorAsset.url) {
          const floorTexture = floorTextureLoader.load(floorAsset.url);
          floorTexture.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
          floorTexture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
          floorTexture.repeat.set(RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 8, diningDepth / 8);
          floorTexture.minFilter = THREE.LinearMipmapLinearFilter;
          floorTexture.magFilter = THREE.LinearFilter;

          diningFloorMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            map: floorTexture,
            roughness: 0.7,
            metalness: 0.1,
          });
        } else {
          diningFloorMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: window.gameConfig.settings.groundColor,
            roughness: 0.8,
            metalness: 0.1,
          });
        }

        // Kitchen floor material
        let kitchenFloorMaterial;
        if (kitchenFloorAsset && kitchenFloorAsset.url) {
          const kitchenTexture = floorTextureLoader.load(kitchenFloorAsset.url);
          kitchenTexture.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
          kitchenTexture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
          kitchenTexture.repeat.set(RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 6, kitchenDepth / 6);
          kitchenTexture.minFilter = THREE.LinearMipmapLinearFilter;
          kitchenTexture.magFilter = THREE.LinearFilter;

          kitchenFloorMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            map: kitchenTexture,
            roughness: 0.5,
            metalness: 0.2,
          });
        } else {
          // Fallback to gray kitchen floor
          kitchenFloorMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x808080,
            roughness: 0.6,
            metalness: 0.2,
          });
        }

        // Dining floor (front section) - extends from kitchen divider to front wall
        const fullDiningDepth = halfDepth - kitchenDividerZ;
        // Full distance from divider to front
        const diningFloorGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH, fullDiningDepth);
        const diningFloor = new THREE.Mesh(diningFloorGeometry, diningFloorMaterial);
        diningFloor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
        diningFloor.position.z = kitchenDividerZ + fullDiningDepth / 2;
        diningFloor.receiveShadow = true;
        scene.add(diningFloor);

        // Kitchen floor (back section)
        const kitchenFloorGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH, kitchenDepth);
        const kitchenFloor = new THREE.Mesh(kitchenFloorGeometry, kitchenFloorMaterial);
        kitchenFloor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
        kitchenFloor.position.z = -halfDepth + kitchenDepth / 2;
        kitchenFloor.receiveShadow = true;
        scene.add(kitchenFloor);

        // Store reference (use dining floor as main)
        groundMesh = diningFloor;

        // Load wall texture
        const wallTextureLoader = new THREE.TextureLoader();
        const wallAsset = lib.getAsset('wall_tile');

        let wallMaterial;
        const wallHeight = 3;

        if (wallAsset && wallAsset.url) {
          // Create wall materials with different repeat values for different wall sizes
          const createWallMaterial = (repeatX, repeatY) => {
            const wallTexture = wallTextureLoader.load(wallAsset.url);
            wallTexture.wrapS = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
            wallTexture.wrapT = THREE.RepeatWrapping;
            wallTexture.repeat.set(repeatX, repeatY);
            wallTexture.minFilter = THREE.LinearMipmapLinearFilter;
            wallTexture.magFilter = THREE.LinearFilter;

            return new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
              map: wallTexture,
              roughness: 0.7,
              metalness: 0.1,
            });
          };
          // Back wall (kitchen side)
          const backWallGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH, wallHeight, 0.5);
          const backWallMaterial = createWallMaterial(RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 4, wallHeight / 2);
          const backWall = new THREE.Mesh(backWallGeometry, backWallMaterial);
          backWall.position.set(0, wallHeight / 2, -halfDepth);
          backWall.castShadow = true;
          backWall.receiveShadow = true;
          scene.add(backWall);

          // Front wall
          const frontWallGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH, wallHeight, 0.5);
          const frontWallMaterial = createWallMaterial(RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 4, wallHeight / 2);
          const frontWall = new THREE.Mesh(frontWallGeometry, frontWallMaterial);
          frontWall.position.set(0, wallHeight / 2, halfDepth);
          frontWall.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(frontWall);

          // Left wall - split into two parts with entrance door
          const entranceOpeningCenter = 10;
          // Center of entrance (toward front of restaurant)
          const entranceOpeningWidth = 6;
          // Width of door opening

          // Left wall - back section (from back to entrance)
          const leftWallBackLength = halfDepth - entranceOpeningWidth / 2 + entranceOpeningCenter;
          const leftWallBackGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, wallHeight, leftWallBackLength);
          const leftWallBackMat = createWallMaterial(leftWallBackLength / 4, wallHeight / 2);
          const leftWallBack = new THREE.Mesh(leftWallBackGeometry, leftWallBackMat);
          leftWallBack.position.set(
            -halfWidth,
            wallHeight / 2,
            -halfDepth + leftWallBackLength / 2
          );
          leftWallBack.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(leftWallBack);

          // Left wall - front section (from entrance to front)
          const leftWallFrontLength = halfDepth - entranceOpeningWidth / 2 - entranceOpeningCenter;
          const leftWallFrontGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, wallHeight, leftWallFrontLength);
          const leftWallFrontMat = createWallMaterial(leftWallFrontLength / 4, wallHeight / 2);
          const leftWallFront = new THREE.Mesh(leftWallFrontGeometry, leftWallFrontMat);
          leftWallFront.position.set(
            -halfWidth,
            wallHeight / 2,
            halfDepth - leftWallFrontLength / 2
          );
          leftWallFront.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(leftWallFront);

          // Create entrance door frame and decorations
          createEntranceDoor(-halfWidth, entranceOpeningCenter, wallHeight, createWallMaterial);

          // Right wall - split into two parts with opening for drive-thru
          const driveThruOpeningCenter = 0;
          // Center of the opening
          const driveThruOpeningWidth = 12;
          // Width of opening for drive-thru access
          const rightWallMaterial = createWallMaterial(RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 4, wallHeight / 2);

          // Right wall - front section (from front to opening)
          const rightWallFrontLength =
            halfDepth - driveThruOpeningWidth / 2 - driveThruOpeningCenter;
          const rightWallFrontGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(
            0.5,
            wallHeight,
            rightWallFrontLength
          );
          const rightWallFrontMat = createWallMaterial(rightWallFrontLength / 4, wallHeight / 2);
          const rightWallFront = new THREE.Mesh(rightWallFrontGeometry, rightWallFrontMat);
          rightWallFront.position.set(
            halfWidth,
            wallHeight / 2,
            halfDepth - rightWallFrontLength / 2
          );
          rightWallFront.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(rightWallFront);

          // Right wall - back section (from opening to back)
          const rightWallBackLength =
            halfDepth - driveThruOpeningWidth / 2 + driveThruOpeningCenter;
          const rightWallBackGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, wallHeight, rightWallBackLength);
          const rightWallBackMat = createWallMaterial(rightWallBackLength / 4, wallHeight / 2);
          const rightWallBack = new THREE.Mesh(rightWallBackGeometry, rightWallBackMat);
          rightWallBack.position.set(
            halfWidth,
            wallHeight / 2,
            -halfDepth + rightWallBackLength / 2
          );
          rightWallBack.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(rightWallBack);

          // Create outdoor drive-thru area (asphalt parking lot)
          const outdoorWidth = 20;
          const outdoorGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(outdoorWidth, RESTAURANT_DEPTH);
          const outdoorFloorColor = window.gameConfig.settings.outdoorFloorColor || '#444444';
          const outdoorMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: outdoorFloorColor,
            roughness: 0.9,
            metalness: 0.1,
          });
          const outdoorFloor = new THREE.Mesh(outdoorGeometry, outdoorMaterial);
          outdoorFloor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
          outdoorFloor.position.set(halfWidth + outdoorWidth / 2, -0.01, 0);
          outdoorFloor.receiveShadow = true;
          scene.add(outdoorFloor);
        } else {
          // Fallback to plain color walls
          wallMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x8b4513,
            roughness: 0.6,
          });

          // Back wall (kitchen side)
          const backWallGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH, wallHeight, 0.5);
          const backWall = new THREE.Mesh(backWallGeometry, wallMaterial);
          backWall.position.set(0, wallHeight / 2, -halfDepth);
          backWall.castShadow = true;
          backWall.receiveShadow = true;
          scene.add(backWall);

          // Front wall
          const frontWallGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH, wallHeight, 0.5);
          const frontWall = new THREE.Mesh(frontWallGeometry, wallMaterial);
          frontWall.position.set(0, wallHeight / 2, halfDepth);
          frontWall.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(frontWall);

          // Left wall - split into two parts with entrance door
          const entranceOpeningCenter = 10;
          const entranceOpeningWidth = 6;

          // Left wall - back section
          const leftWallBackLength = halfDepth - entranceOpeningWidth / 2 + entranceOpeningCenter;
          const leftWallBackGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, wallHeight, leftWallBackLength);
          const leftWallBack = new THREE.Mesh(leftWallBackGeometry, wallMaterial);
          leftWallBack.position.set(
            -halfWidth,
            wallHeight / 2,
            -halfDepth + leftWallBackLength / 2
          );
          leftWallBack.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(leftWallBack);

          // Left wall - front section
          const leftWallFrontLength = halfDepth - entranceOpeningWidth / 2 - entranceOpeningCenter;
          const leftWallFrontGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, wallHeight, leftWallFrontLength);
          const leftWallFront = new THREE.Mesh(leftWallFrontGeometry, wallMaterial);
          leftWallFront.position.set(
            -halfWidth,
            wallHeight / 2,
            halfDepth - leftWallFrontLength / 2
          );
          leftWallFront.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(leftWallFront);

          // Create entrance door frame
          createEntranceDoor(-halfWidth, entranceOpeningCenter, wallHeight, null);

          // Right wall - split into two parts with opening for drive-thru
          const driveThruOpeningCenter = 0;
          const driveThruOpeningWidth = 12;

          // Right wall - front section
          const rightWallFrontLength =
            halfDepth - driveThruOpeningWidth / 2 - driveThruOpeningCenter;
          const rightWallFrontGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(
            0.5,
            wallHeight,
            rightWallFrontLength
          );
          const rightWallFront = new THREE.Mesh(rightWallFrontGeometry, wallMaterial);
          rightWallFront.position.set(
            halfWidth,
            wallHeight / 2,
            halfDepth - rightWallFrontLength / 2
          );
          rightWallFront.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(rightWallFront);

          // Right wall - back section
          const rightWallBackLength =
            halfDepth - driveThruOpeningWidth / 2 + driveThruOpeningCenter;
          const rightWallBackGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, wallHeight, rightWallBackLength);
          const rightWallBack = new THREE.Mesh(rightWallBackGeometry, wallMaterial);
          rightWallBack.position.set(
            halfWidth,
            wallHeight / 2,
            -halfDepth + rightWallBackLength / 2
          );
          rightWallBack.castShadow = true;
          scene.add(rightWallBack);

          // Create outdoor drive-thru area (asphalt)
          const outdoorWidth = 20;
          const outdoorGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(outdoorWidth, RESTAURANT_DEPTH);
          const outdoorFloorColor = window.gameConfig.settings.outdoorFloorColor || '#444444';
          const outdoorMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: outdoorFloorColor,
            roughness: 0.9,
            metalness: 0.1,
          });
          const outdoorFloor = new THREE.Mesh(outdoorGeometry, outdoorMaterial);
          outdoorFloor.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
          outdoorFloor.position.set(halfWidth + outdoorWidth / 2, -0.01, 0);
          outdoorFloor.receiveShadow = true;
          scene.add(outdoorFloor);
        }

        // Kitchen divider line (visual separation)
        const dividerGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH - 4, 0.05, 0.3);
        const dividerMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x666666,
          roughness: 0.3,
        });
        const divider = new THREE.Mesh(dividerGeometry, dividerMaterial);
        divider.position.set(0, 0.03, -10);
        scene.add(divider);

        // Create bustling city background
        createCityBackground(halfWidth, halfDepth);

        // Add indoor potted plants
        createPottedPlants();
      }

      function createPottedPlants() {
        const createPlant = (x, z) => {
          const plantGroup = new THREE.Group();

          // Pot
          const potGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.6, 0.4, 0.8, 12);
          const potMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x8b4513,
            // Terracotta
            roughness: 0.8,
          });
          const pot = new THREE.Mesh(potGeometry, potMaterial);
          pot.position.y = 0.4;
          pot.castShadow = true;
          plantGroup.add(pot);

          // Dirt
          const dirtGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.55, 0.55, 0.1, 12);
          const dirtMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x3e2723,
            // Dark brown
            roughness: 0.9,
          });
          const dirt = new THREE.Mesh(dirtGeometry, dirtMaterial);
          dirt.position.y = 0.761;
          plantGroup.add(dirt);

          // Plant stem
          const stemGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.05, 0.05, 1, 8);
          const stemMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x2e7d32,
            // Green
            roughness: 0.7,
          });
          const stem = new THREE.Mesh(stemGeometry, stemMaterial);
          stem.position.y = 1.3;
          plantGroup.add(stem);

          // Leaves (using a few spheres to make a bush shape)
          const leavesMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x228b22,
            // Forest green
            roughness: 0.8,
          });

          const bush1 = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.7, 12, 12), leavesMaterial);
          bush1.position.set(0, 1.8, 0);
          bush1.castShadow = true;
          plantGroup.add(bush1);

          const bush2 = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.5, 10, 10), leavesMaterial);
          bush2.position.set(0.3, 1.5, 0.3);
          bush2.castShadow = true;
          plantGroup.add(bush2);

          const bush3 = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.5, 10, 10), leavesMaterial);
          bush3.position.set(-0.3, 1.6, -0.2);
          bush3.castShadow = true;
          plantGroup.add(bush3);

          plantGroup.position.set(x, 0, z);
          scene.add(plantGroup);
        };
        // Front corners
        createPlant(22, 32);
        createPlant(-22, 32);

        // Near kitchen divider
        createPlant(22, -8);
        createPlant(-22, -8);

        // Around the dining area
        createPlant(-10, 12);
        createPlant(10, 12);
      }

      function createCityBackground(halfWidth, halfDepth) {
        const cityGroup = new THREE.Group();
        cityGroup.userData.windowLights = [];
        // Store window references for animation

        // Building colors (various city building shades)
        const buildingColors = [
          0x3d4852, // Dark slate
          0x4a5568, // Gray
          0x2d3748, // Dark blue-gray
          0x1a202c, // Very dark
          0x553c9a, // Purple tint
          0x2b4c7e, // Blue tint
          0x434190, // Indigo
          0x2c5282, // Blue
          0x285e61, // Teal
        ];

        // Window light colors
        const windowColors = [0xffe066, 0xfff3bf, 0xffffff, 0xffd43b, 0x63e6be];

        // Create buildings around the perimeter of the restaurant
        function createBuilding(x, z, width, depth, height, colorIndex) {
          const buildingGroup = new THREE.Group();

          const color = buildingColors[colorIndex % buildingColors.length];

          // Main building structure
          const buildingGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(width, height, depth);
          const buildingMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: color,
            roughness: 0.8,
            metalness: 0.2,
          });
          const building = new THREE.Mesh(buildingGeometry, buildingMaterial);
          building.position.y = height / 2;
          building.castShadow = true;
          building.receiveShadow = true;
          buildingGroup.add(building);

          // Add windows (rows and columns)
          const windowRows = Math.floor(height / 2.5);
          const windowCols = Math.floor(width / 2);
          const windowSize = 0.8;
          const windowSpacingX = width / (windowCols + 1);
          const windowSpacingY = 2.2;

          for (let row = 0; row < windowRows; row++) {
            for (let col = 0; col < windowCols; col++) {
              // Randomly lit windows
              const isLit = Math.random() > 0.4;
              const windowColor = isLit
                ? windowColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * windowColors.length)]
                : 0x1a1a2e;

              const windowGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(windowSize, windowSize * 1.2, 0.1);
              const windowMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                color: windowColor,
                emissive: isLit ? windowColor : 0x000000,
                emissiveIntensity: isLit ? 0.6 : 0,
                roughness: 0.1,
                metalness: 0.3,
              });
              const windowMesh = new THREE.Mesh(windowGeometry, windowMaterial);

              const wx = -width / 2 + windowSpacingX * (col + 1);
              const wy = 2 + row * windowSpacingY;

              // Front face windows
              windowMesh.position.set(wx, wy, depth / 2 + 0.05);
              buildingGroup.add(windowMesh);

              // Track lit windows for animation
              if (isLit) {
                cityGroup.userData.windowLights.push({
                  mesh: windowMesh,
                  baseColor: windowColor,
                  flickerRate: 0.002 + Math.random() * 0.005,
                  flickerOffset: Math.random() * 1000,
                });
              }

              // Back face windows (clone)
              const backWindow = windowMesh.clone();
              backWindow.position.z = -depth / 2 - 0.05;
              backWindow.rotation.y = Math.PI;
              buildingGroup.add(backWindow);
            }
          }

          // Rooftop details
          const roofDetailGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(width * 0.6, 1.5, depth * 0.6);
          const roofDetailMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x1a202c,
            roughness: 0.7,
          });
          const roofDetail = new THREE.Mesh(roofDetailGeometry, roofDetailMaterial);
          roofDetail.position.y = height + 0.75;
          buildingGroup.add(roofDetail);

          // Random antenna or AC unit
          if (Math.random() > 0.5) {
            const antennaGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.1, 0.1, 3, 8);
            const antennaMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
              color: 0x718096,
              metalness: 0.6,
            });
            const antenna = new THREE.Mesh(antennaGeometry, antennaMaterial);
            antenna.position.set(width * 0.3, height + 2, 0);
            buildingGroup.add(antenna);

            // Red blinking light on antenna
            const lightGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 8, 8);
            const lightMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
              color: 0xff0000,
              emissive: 0xff0000,
              emissiveIntensity: 1,
            });
            const antennaLight = new THREE.Mesh(lightGeometry, lightMaterial);
            antennaLight.position.set(width * 0.3, height + 3.5, 0);
            buildingGroup.add(antennaLight);

            cityGroup.userData.windowLights.push({
              mesh: antennaLight,
              baseColor: 0xff0000,
              flickerRate: 0.008,
              flickerOffset: Math.random() * 1000,
              isBeacon: true,
            });
          }

          buildingGroup.position.set(x, 0, z);
          return buildingGroup;
        }

        // Create street/road around restaurant
        const streetWidth = 8;
        const streetColor = 0x2d2d2d;

        // Left street (before entrance)
        const leftStreetGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(streetWidth, RESTAURANT_DEPTH + 40);
        const streetMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: streetColor,
          roughness: 0.9,
        });
        const leftStreet = new THREE.Mesh(leftStreetGeometry, streetMaterial);
        leftStreet.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
        leftStreet.position.set(-halfWidth - streetWidth / 2 - 5, -0.02, 0);
        leftStreet.receiveShadow = true;
        cityGroup.add(leftStreet);

        // Back street
        const backStreetGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH + 80, streetWidth);
        const backStreet = new THREE.Mesh(backStreetGeometry, streetMaterial);
        backStreet.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
        backStreet.position.set(0, -0.02, -halfDepth - streetWidth / 2 - 3);
        backStreet.receiveShadow = true;
        cityGroup.add(backStreet);

        // Front street (sidewalk area extends)
        const frontStreetGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(RESTAURANT_WIDTH + 80, streetWidth);
        const frontStreet = new THREE.Mesh(frontStreetGeometry, streetMaterial);
        frontStreet.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
        frontStreet.position.set(0, -0.02, halfDepth + streetWidth / 2 + 5);
        frontStreet.receiveShadow = true;
        cityGroup.add(frontStreet);

        // Add road markings (yellow lines)
        const lineGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.5, 0.02, 0.3);
        const lineMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffd700,
          roughness: 0.5,
        });

        // Back street dashed lines
        for (let i = -10; i <= 10; i++) {
          const line = new THREE.Mesh(lineGeometry, lineMaterial);
          line.position.set(i * 4, 0.01, -halfDepth - streetWidth / 2 - 3);
          cityGroup.add(line);
        }

        // Front street dashed lines
        for (let i = -10; i <= 10; i++) {
          const line = new THREE.Mesh(lineGeometry, lineMaterial);
          line.position.set(i * 4, 0.01, halfDepth + streetWidth / 2 + 5);
          cityGroup.add(line);
        }

        // Create buildings - BACK ROW (behind restaurant)
        const backRowZ = -halfDepth - streetWidth - 15;
        for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
          const x = -50 + i * 14 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3;
          const height = 15 + Math.random() * 25;
          const width = 8 + Math.random() * 6;
          const depth = 8 + Math.random() * 4;
          const building = createBuilding(x, backRowZ - depth / 2, width, depth, height, i);
          cityGroup.add(building);
        }

        // Create buildings - FRONT ROW (across the street in front)
        const frontRowZ = halfDepth + streetWidth + 18;
        for (let i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
          const x = -45 + i * 15 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 3;
          const height = 12 + Math.random() * 20;
          const width = 7 + Math.random() * 5;
          const depth = 6 + Math.random() * 4;
          const building = createBuilding(x, frontRowZ + depth / 2, width, depth, height, i + 3);
          building.rotation.y = Math.PI;
          // Face toward restaurant
          cityGroup.add(building);
        }

        // Create buildings - LEFT SIDE
        const leftRowX = -halfWidth - streetWidth - 12;
        for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          const z = -40 + i * 18 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
          const height = 18 + Math.random() * 22;
          const width = 10 + Math.random() * 6;
          const depth = 8 + Math.random() * 4;
          const building = createBuilding(leftRowX - width / 2, z, width, depth, height, i + 5);
          building.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2;
          // Face toward restaurant
          cityGroup.add(building);
        }

        // Add street lamps
        function createStreetLamp(x, z) {
          const lampGroup = new THREE.Group();

          // Pole
          const poleGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.15, 0.2, 5, 8);
          const poleMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x333333,
            metalness: 0.5,
            roughness: 0.4,
          });
          const pole = new THREE.Mesh(poleGeometry, poleMaterial);
          pole.position.y = 2.5;
          lampGroup.add(pole);

          // Lamp head
          const headGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1, 0.5, 0.5);
          const headMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x444444,
            metalness: 0.6,
          });
          const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeometry, headMaterial);
          head.position.y = 5.2;
          lampGroup.add(head);

          // Light bulb (glowing)
          const bulbGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.3, 12, 12);
          const bulbMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0xffe4b5,
            emissive: 0xffd700,
            emissiveIntensity: 0.8,
            roughness: 0.2,
          });
          const bulb = new THREE.Mesh(bulbGeometry, bulbMaterial);
          bulb.position.y = 4.8;
          lampGroup.add(bulb);

          lampGroup.position.set(x, 0, z);
          return lampGroup;
        }

        // Add street lamps along the streets
        for (let i = -3; i <= 3; i++) {
          // Back street lamps
          cityGroup.add(createStreetLamp(i * 15, -halfDepth - streetWidth / 2 - 3 - 3));
          // Front street lamps
          cityGroup.add(createStreetLamp(i * 15, halfDepth + streetWidth / 2 + 5 + 3));
        }

        // Left side lamps
        for (let i = -2; i <= 2; i++) {
          cityGroup.add(createStreetLamp(-halfWidth - streetWidth / 2 - 5 - 3, i * 18));
        }

        // Add some parked cars on the streets for atmosphere
        function createParkedCar(x, z, rotation, color) {
          const carGroup = new THREE.Group();

          // Car body
          const bodyGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2, 0.7, 4);
          const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: color,
            roughness: 0.4,
            metalness: 0.3,
          });
          const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial);
          body.position.y = 0.5;
          carGroup.add(body);

          // Car roof
          const roofGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.6, 0.5, 2);
          const roof = new THREE.Mesh(roofGeometry, bodyMaterial);
          roof.position.set(0, 1.1, -0.3);
          carGroup.add(roof);

          // Windows
          const windowMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x87ceeb,
            roughness: 0.1,
            metalness: 0.3,
            opacity: 0.7,
            transparent: true,
          });
          const frontWindow = new THREE.Mesh(new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.4, 0.4, 0.1), windowMaterial);
          frontWindow.position.set(0, 1, 0.6);
          frontWindow.rotation.x = -0.2;
          carGroup.add(frontWindow);

          carGroup.position.set(x, 0, z);
          carGroup.rotation.y = rotation;
          return carGroup;
        }

        const carColors = [
          0xe74c3c, 0x3498db, 0x2ecc71, 0xf39c12, 0x9b59b6, 0x1abc9c, 0xffffff, 0x2c3e50,
        ];

        // Add parked cars on back street
        for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
          const x = -30 + i * 18 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 5;
          const color = carColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * carColors.length)];
          cityGroup.add(createParkedCar(x, -halfDepth - streetWidth - 1, 0, color));
        }

        // Add parked cars on front street
        for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
          const x = -25 + i * 16 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 4;
          const color = carColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * carColors.length)];
          cityGroup.add(createParkedCar(x, halfDepth + streetWidth + 9, Math.PI, color));
        }

        // Sky gradient backdrop (far behind everything)
        const skyGeometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(300, 100);
        const skyMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          color: 0x1a1a2e,
          // Dark night sky
          side: THREE.DoubleSide,
        });
        // Back sky
        const backSky = new THREE.Mesh(skyGeometry, skyMaterial);
        backSky.position.set(0, 30, -120);
        cityGroup.add(backSky);

        // Front sky
        const frontSky = new THREE.Mesh(skyGeometry, skyMaterial);
        frontSky.position.set(0, 30, 120);
        frontSky.rotation.y = Math.PI;
        cityGroup.add(frontSky);

        // Left sky
        const leftSky = new THREE.Mesh(skyGeometry, skyMaterial);
        leftSky.position.set(-120, 30, 0);
        leftSky.rotation.y = Math.PI / 2;
        cityGroup.add(leftSky);

        scene.add(cityGroup);

        // Store reference for animation
        scene.userData.cityBackground = cityGroup;
      }

      function updateCityLights(deltaTime) {
        const city = scene.userData.cityBackground;
        if (!city || !city.userData.windowLights) return;

        if (performanceSettings.cityLightUpdateInterval > 0) {
          cityLightUpdateTimer += deltaTime;
          if (cityLightUpdateTimer < performanceSettings.cityLightUpdateInterval) return;
          cityLightUpdateTimer = 0;
        }

        const now = Date.now();

        for (const light of city.userData.windowLights) {
          if (light.isBeacon) {
            // Blinking beacon lights
            const blink = Math.sin(now * light.flickerRate + light.flickerOffset) > 0.3;
            light.mesh.material.emissiveIntensity = blink ? 1 : 0.1;
          } else {
            // Subtle window flickering
            const flicker = 0.5 + Math.sin(now * light.flickerRate + light.flickerOffset) * 0.15;
            light.mesh.material.emissiveIntensity = flicker;
          }
        }
      }

      function createEntranceDoor(wallX, entranceZ, wallHeight, createWallMaterial) {
        const entranceGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Door frame - vertical posts
        const framePostGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.4, wallHeight + 0.5, 0.6);
        const framePostMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xdaa520,
