      function updateStaffTileCostDisplayGeneric(tileMesh, config) {
        const costCanvas = tileMesh.userData.costCanvas;
        const costCtx = tileMesh.userData.costCtx;
        const costTexture = tileMesh.userData.costTexture;
        const costPlane = tileMesh.userData.costPlane;

        if (!costCanvas || !costCtx || !costTexture || !costPlane) return;

        costCtx.clearRect(0, 0, costCanvas.width, costCanvas.height);

        if (config.staffHired) {
          costCtx.fillStyle = '#27AE60';
          costCtx.font = 'bold 48px Arial';
          costCtx.textAlign = 'center';
          costCtx.textBaseline = 'middle';
          costCtx.fillText('HIRED!', costCanvas.width / 2, costCanvas.height / 2);
        } else {
          const remainingCost = Math.max(0, config.hireCost - config.moneyDeposited);

          costCtx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
          const pillWidth = 200;
          const pillHeight = 80;
          const pillX = (costCanvas.width - pillWidth) / 2;
          const pillY = (costCanvas.height - pillHeight) / 2;
          costCtx.beginPath();
          costCtx.roundRect(pillX, pillY, pillWidth, pillHeight, 20);
          costCtx.fill();

          const progress = config.moneyDeposited / config.hireCost;
          if (progress >= 0.75) {
            costCtx.fillStyle = '#27AE60';
          } else if (progress >= 0.5) {
            costCtx.fillStyle = '#F39C12';
          } else {
            costCtx.fillStyle = '#FFD700';
          }

          costCtx.font = 'bold 56px Arial';
          costCtx.textAlign = 'center';
          costCtx.textBaseline = 'middle';
          costCtx.fillText(
            '$' + formatCurrencyAbbrev(remainingCost),
            costCanvas.width / 2,
            costCanvas.height / 2
          );
        }

        costTexture.needsUpdate = true;
        if (costPlane) {
          costPlane.position.x = config.x;
          costPlane.position.z = config.z;
        }

        if (config.staffHired) {
          setTimeout(() => {
            if (costPlane) costPlane.visible = false;
          }, 2000);
        }
      }

      function createDiningTable(tableConfig, index) {
        const tableGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Table top
        const tableTopGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2.5, 0.15, 2);
        const tableTopMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x8b4513,
          roughness: 0.6,
          metalness: 0.1,
        });
        const tableTop = new THREE.Mesh(tableTopGeometry, tableTopMaterial);
        tableTop.position.y = 1;
        tableTop.castShadow = true;
        tableTop.receiveShadow = true;
        tableGroup.add(tableTop);

        // Table legs
        const legGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.15, 1, 0.15);
        const legMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x5d3a1a,
          roughness: 0.7,
        });

        const legPositions = [
          [-1, 0.5, -0.7],
          [1, 0.5, -0.7],
          [-1, 0.5, 0.7],
          [1, 0.5, 0.7],
        ];

        legPositions.forEach((pos) => {
          const leg = new THREE.Mesh(legGeometry, legMaterial);
          leg.position.set(pos[0], pos[1], pos[2]);
          leg.castShadow = true;
          tableGroup.add(leg);
        });

        // Two chairs
        for (let side = -1; side <= 1; side += 2) {
          const chairGroup = new THREE.Group();

          // Seat
          const seatGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8, 0.1, 0.8);
          const seatMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0xa0522d,
            roughness: 0.6,
          });
          const seat = new THREE.Mesh(seatGeometry, seatMaterial);
          seat.position.y = 0.5;
          seat.castShadow = true;
          chairGroup.add(seat);

          // Backrest
          const backGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.8, 0.6, 0.1);
          const back = new THREE.Mesh(backGeometry, seatMaterial);
          back.position.set(0, 0.85, -0.35 * side);
          back.castShadow = true;
          chairGroup.add(back);

          // Chair legs
          const chairLegGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.08, 0.5, 0.08);
          const chairLegPositions = [
            [-0.3, 0.25, -0.3],
            [0.3, 0.25, -0.3],
            [-0.3, 0.25, 0.3],
            [0.3, 0.25, 0.3],
          ];

          chairLegPositions.forEach((pos) => {
            const chairLeg = new THREE.Mesh(chairLegGeometry, legMaterial);
            chairLeg.position.set(pos[0], pos[1], pos[2]);
            chairLeg.castShadow = true;
            chairGroup.add(chairLeg);
          });

          chairGroup.position.set(0, 0, side * 1.5);
          chairGroup.rotation.y = side > 0 ? Math.PI : 0;
          tableGroup.add(chairGroup);
        }

        tableGroup.position.set(tableConfig.x, 0, tableConfig.z);
        scene.add(tableGroup);

        // Create trash mesh (hidden by default)
        const trashGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Food wrapper
        const wrapperGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.4, 0.1, 0.3);
        const wrapperMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffe4b5,
          roughness: 0.8,
        });
        const wrapper = new THREE.Mesh(wrapperGeometry, wrapperMaterial);
        wrapper.position.set(-0.3, 1.1, 0);
        wrapper.rotation.y = Math.random() * 0.5;
        trashGroup.add(wrapper);

        // Crumpled napkin
        const napkinGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.15, 8, 8);
        const napkinMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffffff,
          roughness: 0.9,
        });
        const napkin = new THREE.Mesh(napkinGeometry, napkinMaterial);
        napkin.position.set(0.2, 1.1, 0.2);
        napkin.scale.set(1, 0.6, 1);
        trashGroup.add(napkin);

        // Empty cup
        const cupGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.12, 0.1, 0.3, 12);
        const cupMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xe74c3c,
          roughness: 0.4,
        });
        const cup = new THREE.Mesh(cupGeometry, cupMaterial);
        cup.position.set(0.4, 1.15, -0.2);
        cup.rotation.x = Math.PI / 8;
        trashGroup.add(cup);

        trashGroup.position.set(tableConfig.x, 0, tableConfig.z);
        trashGroup.visible = tableConfig.hasTrash || false;
        scene.add(trashGroup);

        diningTableMeshes.push({
          mesh: tableGroup,
          trashMesh: trashGroup,
          tableData: tableConfig,
          index: index,
        });

        return tableGroup;
      }

      function createDiningTableTile(index) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[index];
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        // Set exponential cost based on number of active dining tables
        const numTables = window.gameConfig.diningTables
          ? window.gameConfig.diningTables.length
          : 0;
        config.tableCost = Math.floor(100 * Math.pow(1.5, numTables));
        config.cost = config.tableCost;

        const { tileMesh, glowMesh } = createBaseTile(config);

        const tileEntry = {
          mesh: tileMesh,
          glow: glowMesh,
          config: config,
          index: index,
        };
        diningTableTileMeshes.push(tileEntry);

        updateDiningTableTileProgress(index);
        updateDiningTableTileCostDisplay(index);

        return tileEntry;
      }

      function updateDiningTableTileProgress(index) {
        const tileEntry = diningTableTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index);
        if (!tileEntry) return;
        const config = tileEntry.config;
        const diningTableTileMesh = tileEntry.mesh;

        updateTileProgress(diningTableTileMesh, config, 'moneyDeposited', 'tableCost');
        return;
      }

      function updateDiningTableTileCostDisplay(index) {
        const tileEntry = diningTableTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index);
        if (!tileEntry) return;
        const config = tileEntry.config;
        const diningTableTileMesh = tileEntry.mesh;

        updateUnlockTileCostDisplay(diningTableTileMesh, config);
        return;
      }

      function spawnNewDiningTable(index) {
        const tileEntry = diningTableTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index);
        if (!tileEntry) return;
        const tileConfig = tileEntry.config;

        // Spawn table at the tile's position
        const x = tileConfig.x;
        const z = tileConfig.z;

        const newTable = {
          id: `table_${nextTableId++}`,
          x: x,
          z: z,
          occupied: false,
          hasTrash: false,
        };

        window.gameConfig.diningTables.push(newTable);
        const tableIndex = window.gameConfig.diningTables.length - 1;
        createDiningTable(newTable, tableIndex);

        // Register the new table as editable in edit mode
        if (gameMode === 'edit') {
          const tableEntry = diningTableMeshes[diningTableMeshes.length - 1];
          const newEditable = {
            mesh: tableEntry.mesh,
            type: 'diningTable',
            configKey: `diningTables.${tableIndex}`,
            tableIndex: tableIndex,
            name: `Dining Table ${tableIndex + 1}`,
            getData: () => ({
              x: tableEntry.tableData.x,
              z: tableEntry.tableData.z,
            }),
            setPosition: (newX, newZ) => {
              tableEntry.mesh.position.x = newX;
              tableEntry.mesh.position.z = newZ;
              tableEntry.tableData.x = newX;
              tableEntry.tableData.z = newZ;
              if (tableEntry.trashMesh) {
                tableEntry.trashMesh.position.x = newX;
                tableEntry.trashMesh.position.z = newZ;
              }
              window.gameConfig.diningTables[tableIndex].x = newX;
              window.gameConfig.diningTables[tableIndex].z = newZ;
            },
          };
          editableObjects.push(newEditable);
        }

        // Create smoke explosion effect at tile location
        createSmokeParticlesAt(x, 0.5, z);
        playSound('upgrade_sound');

        // Destroy the tile visuals
        destroyDiningTableTileVisuals(index);
      }

      function destroyDiningTableTileVisuals(index) {
        const entryIndex = diningTableTileMeshes.findIndex((t) => t.index === index);
        if (entryIndex === -1) return;
        const tileEntry = diningTableTileMeshes[entryIndex];
        const diningTableTileMesh = tileEntry.mesh;
        const diningTableTileGlow = tileEntry.glow;

        destroyTileVisuals(diningTableTileMesh, diningTableTileGlow);

        // Mark as deleted in config
        window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[index].deleted = true;

        // Remove from editable objects
        const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex(
          (obj) => obj.type === 'diningTableTile' && obj.tileIndex === index
        );
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }

        diningTableTileMeshes.splice(entryIndex, 1);
      }

      function getDepositAmount(totalCost, moneyValue, totalDeposited) {
        const tenPercent = Math.max(moneyValue, Math.ceil(totalCost * 0.1));
        return vaultBalance >= tenPercent
          ? tenPercent
          : Math.min(moneyValue, vaultBalance, totalCost - totalDeposited);
      }

      function updateDiningTableTile(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        if (!window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles) return;

        let isPlayerInAnyTile = false;

        for (let i = 0; i < window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles.length; i++) {
          const config = window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[i];
          if (!config || config.deleted) continue;

          const tileEntry = diningTableTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === i);
          if (!tileEntry) continue;
          const diningTableTileMesh = tileEntry.mesh;
          const diningTableTileGlow = tileEntry.glow;

          // Check if player is in dining table tile zone
          const inThisTile = isPlayerInZone(config);

          const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
          const totalDeposited = config.moneyDeposited + (config.moneyInFlight || 0);

          if (inThisTile) {
            isPlayerInAnyTile = true;

            // Deposit money when in zone
            if (vaultBalance > 0 && totalDeposited < config.tableCost) {
              diningTableTileDepositTimer += deltaTime;

              if (diningTableTileDepositTimer >= DINING_TABLE_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
                diningTableTileDepositTimer = 0;

                const depositAmount = getDepositAmount(
                  config.tableCost,
                  moneyValue,
                  totalDeposited
                );

                if (depositAmount > 0) {
                  modifyVaultBalance(-depositAmount);
                  config.moneyInFlight = (config.moneyInFlight || 0) + depositAmount;

                  // Throw money toward tile
                  const startPos = {
                    x: player.position.x,
                    y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                    z: player.position.z,
                  };

                  const targetPos = {
                    x: config.x,
                    y: 0.5,
                    z: config.z,
                  };

                  createFlyingItem(
                    startPos,
                    targetPos,
                    'money',
                    () => {
                      config.moneyInFlight = Math.max(
                        0,
                        (config.moneyInFlight || 0) - depositAmount
                      );
                      config.moneyDeposited += depositAmount;

                      playSound('collect_sound');
                      updateDiningTableTileProgress(i);
                      updateDiningTableTileCostDisplay(i);

                      // Check if enough to spawn new table
                      if (config.moneyDeposited >= config.tableCost) {
                        spawnNewDiningTable(i);
                      }
                    },
                    true
                  );
                }
              }
            }
          }

          // Animate glow
          if (diningTableTileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004 + i) * 0.05;
            diningTableTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
        }

        if (!isPlayerInAnyTile) {
          diningTableTileDepositTimer = 0;
        }
      }

      function findAvailableDiningTable() {
        for (let i = 0; i < diningTableMeshes.length; i++) {
          const table = diningTableMeshes[i];
          if (!table.tableData.occupied && !table.tableData.hasTrash) {
            return table;
          }
        }
        return null;
      }

      function cleanTrashFromTable(tableData) {
        tableData.hasTrash = false;

        if (!window.gameConfig.tutorialHasCleanedTable) {
          window.gameConfig.tutorialHasCleanedTable = true;
        }

        // Update config
        const configTable = window.gameConfig.diningTables.find((t) => t.id === tableData.id);
        if (configTable) {
          configTable.hasTrash = false;
        }

        // Hide trash mesh
        const tableEntry = diningTableMeshes.find((t) => t.tableData.id === tableData.id);
        if (tableEntry && tableEntry.trashMesh) {
          tableEntry.trashMesh.visible = false;
        }
      }

      function updateTrashCollection(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        // Check if player is near any table with trash
        for (const tableEntry of diningTableMeshes) {
          if (tableEntry.tableData.hasTrash) {
            const dx = player.position.x - tableEntry.tableData.x;
            const dz = player.position.z - tableEntry.tableData.z;
            const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);

            if (dist < 2.5) {
              // Auto-clean trash when player is near
              cleanTrashFromTable(tableEntry.tableData);
              playSound('pickup_sound');
            }
          }
        }
      }

      function createCustomerMesh(isVIP = false) {
        let customerGroup;

        // Determine customer color
        let customerColor;
        if (isVIP) {
          // VIP customers have gold/purple luxury colors
          const vipColors = [0xffd700, 0x9b59b6, 0xe91e63, 0x8e44ad];
          customerColor = vipColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * vipColors.length)];
        } else {
          const customerColors = [0x3498db, 0xe74c3c, 0x9b59b6, 0x1abc9c, 0xf39c12, 0x2ecc71];
          customerColor = customerColors[Math.floor(Math.random() * customerColors.length)];
        }

        // Use stickman model if loaded
        if (stickmanModelLoaded && stickmanModelTemplate) {
          customerGroup = createStickmanInstance(customerColor);

          // Remove any McDonald's hat that was added by createStickmanInstance
          const mcHat = customerGroup.userData.mcHat;
          if (mcHat) {
            const head = customerGroup.getObjectByName('head_leaf');
            head.remove(mcHat);
            customerGroup.userData.mcHat = null;
          }

          // Add appropriate headwear
          if (isVIP) {
            // VIP gets a crown!
            const crown = createCrownHat();
            const head = customerGroup.getObjectByName('head_leaf');
            crown.position.y = (0.6 + 0.3) / 2;
            crown.scale.setScalar(0.5);
            head.add(crown);
            // customerGroup.add(crown);
            customerGroup.userData.crown = crown;
          }
          // Regular customers get no hat (just natural stickman)
        } else {
          // Fallback to original customer mesh if model not loaded
          customerGroup = new THREE.Group();

          // Body
          const bodyGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.4, 0.5, 1.2, 16);
          const bodyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: customerColor,
            roughness: isVIP ? 0.3 : 0.5,
            metalness: isVIP ? 0.3 : 0,
          });
          const body = new THREE.Mesh(bodyGeometry, bodyMaterial);
          body.position.y = 0.6;
          body.castShadow = true;
          customerGroup.add(body);

          // Head
          const headGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.35, 16, 16);
          const headMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0xffdbac,
            roughness: 0.6,
          });
          const head = new THREE.Mesh(headGeometry, headMaterial);
          head.position.y = 1.5;
          head.castShadow = true;
          customerGroup.add(head);

          // Eyes
          const eyeGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.06, 8, 8);
          const eyeMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: 0x333333,
          });

          const leftEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial);
          leftEye.position.set(-0.12, 1.55, 0.28);
          customerGroup.add(leftEye);

          const rightEye = new THREE.Mesh(eyeGeometry, eyeMaterial);
          rightEye.position.set(0.12, 1.55, 0.28);
          customerGroup.add(rightEye);

          // Hair/accessory based on VIP status
          if (isVIP) {
            // VIP Crown!
            const crown = createCrownHat();
            crown.position.y = 1.85;
            crown.scale.setScalar(0.9);
            customerGroup.add(crown);
            customerGroup.userData.crown = crown;
          } else {
            // Regular customer hair styles
            const hairStyle = Math.floor(Math.random() * 3);
            const hairMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
              color: [0x4a3728, 0x8b4513, 0x2c2c2c, 0xdaa520][Math.floor(Math.random() * 4)],
              roughness: 0.8,
            });

            if (hairStyle === 0) {
              // Short hair
              const hairGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(
                0.38,
                16,
                8,
                0,
                Math.PI * 2,
                0,
                Math.PI / 2
              );
              const hair = new THREE.Mesh(hairGeometry, hairMaterial);
              hair.position.y = 1.6;
              customerGroup.add(hair);
            } else if (hairStyle === 1) {
              // Cap
              const capGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.38, 0.4, 0.15, 16);
              const cap = new THREE.Mesh(capGeometry, hairMaterial);
              cap.position.y = 1.8;
              customerGroup.add(cap);

              const brimGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.4, 0.05, 0.4);
              const brim = new THREE.Mesh(brimGeometry, hairMaterial);
              brim.position.set(0, 1.75, 0.2);
              customerGroup.add(brim);
            } else {
              // Top hat
              const hatGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.25, 0.25, 0.4, 16);
              const hat = new THREE.Mesh(hatGeometry, hairMaterial);
              hat.position.y = 1.9;
              customerGroup.add(hat);

              const brimGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.4, 0.4, 0.05, 16);
              const brim = new THREE.Mesh(brimGeometry, hairMaterial);
              brim.position.y = 1.7;
              customerGroup.add(brim);
            }
          }
        }

        // Create emoji display above head (VIP gets star emoji by default)
        const emojiMesh = createCustomerEmoji(isVIP ? '⭐' : '😐');
        emojiMesh.position.set(0, isVIP ? 2.7 : 2.5, 0);
        customerGroup.add(emojiMesh);
        customerGroup.userData.emojiMesh = emojiMesh;

        // Create burger holder (hidden initially)
        const burgerHolder = createCustomerBurger();
        burgerHolder.position.set(0.5, 1.0, 0.3);
        burgerHolder.visible = false;

        const hand = customerGroup.getObjectByName('hand_l');
        hand.add(burgerHolder);
        burgerHolder.position.set(0, 0, 0);
        burgerHolder.rotation.set(toRadians(90), 0, 0);

        // customerGroup.add(burgerHolder);
        customerGroup.userData.burgerMesh = burgerHolder;

        // Initialize squish state for squishy animation
        customerGroup.userData.squishState = {
          scaleY: 1,
          scaleXZ: 1,
          targetScaleY: 1,
          targetScaleXZ: 1,
        };
        customerGroup.userData.isVIP = isVIP;

        return customerGroup;
      }

      function createCustomerEmoji(emoji) {
        const canvas = document.createElement('canvas');
        canvas.width = 128;
        canvas.height = 128;
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

        // Draw emoji
        ctx.font = '100px Arial';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText(emoji, 64, 64);

        const texture = new THREE.CanvasTexture(canvas);
        texture.minFilter = THREE.LinearFilter;

        const geometry = new THREE.PlaneGeometry(1, 1);
        const material = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          map: texture,
          transparent: true,
          side: THREE.DoubleSide,
          depthWrite: false,
        });

        const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geometry, material);
        mesh.userData.canvas = canvas;
        mesh.userData.ctx = ctx;
        mesh.userData.texture = texture;
        mesh.userData.currentEmoji = emoji;
        mesh.userData.lastEmojiChange = Date.now();
        mesh.visible = true;

        return mesh;
      }

      function updateCustomerEmoji(customer, emoji) {
        const emojiMesh = customer.mesh.userData.emojiMesh;
        if (!emojiMesh || emojiMesh.userData.currentEmoji === emoji) return;

        const ctx = emojiMesh.userData.ctx;
        const canvas = emojiMesh.userData.canvas;
        const texture = emojiMesh.userData.texture;

        // Clear emoji redraw to be safe
        if (ctx && canvas) {
          ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
        }
        ctx.font = '100px Arial';
        ctx.textAlign = 'center';
        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';
        ctx.fillText(emoji, 64, 64);

        texture.needsUpdate = true;
        emojiMesh.userData.currentEmoji = emoji;
        emojiMesh.userData.lastEmojiChange = Date.now();
        emojiMesh.visible = true;
      }

      function updateCustomerEmojiVisibility(customer, nowMs) {
        const emojiMesh = customer.mesh.userData.emojiMesh;
        if (!emojiMesh) return;
        const lastChange = emojiMesh.userData.lastEmojiChange || nowMs;
        emojiMesh.visible = nowMs - lastChange <= 2000;
      }

      function createCustomerBurger() {
        const burgerGroup = new THREE.Group();

        // Bottom bun
        const bottomBunGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.25, 0.28, 0.08, 12);
        const bunMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xdeb887,
          roughness: 0.7,
        });
        const bottomBun = new THREE.Mesh(bottomBunGeometry, bunMaterial);
        bottomBun.position.y = 0.04;
        burgerGroup.add(bottomBun);

        // Patty
        const pattyGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.22, 0.22, 0.06, 12);
        const pattyMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x8b4513,
          roughness: 0.8,
        });
        const patty = new THREE.Mesh(pattyGeometry, pattyMaterial);
        patty.position.y = 0.11;
        burgerGroup.add(patty);

        // Cheese
        const cheeseGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.35, 0.02, 0.35);
        const cheeseMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xffa500,
          roughness: 0.5,
        });
        const cheese = new THREE.Mesh(cheeseGeometry, cheeseMaterial);
        cheese.position.y = 0.15;
        cheese.rotation.y = Math.PI / 4;
        burgerGroup.add(cheese);

        // Top bun
        const topBunGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(
          0.25,
          12,
          8,
          0,
          Math.PI * 2,
          0,
          Math.PI / 2
        );
        const topBun = new THREE.Mesh(topBunGeometry, bunMaterial);
        topBun.position.y = 0.18;
        burgerGroup.add(topBun);

        burgerGroup.scale.setScalar(0.8);
        return burgerGroup;
      }

      function getCustomerQueueTarget(config, queuePosition) {
        let tx = config.x;
        let tz = config.z + config.depth / 2 + 2 + queuePosition * CUSTOMER_SPACING;
        const maxZ = (RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2) - 3; // Keep away from front wall
        if (tz > maxZ) {
          const diff = tz - maxZ;
          tz = maxZ;
          const dir = config.x < 0 ? 1 : -1;
          tx += diff * dir; // Curve the line along the wall
        }
        return { x: tx, z: tz };
      }

      function spawnCustomer() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        if (!config || config.deleted) return;

        // Determine if this is a VIP customer
        const vipConfig = window.gameConfig.vipCustomers || {
          spawnChance: 0.15,
        };
        const isVIP = Math.random() < vipConfig.spawnChance;

        const mesh = createCustomerMesh(isVIP);

        // Spawn position: Outside the restaurant, slightly further back
        const startX = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 8;
        const startZ = 10; // Centered with the door

        mesh.position.set(startX, 0, startZ);
        scene.add(mesh);

        // First target: Just inside the door to ensure they pass through it correctly
        const doorEntryX = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 + 3;
        const doorEntryZ = 10;

        // Final queue target
        const queuePosition = customerQueue.filter(
          (c) => c.state === 'waiting' || c.state === 'walking' || c.state === 'entering'
        ).length;
        const target = getCustomerQueueTarget(config, queuePosition);

        // Assign a random desired item
        const desiredItem = getRandomMenuItem();

        const customer = {
          mesh: mesh,
          state: 'entering', // New state for passing through door
          targetX: doorEntryX,
          targetZ: doorEntryZ,
          finalTargetX: target.x,
          finalTargetZ: target.z,
          queuePosition: queuePosition,
          waitTime: 0,
          satisfied: false,
          isVIP: isVIP,
          desiredItem: desiredItem
        };

        updateCustomerEmoji(customer, desiredItem.emoji);

        customerQueue.push(customer);
      }

      function removeCustomer(customer) {
        customer.state = 'walkingToDoor';
        customer.targetX = -RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 + 2;
        customer.targetZ = 10;
      }

      function addBurgerToCashier(menuItem = null) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        if (cashierBurgerStack.length >= config.maxBurgers) return false;

        const food = createStackItem(menuItem);

        // Stack burgers in a grid pattern on the tray
        const stackIndex = cashierBurgerStack.length;
        const col = stackIndex % 4;
        const row = Math.floor((stackIndex % 12) / 4);
        const layer = Math.floor(stackIndex / 12);

        const trayX = config.x - config.width / 2 + 1.5;
        const trayZ = config.z;

        food.position.set(trayX - 0.7 + col * 0.5, 1.4 + layer * 0.25, trayZ - 0.5 + row * 0.5);

        // Slight random rotation
        food.rotation.y = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;

        scene.add(food);
        cashierBurgerStack.push(food);

        return true;
      }

      function removeBurgerFromCashier() {
        if (cashierBurgerStack.length === 0) return null;

        const food = cashierBurgerStack.pop();
        const menuItem = food.userData.menuItem;
        scene.remove(food);

        // Dispose
        food.traverse((child) => {
          if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
          if (child.material) {
            if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
            else child.material.dispose();
          }
        });

        return menuItem;
        // Return the menu item for value calculation
      }

      function initMoneyGrid() {
        // Initialize grid tracking for neat money stacking
        moneyGridStacks = [];
        for (let i = 0; i < MONEY_GRID_COLS * MONEY_GRID_ROWS; i++) {
          moneyGridStacks.push({
            count: 0,
            bills: [],
          });
        }
      }

      function getGridPosition(gridIndex) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.moneyZone;
        const col = gridIndex % MONEY_GRID_COLS;
        const row = Math.floor(gridIndex / MONEY_GRID_COLS);

        // Tighter grid spacing for neat rectangular alignment
        const cellWidth = (config.width - 0.6) / MONEY_GRID_COLS;
        const cellDepth = (config.depth - 0.4) / MONEY_GRID_ROWS;

        const x = config.x - (config.width - 0.6) / 2 + cellWidth / 2 + col * cellWidth;
        const z = config.z - (config.depth - 0.4) / 2 + cellDepth / 2 + row * cellDepth;

        return {
          x,
          z,
        };
      }

      function findBestGridSlot() {
        // Find grid slot with lowest stack count for even distribution
        let minCount = Infinity;
        let bestIndex = 0;

        for (let i = 0; i < moneyGridStacks.length; i++) {
          if (moneyGridStacks[i].count < minCount) {
            minCount = moneyGridStacks[i].count;
            bestIndex = i;
          }
        }

        return bestIndex;
      }

      function createMoneyItem(position) {
        // Create a rectangular money bundle that fills grid neatly
        const moneyGroup = new THREE.Group();

        const asset = lib.getAsset('paper_money');
        if (asset && asset.url) {
          const geom = getCachedGeometry(
            'paperMoneyBoxGeom',
            () => new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.0, 0.15, 0.6)
          );
          const topMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'paperMoneyTopMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                map: new THREE.TextureLoader().load(asset.url),
                transparent: true,
                alphaTest: 0.1,
              })
          );
          const sideMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'paperMoneySideMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                color: 0x85bb65,
              })
          );
          const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geom, [sideMat, sideMat, topMat, sideMat, sideMat, sideMat]);
          mesh.position.y = 0.075;
          mesh.castShadow = true;
          moneyGroup.add(mesh);
        } else {
          // Base plate (rectangular to match money)
          const plateGeom = getCachedGeometry(
            'moneyPlateGeom',

          const plateMat = getCachedMaterial(

          const plate = new THREE.Mesh(plateGeom, plateMat);
          plate.position.y = 0.03;

          // Stack of dollar bills on plate - rectangular to fill grid
          const stackGeom = getCachedGeometry(
            'moneyStackGeom',
            () => new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.0, 0.12, 0.6)
          );
          const stackMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'moneyStackMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                color: 0x85bb65,
                roughness: 0.6,
                metalness: 0.1,
              })
          );
          const stack = new THREE.Mesh(stackGeom, stackMat);
          stack.position.y = 0.12;
          stack.castShadow = true;
          moneyGroup.add(stack);

          // White band around money stack
          const bandGeom = getCachedGeometry(
            'moneyBandGeom',
            () => new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.02, 0.07, 0.15)
          );
          const bandMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'moneyBandMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                color: 0xffffff,
                roughness: 0.4,
              })
          );
          const band = new THREE.Mesh(bandGeom, bandMat);
          band.position.y = 0.12;
          moneyGroup.add(band);

          // Dollar sign on top
          const signGeom = getCachedGeometry(
            'moneySignGeom',
            () => new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.12, 0.02, 0.2)
          );
          const signMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'moneySignMat',
            () =>
              new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
                color: 0x2d5016,
                roughness: 0.4,
              })
          );
          const sign = new THREE.Mesh(signGeom, signMat);
          sign.position.y = 0.19;
          moneyGroup.add(sign);
        }

        moneyGroup.position.copy(position);
        moneyGroup.position.y = 0.1;
        moneyGroup.rotation.y = 0;
        // No rotation - aligned to grid

        // Physics properties
        moneyGroup.userData.velocity = {
          x: 0,
          z: 0,
        };
        moneyGroup.userData.collected = false;
        moneyGroup.userData.gridIndex = -1;

        scene.add(moneyGroup);
        groundMoneyItems.push(moneyGroup);

        return moneyGroup;
      }

              })
          );
          const stack = new THREE.Mesh(stackGeom, stackMat);

          const bandMat = getCachedMaterial(

                color: 0xffffff,

              })

          const band = new THREE.Mesh(bandGeom, bandMat);

          // Top layer (slightly different shade)

      function addToMoneyStack() {
        if (currentMoneyCount >= MAX_MONEY_CAPACITY) return false;

        // Position money on top of burger stack (same stacking style)
        const burgerStackHeight = playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT;
        const stackY = PLAYER_HEIGHT + burgerStackHeight + moneyStack.length * MONEY_STACK_HEIGHT;
        const money = createMoneyStackItem();
        money.position.set(0, stackY, 0);
        // Same position as burgers
        player.add(money);
        moneyStack.push(money);
        currentMoneyCount = moneyStack.length;
        updateMoneyStackUI();
        playSound('pickup_sound');
        return true;
      }

      function removeFromMoneyStack() {
        if (moneyStack.length > 0) {
          const item = moneyStack.pop();
          player.remove(item);

          item.traverse((child) => {
            if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
            if (child.material) {
              if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
              else child.material.dispose();
            }
          });

          currentMoneyCount = moneyStack.length;
          updateMoneyStackUI();
          return true;
        }
        return false;
      }

      // New helper function to calculate position without modifying the array
      function getCashPilePositionAtIndex(index) {
        const cashPileX = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileX;
        const cashPileZ = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileZ;
        const cashPileWidth = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileWidth;
        const cashPileDepth = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileDepth;

        // Calculate position in tight grid pattern
        const cols = 4;
        const rows = 4;
        const itemsPerLayer = cols * rows;
        const col = index % cols;
        const row = Math.floor((index % itemsPerLayer) / cols);
        const layer = Math.floor(index / itemsPerLayer);

        // Tight grid spacing to fill the tile
        const cellWidth = (cashPileWidth - 0.4) / cols;
        const cellDepth = (cashPileDepth - 0.2) / rows;

        const x = cashPileX - (cashPileWidth - 0.4) / 2 + cellWidth / 2 + col * cellWidth;
        const z = cashPileZ - (cashPileDepth - 0.2) / 2 + cellDepth / 2 + row * cellDepth;
        const y = 0.25 + layer * 0.12;

        return { x, y, z };
      }

          const mesh = new THREE.Mesh(geom, [sideMat, sideMat, topMat, sideMat, sideMat, sideMat]);
          mesh.position.y = 0.075;

        } else {
          // Stack of dollar bills - rectangular shape to fit grid

          const stackMat = getCachedMaterial(
            'moneyStackMat',

                color: 0x85bb65,

              })
          );
          const stack = new THREE.Mesh(stackGeom, stackMat);
          stack.position.y = 0.05;

          // White band around money
          const bandGeom = getCachedGeometry(

          const bandMat = getCachedMaterial(

      function addToCashierCashPile() {
        const cashPileX = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileX;
        const cashPileZ = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileZ;
        const cashPileWidth = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileWidth;
        const cashPileDepth = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileDepth;

        // Calculate position in tight grid pattern - money fills tile neatly
        const stackIndex = cashierCashPile.length;
        const cols = 4;
        const rows = 4;
        const itemsPerLayer = cols * rows;
        const col = stackIndex % cols;
        const row = Math.floor((stackIndex % itemsPerLayer) / cols);
        const layer = Math.floor(stackIndex / itemsPerLayer);

        // Tight grid spacing to fill the tile
        const cellWidth = (cashPileWidth - 0.4) / cols;
        const cellDepth = (cashPileDepth - 0.2) / rows;

        const x = cashPileX - (cashPileWidth - 0.4) / 2 + cellWidth / 2 + col * cellWidth;
        const z = cashPileZ - (cashPileDepth - 0.2) / 2 + cellDepth / 2 + row * cellDepth;
        const y = 0.25 + layer * 0.12;

        return {
          x,
          y,
          z,
        };
      }

      function removeFromCashierCashPile() {
        if (cashierCashPile.length === 0) return null;

        const money = cashierCashPile.pop();
        scene.remove(money);

        money.traverse((child) => {
          if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
          if (child.material) {
            if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
            else child.material.dispose();
          }
        });

        cashierEarnings = cashierCashPile.length;
        updateCashierUI();

        return true;
      }

      function createResourceNode(index, total) {
        // Get position from config
        const grillConfig = window.gameConfig.grills[index];
        if (!grillConfig) return;

        const x = grillConfig.x;
        const z = grillConfig.z;
        const equipmentType = grillConfig.equipmentType || 'grill';

        const node = {
          group: new THREE.Group(),
          position: {
            x,
            z,
          },
          isReady: true,
          regenTimer: 0,
          grillMesh: null,
          emptyMesh: null,
          equipmentType: equipmentType,
        };

        node.group.position.set(x, 0, z);

        // Create equipment based on type
        node.grillMesh = new THREE.Group();
        node.emptyMesh = new THREE.Group();

        if (equipmentType === 'grill') {
          createGrillEquipment(node);
        } else if (equipmentType === 'fryer') {
          createFryerEquipment(node);
        } else if (equipmentType === 'drink_station') {
          createDrinkStationEquipment(node);
        } else {
          // Default to grill
          createGrillEquipment(node);
        }

        node.emptyMesh.visible = false;
        node.group.add(node.grillMesh);
        node.group.add(node.emptyMesh);

        // Make equipment face forward (toward customers)
        // allow saved rotation on grills (degrees) or default to facing forward
        const grillCfg =
          (window.gameConfig && window.gameConfig.grills && window.gameConfig.grills[index]) ||
          null;
        const grillRot =
          (grillCfg && (grillCfg.rotation || grillCfg.rotationDeg || grillCfg.rotationY)) || 180;
        node.group.rotation.y = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(grillRot);

        scene.add(node.group);
        resourceNodes.push(node);
      }

      function createGrillEquipment(node) {
        // Grill base/table
        const tableGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2, 1, 1.5);
        const tableMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x606060,
          roughness: 0.4,
          metalness: 0.6,
        });
        const table = new THREE.Mesh(tableGeometry, tableMaterial);
        table.position.y = 0.5;
        table.castShadow = true;
        table.receiveShadow = true;
        node.grillMesh.add(table);

        // Grill top surface (flat top grill)
        const grillTopGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.8, 0.1, 1.3);
        const grillTopMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x333333,
          roughness: 0.7,
          metalness: 0.3,
        });
        const grillTop = new THREE.Mesh(grillTopGeometry, grillTopMaterial);
        grillTop.position.y = 1.05;
        grillTop.castShadow = true;
        node.grillMesh.add(grillTop);

        // Burger patties on grill
        const burgerColors = [0xcd853f, 0xd2691e, 0xb8860b];
        for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
          const burgerGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.25, 0.25, 0.15, 12);
          const burgerMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: burgerColors[i % burgerColors.length],
            roughness: 0.8,
          });
          const burger = new THREE.Mesh(burgerGeometry, burgerMaterial);
          burger.position.set((i % 2) * 0.6 - 0.3, 1.15, Math.floor(i / 2) * 0.5 - 0.25);
          burger.castShadow = true;
          node.grillMesh.add(burger);
        }

        // Steam particles
        for (let i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
          const steamGeometry = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.05, 0.1, 0.4, 8);
          const steamMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: 0xffffff,
            transparent: true,
            opacity: 0.4,
          });
          const steam = new THREE.Mesh(steamGeometry, steamMaterial);
          steam.position.set((i - 1) * 0.4, 1.5 + Math.random() * 0.3, 0);
          steam.userData.steamOffset = i * 0.5;
          node.grillMesh.add(steam);
        }

        // Empty state
        const emptyTable = new THREE.Mesh(tableGeometry, tableMaterial);
        emptyTable.position.y = 0.5;
        emptyTable.castShadow = true;
        node.emptyMesh.add(emptyTable);

        const emptyGrillTop = new THREE.Mesh(grillTopGeometry, grillTopMaterial);
        emptyGrillTop.position.y = 1.05;
        emptyGrillTop.castShadow = true;
        node.emptyMesh.add(emptyGrillTop);
      }

      function createFryerEquipment(node) {
        // Fryer base (stainless steel look)
        const baseGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2, 1.2, 1.5);
        const baseMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xc0c0c0,
          roughness: 0.3,
          metalness: 0.7,
        });
        const base = new THREE.Mesh(baseGeometry, baseMaterial);
        base.position.y = 0.6;
        base.castShadow = true;
        base.receiveShadow = true;
        node.grillMesh.add(base);

        // Oil vat (darker inside)
        const vatGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(1.6, 0.4, 1.2);
        const vatMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xdaa520,
          // Golden oil color
          roughness: 0.2,
          metalness: 0.1,
        });
        const vat = new THREE.Mesh(vatGeometry, vatMaterial);
        vat.position.y = 1.04;
        node.grillMesh.add(vat);

        // Fry baskets with fries
        for (let b = 0; b < 2; b++) {
          const basketGroup = new THREE.Group();

          // Basket wire frame (simplified as box outline)
          const basketGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.5, 0.6, 0.45);
          const basketMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
            color: 0x808080,
            roughness: 0.4,
            metalness: 0.6,
            wireframe: true,
          });
          const basket = new THREE.Mesh(basketGeometry, basketMaterial);
          basket.position.y = 0.3;
          basketGroup.add(basket);

          // Fries in basket
          for (let i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
            const fryGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(0.05, 0.3 + Math.random() * 0.1, 0.05);
            const fryMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
              color: 0xffd700,
              roughness: 0.6,
            });
            const fry = new THREE.Mesh(fryGeometry, fryMaterial);
            fry.position.set(
              (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.35,
              0.4 + Math.random() * 0.1,
              (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3
            );
            fry.rotation.x = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;
            fry.rotation.z = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.3;
            basketGroup.add(fry);
          }

          basketGroup.position.set(b === 0 ? -0.4 : 0.4, 1.0, 0);
          node.grillMesh.add(basketGroup);
        }

        // Bubbling effect (small spheres)
        for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          const bubbleGeometry = new THREE.SphereGeometry(0.05, 8, 8);
          const bubbleMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
            color: 0xffffcc,
            transparent: true,
            opacity: 0.6,
          });
          const bubble = new THREE.Mesh(bubbleGeometry, bubbleMaterial);
          bubble.position.set(
            (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1.4,
            1.15 + Math.random() * 0.1,
            (Math.random() - 0.5) * 1
          );
          bubble.userData.steamOffset = i * 0.3;
          node.grillMesh.add(bubble);
        }

        // Empty state
        const emptyBase = new THREE.Mesh(baseGeometry, baseMaterial);
        emptyBase.position.y = 0.6;
        emptyBase.castShadow = true;
        node.emptyMesh.add(emptyBase);

        const emptyVatMaterial = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xb8860b,
          // Darker oil when empty
          roughness: 0.3,
          metalness: 0.1,
        });
        const emptyVat = new THREE.Mesh(vatGeometry, emptyVatMaterial);
        emptyVat.position.y = 1.04;
        node.emptyMesh.add(emptyVat);
      }

      function createDrinkStationEquipment(node) {
        // Drink dispenser base
        const baseGeometry = new THREE.BoxGeometry(2.2, 0.8, 1);

            color: 0xffffff,
            roughness: 0.4,
          });
          const straw = new THREE.Mesh(strawGeometry, strawMaterial);
          straw.position.set(-0.5 + i * 0.5, 1.25, 0.3);

        // Ice cubes indicator

      // Get a random menu item from config
      function getRandomMenuItem() {
        const menuItems = window.gameConfig.menuItems;
        if (!menuItems || menuItems.length === 0) {
          // Fallback to burger
          return {
            id: 'burger',
            name: 'Burger',
            emoji: '🍔',
            value: 100,
            bunColor: '#DEB887',
            pattyColor: '#8B4513',
            toppingColor: '#32CD32',
            accentColor: '#FFA500',
            equipmentType: 'grill',
          };
        }
        return menuItems[Math.floor(Math.random() * menuItems.length)];
      }

      // Get menu items for a specific equipment type
      function getMenuItemsForEquipment(equipmentType) {
        const menuItems = window.gameConfig.menuItems;
        if (!menuItems || menuItems.length === 0) return [];
        return menuItems.filter((item) => item.equipmentType === equipmentType);
      }

      // Get a random menu item for a specific equipment type
      function getRandomMenuItemForEquipment(equipmentType) {
        const items = getMenuItemsForEquipment(equipmentType);
        if (items.length === 0) {
          // Fallback based on equipment type
          if (equipmentType === 'grill') {
            return {
              id: 'burger',
              name: 'Burger',
              emoji: '🍔',
              value: 100,
              bunColor: '#DEB887',
              pattyColor: '#8B4513',
              toppingColor: '#32CD32',
              accentColor: '#FFA500',
              equipmentType: 'grill',
            };
          } else if (equipmentType === 'fryer') {
            return {
              id: 'fries',
              name: 'Fries',
              emoji: '🍟',
              value: 60,
              bunColor: '#FFD700',
              pattyColor: '#DAA520',
              toppingColor: '#FF0000',
              accentColor: '#FFFFFF',
              equipmentType: 'fryer',
            };
          } else if (equipmentType === 'drink_station') {
            return {
              id: 'drink',
              name: 'Drink',
              emoji: '🥤',
              value: 40,
              bunColor: '#E74C3C',
              pattyColor: '#8B4513',
              toppingColor: '#FFFFFF',
              accentColor: '#3498DB',
              equipmentType: 'drink_station',
            };
          }
          return getRandomMenuItem();
        }
        return items[Math.floor(Math.random() * items.length)];
      }

          );

          iceCream.scale.y = 0.7;

          // Toppings
          for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {

            topping.position.set(Math.cos(angle) * 0.1, 0.38, Math.sin(angle) * 0.1);
            itemGroup.add(topping);
          }
        } else {
          // Default fallback - burger
          const burger = new THREE.Mesh(
            new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.3, 0.35, 0.25, 10),
