            maxLife: maxLife,
            velocityY: 2 + Math.random() * 2,
            velocityX: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,
            velocityZ: (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2,
          });
        }
      }

      function spawnCashierAtTileAndWalk(startX, startZ) {
        const cashierConfig = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        if (!cashierConfig || cashierConfig.deleted) return;

        // Create staff member using the same model as player (green apron for hired status)
        const staffGroup = createStaffMesh(0x27ae60);

        // Position at tile
        staffGroup.position.set(startX, 0, startZ);

        scene.add(staffGroup);

        // Set up walking animation state
        const targetX = cashierConfig.x - 1.4;
        const targetZ = cashierConfig.z - cashierConfig.depth / 2 - 1.2;

        staffWalkingToCashier = {
          mesh: staffGroup,
          startX: startX,
          startZ: startZ,
          targetX: targetX,
          targetZ: targetZ,
          progress: 0,
          walkSpeed: 3,
        };
      }

      function spawnSecondCashierAtTileAndWalk(startX, startZ) {
        const cashierConfig = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        if (!cashierConfig || cashierConfig.deleted) return;

        const staffGroup = createStaffMesh(0x27ae60);
        staffGroup.position.set(startX, 0, startZ);
        scene.add(staffGroup);

        const targetX = cashierConfig.x + 1.4;
        const targetZ = cashierConfig.z - cashierConfig.depth / 2 - 1.2;

        staffWalkingToCashier2 = {
          mesh: staffGroup,
          startX: startX,
          startZ: startZ,
          targetX: targetX,
          targetZ: targetZ,
          progress: 0,
          walkSpeed: 3,
        };
      }

      function updateStaffWalking(deltaTime) {
        const updateWalk = (staff, assignSlot) => {
          if (!staff) return;

          // Calculate distance to target
          const dx = staff.targetX - staff.mesh.position.x;
          const dz = staff.targetZ - staff.mesh.position.z;
          const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);

          if (dist < 0.3) {
            // Arrived at destination
            staff.mesh.position.set(staff.targetX, 0, staff.targetZ);
            staff.mesh.rotation.y = 0;
            // Face customers
            switchAnimation(staff.mesh, 'idle');

            if (assignSlot === 1) {
              hiredStaffMesh = staff.mesh;
              staffWalkingToCashier = null;
            } else if (assignSlot === 2) {
              hiredStaffMesh2 = staff.mesh;
              staffWalkingToCashier2 = null;
            }

            // Update the staff icon on hire tile if it still exists
            if (staffHireTileMesh && staffHireTileMesh.userData.staffIcon) {
              const icon = staffHireTileMesh.userData.staffIcon;
              if (icon.children[0]) {
                icon.children[0].material.color.setHex(0x27ae60);
              }
            }

            return;
          }

          // Simple obstacle avoidance for walking staff
          let obstacleOffset = { x: 0, z: 0 };
          const avoidRadius = 3;
          [player, hiredCleanerMesh, hiredRunnerMesh].forEach(other => {
              if (!other || other === staff.mesh) return;
              const dX = staff.mesh.position.x - other.position.x;
              const dZ = staff.mesh.position.z - other.position.z;
              const d2 = dX*dX + dZ*dZ;
              if (d2 < avoidRadius*avoidRadius) {
                  const d = Math.sqrt(d2) || 0.001;
                  const force = (avoidRadius - d) / avoidRadius;
                  obstacleOffset.x += (dX/d) * force;
                  obstacleOffset.z += (dZ/d) * force;
              }
          });

          // Move toward target with obstacle influence
          const speed = staff.walkSpeed;
          const moveX = ((dx / dist) + obstacleOffset.x * 0.5) * speed * deltaTime;
          const moveZ = ((dz / dist) + obstacleOffset.z * 0.5) * speed * deltaTime;

          staff.mesh.position.x += moveX;
          staff.mesh.position.z += moveZ;

          // Face movement direction
          staff.mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(moveX, moveZ);
          switchAnimation(staff.mesh, 'walk');

          // Walking bob animation
          staff.mesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.015)) * 0.1;
        };

        updateWalk(staffWalkingToCashier, 1);
        updateWalk(staffWalkingToCashier2, 2);
      }

      function destroyStaffHireTileVisuals() {
        if (!staffHireTileMesh) return;

        // Remove all tile visual elements
        scene.remove(staffHireTileMesh);
        scene.remove(staffHireTileGlow);

        // Mark as deleted in config
        window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.deleted = true;

        // Remove from editable objects
        const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex((obj) => obj.type === 'staffHireTile');
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }

        staffHireTileMesh = null;
        staffHireTileGlow = null;
      }

      function destroyStaffHireTileVisualsKeepConfig() {
        if (!staffHireTileMesh) return;

        scene.remove(staffHireTileMesh);
        scene.remove(staffHireTileGlow);

        const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex((obj) => obj.type === 'staffHireTile');
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }

        staffHireTileMesh = null;
        staffHireTileGlow = null;
      }

      function updateStaffHireTile(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.staffHireTile;
        if (!config || config.deleted || !staffHireTileMesh) return;

        const extraCost = config.extraHireCost || Math.max(150, Math.round(config.hireCost * 1.5));
        const hasBaseStaff = !!config.staffHired;
        const hasExtraStaff = !!config.extraStaffHired;
        const targetCost = hasBaseStaff ? extraCost : config.hireCost;

        // Check if player is in staff hire tile zone
        isInStaffHireTile = isPlayerInZone(config);

        const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
        const totalDeposited = config.moneyDeposited + (config.moneyInFlight || 0);

        // Deposit money when in zone
        if (isInStaffHireTile && vaultBalance > 0 && totalDeposited < targetCost) {
          staffHireDepositTimer += deltaTime;

          if (staffHireDepositTimer >= STAFF_HIRE_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
            staffHireDepositTimer = 0;

            const depositAmount = getDepositAmount(targetCost, moneyValue, totalDeposited);

            if (depositAmount > 0) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-depositAmount);
              config.moneyInFlight = (config.moneyInFlight || 0) + depositAmount;
              if (moneyStack.length > 0) {
                // Remove from stack visually (legacy)
                const item = moneyStack.pop();
                if (item) {
                  player.remove(item);
                  item.traverse((child) => {
                    if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                    if (child.material) {
                      if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
                        child.material.forEach((mat) => mat.dispose());
                      } else {
                        child.material.dispose();
                      }
                    }
                  });
                }
                currentMoneyCount = moneyStack.length;
                updateMoneyStackUI();
              }

              // Throw money toward staff hire tile
              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y:
                  player.position.y +
                  PLAYER_HEIGHT +
                  playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT +
                  moneyStack.length * MONEY_STACK_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };

              const targetPos = {
                x: config.x,
                y: 0.5,
                z: config.z,
              };

              // Create flying money
              createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                targetPos,
                'money',
                () => {
                  config.moneyInFlight = Math.max(0, (config.moneyInFlight || 0) - depositAmount);
                  if (hasExtraStaff && hasBaseStaff) return;

                  // Add to deposit count
                  config.moneyDeposited += depositAmount;
                  window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited = config.moneyDeposited;

                  playSound('collect_sound');
                  updateStaffHireProgress();
                  updateStaffHireCostDisplay();

                  // Check if enough money deposited to hire
                  if (config.moneyDeposited >= targetCost) {
                    if (!hasBaseStaff) {
                      window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired = true;
                      config.staffHired = true;
                      playSound('upgrade_sound');

                      // Show hire notification
                      showHireNotification('cashier');

                      // Create smoke particles at the tile
                      createSmokeParticlesAt(config.x, 0.5, config.z);

                      // Spawn cashier at tile location and start walking
                      spawnCashierAtTileAndWalk(config.x, config.z);

                      config.moneyDeposited = 0;
                      window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
                      updateStaffHireProgress();
                      updateStaffHireCostDisplay();
                    } else if (!hasExtraStaff) {
                      window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired = true;
                      config.extraStaffHired = true;
                      playSound('upgrade_sound');
                      showHireNotification('cashier');
                      createSmokeParticlesAt(config.x, 0.5, config.z);
                      spawnSecondCashierAtTileAndWalk(config.x, config.z);

                      config.moneyDeposited = 0;
                      window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited = 0;
                      updateStaffHireProgress();
                      updateStaffHireCostDisplay();

                      destroyStaffHireTileVisualsKeepConfig();
                    }
                  }
                },
                true
              );
            }
          }
        } else {
          staffHireDepositTimer = 0;
        }

        // Animate staff hire tile glow
        if (staffHireTileGlow) {
          const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          staffHireTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
        }

        // Animate staff icon
        const staffIcon = staffHireTileMesh?.userData?.staffIcon;
        if (staffIcon) {
          staffIcon.position.y = staffIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
        }
      }

      let cashierTileMesh, cashierTileGlow;

            if (depositAmount > 0) {

      function createFountainFromConfig(config) {
        if (!config || config.deleted) return null;

        const x = config.x || -18;
        const z = config.z || -5;
        const radius = config.radius || 2.5;

        const fountainGroup = new THREE.Group();

        const poolGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(radius, radius, 0.4, 32);
        const poolMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xdddddd,
          roughness: 0.8,
        });
        const pool = new THREE.Mesh(poolGeo, poolMat);
        pool.position.y = 0.1;
        pool.castShadow = true;
        pool.receiveShadow = true;
        fountainGroup.add(pool);

        const waterGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(radius - 0.3, radius - 0.3, 0.35, 32);
        const waterMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x3498db,
          roughness: 0.1,
          transparent: true,
          opacity: 0.8,
        });
        const water = new THREE.Mesh(waterGeo, waterMat);
        water.position.y = 0.22;
        fountainGroup.add(water);

        const pillarGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.5, 0.8, 2, 16);
        const pillarMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0xeeeeee,
          roughness: 0.7,
        });
        const pillar = new THREE.Mesh(pillarGeo, pillarMat);
        pillar.position.y = 1;
        pillar.castShadow = true;
        fountainGroup.add(pillar);

        const bowlGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(1.2, 0.5, 0.3, 16);
        const bowl = new THREE.Mesh(bowlGeo, pillarMat);
        bowl.position.y = 2;
        bowl.castShadow = true;
        fountainGroup.add(bowl);

        const spoutGeo = new THREE.CylinderGeometry(0.1, 0.4, 1.2, 16);
        const spoutMat = new THREE.MeshStandardMaterial({
          color: 0x87ceeb,
          transparent: true,
          opacity: 0.6,
        });
        const spout = new THREE.Mesh(spoutGeo, spoutMat);
        spout.position.y = 2.6;
        fountainGroup.add(spout);

        fountainGroup.position.set(x, 0, z);
        scene.add(fountainGroup);

        fountainGroup.userData.water = water;
        fountainGroup.userData.spout = spout;

        return fountainGroup;
      }

      function createFountain() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.fountain;
        fountainMesh = createFountainFromConfig(config);
      }

      function createFountain2() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.fountain2;

      function createSelfOrderKioskTiles() {
        const configs = window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles || [];
        selfOrderKioskTileMeshes = [];
        configs.forEach((config, index) => {
          if (!config || config.deleted || config.unlocked || config.hidden) return;
          const result = createBaseTile(config);
          const tileEntry = {
            mesh: result.tileMesh,
            glow: result.glowMesh,
            config,
            index,
          };
          selfOrderKioskTileMeshes.push(tileEntry);
          createTileCostDisplay(tileEntry.mesh, config);
          updateTileProgress(tileEntry.mesh, config);
          updateUnlockTileCostDisplay(tileEntry.mesh, config);
        });
      }

      function updateSelfOrderKioskTileProgress(index) {
        const tileEntry = selfOrderKioskTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index);
        if (!tileEntry) return;
        updateTileProgress(tileEntry.mesh, tileEntry.config);
      }

      function updateSelfOrderKioskTileCostDisplay(index) {
        const tileEntry = selfOrderKioskTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index);
        if (!tileEntry) return;
        updateUnlockTileCostDisplay(tileEntry.mesh, tileEntry.config);
      }

      function destroySelfOrderKioskTileVisualsByIndex(index) {
        const entryIndex = selfOrderKioskTileMeshes.findIndex((t) => t.index === index);
        if (entryIndex === -1) return;
        const tileEntry = selfOrderKioskTileMeshes[entryIndex];
        destroyTileVisuals(tileEntry.mesh, tileEntry.glow);
        if (window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles && window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles[index]) {
          window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles[index].deleted = true;
        }
        const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex(
          (obj) => obj.type === 'selfOrderKioskTile' && obj.tileIndex === index
        );
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }
        selfOrderKioskTileMeshes.splice(entryIndex, 1);
      }

      function updateSelfOrderKioskTile(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;
        const config = window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile;
        if (!config || config.deleted || config.unlocked || !selfOrderKioskTileMesh) return;
        if (!window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted) return;
        const inZone = isPlayerInZone(config);
        const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
        const totalDeposited = config.moneyDeposited + (config.moneyInFlight || 0);
        if (inZone && vaultBalance > 0 && totalDeposited < config.cost) {
          selfOrderKioskTileDepositTimer += deltaTime;
          if (selfOrderKioskTileDepositTimer >= STAFF_HIRE_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
            selfOrderKioskTileDepositTimer = 0;
            const depositAmount = getDepositAmount(config.cost, moneyValue, totalDeposited);
            if (depositAmount > 0) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-depositAmount);
              config.moneyInFlight = (config.moneyInFlight || 0) + depositAmount;
              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,

              createFlyingItem(

                'money',
                () => {
                  config.moneyInFlight = Math.max(0, (config.moneyInFlight || 0) - depositAmount);
                  if (config.unlocked) return;
                  config.moneyDeposited += depositAmount;
                  playSound('collect_sound');
                  updateTileProgress(selfOrderKioskTileMesh, config);
                  updateUnlockTileCostDisplay(selfOrderKioskTileMesh, config);
                  if (config.moneyDeposited >= config.cost) {
                    config.unlocked = true;
                    window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile.unlocked = true;
                    playSound('upgrade_sound');
                    createSmokeParticlesAt(config.x, 0.5, config.z);
                    destroySelfOrderKioskTileVisuals();

        } else {

        if (selfOrderKioskTileGlow) {

          selfOrderKioskTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);

        if (icon) {
          icon.position.y = icon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
        }
      }

      function updateSelfOrderKioskTiles(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;
        if (!window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted) return;
        const configs = window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles || [];
        let isPlayerInAnyTile = false;

        configs.forEach((config, index) => {
          if (!config || config.deleted || config.unlocked || config.hidden) return;
          const tileEntry = selfOrderKioskTileMeshes.find((t) => t.index === index);
          if (!tileEntry) return;

          const inZone = isPlayerInZone(config);
          const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
          const totalDeposited = config.moneyDeposited + (config.moneyInFlight || 0);

          if (inZone && vaultBalance > 0 && totalDeposited < config.cost) {
            isPlayerInAnyTile = true;
            selfOrderKioskTileDepositTimer += deltaTime;
            if (selfOrderKioskTileDepositTimer >= STAFF_HIRE_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
              selfOrderKioskTileDepositTimer = 0;
              const depositAmount = getDepositAmount(config.cost, moneyValue, totalDeposited);
              if (depositAmount > 0) {
                modifyVaultBalance(-depositAmount);
                config.moneyInFlight = (config.moneyInFlight || 0) + depositAmount;
                const startPos = {
                  x: player.position.x,
                  y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                  z: player.position.z,
                };
                createFlyingItem(
                  startPos,
                  {
                    x: config.x,
                    y: 0.5,
                    z: config.z,
                  },
                  'money',
                  () => {
                    config.moneyInFlight = Math.max(0, (config.moneyInFlight || 0) - depositAmount);
                    if (config.unlocked) return;
                    config.moneyDeposited += depositAmount;
                    playSound('collect_sound');
                    updateSelfOrderKioskTileProgress(index);
                    updateSelfOrderKioskTileCostDisplay(index);
                    if (config.moneyDeposited >= config.cost) {
                      config.unlocked = true;
                      if (window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles && window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles[index]) {
                        window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTiles[index].unlocked = true;
                      }
                      const kioskConfig = window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks?.find((k) => k.id === config.kioskId);
                      if (kioskConfig) {
                        kioskConfig.deleted = false;
                        kioskConfig.x = config.x;
                        kioskConfig.z = config.z;
                      }
                      playSound('upgrade_sound');
                      createSmokeParticlesAt(config.x, 0.5, config.z);
                      destroySelfOrderKioskTileVisualsByIndex(index);
                      createSelfOrderKiosks();
                      if (kioskConfig) {
                        updateSelfOrderKioskPosition(kioskConfig.id, kioskConfig.x, kioskConfig.z);
                      }
                    }
                  },
                  true
                );
              }
            }
          }

          if (tileEntry.glow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004 + index) * 0.05;
            tileEntry.glow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const icon = tileEntry.mesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (icon) {
            icon.position.y = icon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003 + index) * 0.1;
          }
        });

        if (!isPlayerInAnyTile) {
          selfOrderKioskTileDepositTimer = 0;
        }
      }

      function updateFountainAnimation() {
        const now = Date.now();
        neonSigns.forEach((sign, i) => {
          sign.position.y = 3.5 + Math.sin(now * 0.002 + i) * 0.2;
          sign.children[0].rotation.z += 0.02;
          sign.children[1].rotation.y += 0.05;
        });
        if (fountainMesh && fountainMesh.userData.spout) {
          fountainMesh.userData.spout.scale.y = 1 + Math.sin(now * 0.01) * 0.2;
          fountainMesh.userData.spout.scale.x = 1 + Math.cos(now * 0.015) * 0.1;
          fountainMesh.userData.spout.scale.z = 1 + Math.cos(now * 0.015) * 0.1;
          fountainMesh.userData.water.position.y = 0.22 + Math.sin(now * 0.005) * 0.02;
        }
        if (fountainMesh2 && fountainMesh2.userData.spout) {
          fountainMesh2.userData.spout.scale.y = 1 + Math.sin(now * 0.01) * 0.2;
          fountainMesh2.userData.spout.scale.x = 1 + Math.cos(now * 0.015) * 0.1;
          fountainMesh2.userData.spout.scale.z = 1 + Math.cos(now * 0.015) * 0.1;
          fountainMesh2.userData.water.position.y = 0.22 + Math.sin(now * 0.005) * 0.02;
        }
      }

      function updateCleanerAI(deltaTime) {
        if (!hiredCleanerMesh || !cleanerStaffAI) return;

        const ai = cleanerStaffAI;
        const squish = hiredCleanerMesh.userData.squishState || {
          scaleY: 1,
          scaleXZ: 1,
          targetScaleY: 1,
          targetScaleXZ: 1,
        };
        const now = Date.now();

        switch (ai.state) {
          case 'idle':
            // Switch to idle animation
            switchAnimation(hiredCleanerMesh, 'idle');

            // Look for tables with trash
            ai.idleTimer += deltaTime;
            if (ai.idleTimer > 0.5) {
              ai.idleTimer = 0;

              // Find table with trash
              for (const tableEntry of diningTableMeshes) {
                if (tableEntry.tableData.hasTrash) {
                  ai.targetTable = tableEntry;
                  ai.state = 'walkingToTable';
                  // Start moving squish
                  squish.scaleY = 0.85;
                  squish.scaleXZ = 1.15;
                  break;
                }
              }
            }

            // Idle breathing animation
            const breathe = Math.sin(now * 0.003);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.04;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.03;
            hiredCleanerMesh.position.y = Math.sin(now * 0.003) * 0.03;
            break;

          case 'walkingToTable':
            // Switch to run animation
            switchAnimation(hiredCleanerMesh, 'run');

            if (!ai.targetTable || !ai.targetTable.tableData.hasTrash) {
              ai.state = 'idle';
              ai.targetTable = null;
              break;
            }

            const tableX = ai.targetTable.tableData.x;
            const tableZ = ai.targetTable.tableData.z;
            const dx = tableX - hiredCleanerMesh.position.x;
            const dz = tableZ - hiredCleanerMesh.position.z;
            const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);

            if (dist < 2) {
              // Arrived - clean table, landing squish
              ai.state = 'cleaning';
              ai.cleanTimer = 0;
              squish.scaleY = 0.8;
              squish.scaleXZ = 1.2;
            } else {
              // Obstacle avoidance
              let avoidX = 0, avoidZ = 0;
              [player, hiredRunnerMesh, hiredStaffMesh, hiredStaffMesh2].forEach(o => {
                  if(!o) return;
                  const dX = hiredCleanerMesh.position.x - o.position.x;
                  const dZ = hiredCleanerMesh.position.z - o.position.z;
                  const d2 = dX*dX + dZ*dZ;
                  if(d2 < 9) {
                      const d = Math.sqrt(d2) || 0.001;
                      avoidX += (dX/d) * (3-d);
                      avoidZ += (dZ/d) * (3-d);
                  }
              });

              // Walk toward table with squishy walk
              const vx = (dx / dist) + avoidX * 0.5;
              const vz = (dz / dist) + avoidZ * 0.5;
              hiredCleanerMesh.position.x += vx * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredCleanerMesh.position.z += vz * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredCleanerMesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(vx, vz);

              // Squishy walk cycle
              const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.012) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.88 + walkCycle * 0.24;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.12 - walkCycle * 0.24;

              // Walking bob animation
              hiredCleanerMesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.015)) * 0.1;
            }
            break;

          case 'cleaning':
            // Switch to interact animation
            switchAnimation(hiredCleanerMesh, 'interact');

            ai.cleanTimer = (ai.cleanTimer || 0) + deltaTime;

            // Cleaning animation - rotate back and forth with squish
            hiredCleanerMesh.rotation.y = Math.sin(now * 0.01) * 0.3;

            // Rhythmic cleaning squish
            const cleanCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.015);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + cleanCycle * 0.08;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - cleanCycle * 0.06;

            if (ai.cleanTimer > 1.5) {
              // Done cleaning
              cleanTrashFromTable(ai.targetTable.tableData);
              playSound('pickup_sound');
              // Celebration bounce
              squish.scaleY = 1.15;
              squish.scaleXZ = 0.85;
              ai.state = 'idle';
              ai.targetTable = null;
            }
            break;
        }

        // Apply squish interpolation
        const squishSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
        squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * squishSpeed;
        squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * squishSpeed;
        hiredCleanerMesh.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);
      }
