      function updateRunnerAI(deltaTime) {
        if (!hiredRunnerMesh || !runnerStaffAI) return;

        const ai = runnerStaffAI;
        const cashierConfig = window.gameConfig.cashierStall;
        const squish = hiredRunnerMesh.userData.squishState || {
          scaleY: 1,
          scaleXZ: 1,
          targetScaleY: 1,
          targetScaleXZ: 1,
        };
        const now = Date.now();

        switch (ai.state) {
          case 'idle':
            // Switch to idle animation
            switchAnimation(hiredRunnerMesh, 'idle');

            ai.idleTimer += deltaTime;
            if (ai.idleTimer > 0.3) {
              ai.idleTimer = 0;

              // If carrying burgers at capacity, go to cashier
              if (ai.carryingBurgers >= ai.maxCapacity) {
                ai.state = 'walkingToCashier';
                squish.scaleY = 0.85;
                squish.scaleXZ = 1.15;
              } else {
                // First priority: collect ground items if any exist
                let foundGroundItem = false;
                if (groundItems.length > 0) {
                  let nearestItem = null;
                  let nearestDist = Infinity;

                  for (const item of groundItems) {
                    if (item.userData.collected || item.userData.beingVacuumed) continue;
                    const dx = item.position.x - hiredRunnerMesh.position.x;
                    const dz = item.position.z - hiredRunnerMesh.position.z;
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);
                    if (dist < nearestDist) {
                      nearestDist = dist;
                      nearestItem = item;
                    }
                  }

                  if (nearestItem) {
                    ai.targetItem = nearestItem;
                    ai.state = 'walkingToItem';
                    squish.scaleY = 0.85;
                    squish.scaleXZ = 1.15;
                    foundGroundItem = true;
                  }
                }

                // Second priority: find a ready grill to use
                if (!foundGroundItem) {
                  let nearestGrill = null;
                  let nearestDist = Infinity;

                  for (const node of resourceNodes) {
                    if (!node.isReady) continue;
                    const dx = node.position.x - hiredRunnerMesh.position.x;
                    const dz = node.position.z - hiredRunnerMesh.position.z;
                    const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dz * dz);
                    if (dist < nearestDist) {
                      nearestDist = dist;
                      nearestGrill = node;
                    }
                  }

                  if (nearestGrill) {
                    ai.targetGrill = nearestGrill;
                    ai.state = 'walkingToGrill';
                    squish.scaleY = 0.85;
                    squish.scaleXZ = 1.15;
                  } else if (ai.carryingBurgers > 0) {
                    // No grills ready but carrying burgers - deliver them
                    ai.state = 'walkingToCashier';
                    squish.scaleY = 0.85;
                    squish.scaleXZ = 1.15;
                  }
                }
              }
            }

            // Idle breathing
            const breathe = Math.sin(now * 0.003);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.04;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.03;
            hiredRunnerMesh.position.y = Math.sin(now * 0.003) * 0.03;
            break;

          case 'walkingToGrill':
            // Switch to run/carry animation
            switchAnimation(hiredRunnerMesh, ai.carryingBurgers > 0 ? 'walkCarry' : 'run');

            if (!ai.targetGrill || !ai.targetGrill.isReady) {
              ai.state = 'idle';
              ai.targetGrill = null;
              break;
            }

            const grillX = ai.targetGrill.position.x;
            const grillZ = ai.targetGrill.position.z;
            const dxg = grillX - hiredRunnerMesh.position.x;
            const dzg = grillZ - hiredRunnerMesh.position.z;
            const distg = Math.sqrt(dxg * dxg + dzg * dzg);

            if (distg < 2.5) {
              // Arrived at grill - start cooking/collecting
              ai.state = 'usingGrill';
              ai.collectTimer = 0;
              squish.scaleY = 0.8;
              squish.scaleXZ = 1.2;
            } else {
              let avoidX = 0, avoidZ = 0;
              [player, hiredCleanerMesh, hiredStaffMesh, hiredStaffMesh2].forEach(o => {
                  if(!o) return;
                  const dX = hiredRunnerMesh.position.x - o.position.x;
                  const dZ = hiredRunnerMesh.position.z - o.position.z;
                  const d2 = dX*dX + dZ*dZ;
                  if(d2 < 9) {
                      const d = Math.sqrt(d2) || 0.001;
                      avoidX += (dX/d) * (3-d);
                      avoidZ += (dZ/d) * (3-d);
                  }
              });

              const vx = (dxg / distg) + avoidX * 0.5;
              const vz = (dzg / distg) + avoidZ * 0.5;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.x += vx * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.z += vz * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredRunnerMesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(vx, vz);

              // Squishy walk
              const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.014) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.88 + walkCycle * 0.24;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.12 - walkCycle * 0.24;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.015)) * 0.1;
            }
            break;

          case 'usingGrill':
            // Switch to interact animation
            switchAnimation(hiredRunnerMesh, 'interact');

            if (!ai.targetGrill || !ai.targetGrill.isReady) {
              ai.state = 'idle';
              ai.targetGrill = null;
              break;
            }

            ai.collectTimer += deltaTime;

            // Show collection progress (using same time as player)
            const collectionTime = getCollectionTime();

            // Working squish
            const workCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.02);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + workCycle * 0.06;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - workCycle * 0.05;

            if (ai.collectTimer >= collectionTime) {
              // Deplete the equipment and spawn food items
              const node = ai.targetGrill;
              const equipmentType = node.equipmentType || 'grill';
              node.isReady = false;
              node.regenTimer = window.gameConfig.resources.regenerationTime;
              if (node.grillMesh) {
                node.grillMesh.visible = false;
                node.grillMesh.scale.setScalar(0);
              }
              if (node.emptyMesh) {
                node.emptyMesh.visible = true;
              }

              // Spawn food items on the ground near the equipment
              const itemsToSpawn = 3 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 2);
              // 3-4 items
              for (let i = 0; i < itemsToSpawn; i++) {
                const angle = (i / itemsToSpawn) * Math.PI * 2;
                const distance = 1.5 + Math.random() * 1;
                const spawnPos = new THREE.Vector3(
                  node.position.x + Math.cos(angle) * distance,
                  0,
                  node.position.z + Math.sin(angle) * distance
                );
                // Spawn food that matches this equipment type
                const menuItem = getRandomMenuItemForEquipment(equipmentType);
                createGroundItem(spawnPos, menuItem);
              }

              playSound('pickup_sound');
              squish.scaleY = 1.15;
              squish.scaleXZ = 0.85;
              ai.targetGrill = null;
              ai.state = 'idle';
              // Will immediately find the ground items
            }
            break;

          case 'walkingToItem':
            // Switch to run/carry animation
            switchAnimation(hiredRunnerMesh, ai.carryingBurgers > 0 ? 'walkCarry' : 'run');

            if (!ai.targetItem || ai.targetItem.userData.collected) {
              ai.state = 'idle';
              ai.targetItem = null;
              break;
            }

            const itemX = ai.targetItem.position.x;
            const itemZ = ai.targetItem.position.z;
            const dxi = itemX - hiredRunnerMesh.position.x;
            const dzi = itemZ - hiredRunnerMesh.position.z;
            const disti = Math.sqrt(dxi * dxi + dzi * dzi);

            if (disti < 1.5) {
              // Collect the item
              const menuItem = ai.targetItem.userData.menuItem;
              ai.targetItem.userData.collected = true;
              ai.carryingBurgers++;
              addBurgerToRunnerStack(menuItem);
              // Pass menu item
              playSound('pickup_sound');
              // Collection bounce
              squish.scaleY = 1.2;
              squish.scaleXZ = 0.8;

              if (ai.carryingBurgers >= ai.maxCapacity) {
                ai.state = 'walkingToCashier';
              } else {
                ai.state = 'idle';
              }
              ai.targetItem = null;
            } else {
              let avoidX = 0, avoidZ = 0;
              [player, hiredCleanerMesh, hiredStaffMesh, hiredStaffMesh2].forEach(o => {
                  if(!o) return;
                  const dX = hiredRunnerMesh.position.x - o.position.x;
                  const dZ = hiredRunnerMesh.position.z - o.position.z;
                  const d2 = dX*dX + dZ*dZ;
                  if(d2 < 9) {
                      const d = Math.sqrt(d2) || 0.001;
                      avoidX += (dX/d) * (3-d);
                      avoidZ += (dZ/d) * (3-d);
                  }
              });

              const vx = (dxi / disti) + avoidX * 0.5;
              const vz = (dzi / disti) + avoidZ * 0.5;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.x += vx * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.z += vz * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredRunnerMesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(vx, vz);

              // Squishy walk
              const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.014) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.88 + walkCycle * 0.24;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.12 - walkCycle * 0.24;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.015)) * 0.1;
            }
            break;

          case 'walkingToCashier':
            // Switch to run/carry animation
            switchAnimation(hiredRunnerMesh, ai.carryingBurgers > 0 ? 'walkCarry' : 'run');

            if (!cashierConfig || cashierConfig.deleted) {
              ai.state = 'idle';
              break;
            }

            const cashierX = cashierConfig.x;
            const cashierZ = cashierConfig.z - cashierConfig.depth / 2 - 2;
            const dxc = cashierX - hiredRunnerMesh.position.x;
            const dzc = cashierZ - hiredRunnerMesh.position.z;
            const distc = Math.sqrt(dxc * dxc + dzc * dzc);

            if (distc < 2) {
              // Deposit burgers
              ai.state = 'depositing';
              ai.depositTimer = 0;
              squish.scaleY = 0.8;
              squish.scaleXZ = 1.2;
            } else {
              let avoidX = 0, avoidZ = 0;
              [player, hiredCleanerMesh, hiredStaffMesh, hiredStaffMesh2].forEach(o => {
                  if(!o) return;
                  const dX = hiredRunnerMesh.position.x - o.position.x;
                  const dZ = hiredRunnerMesh.position.z - o.position.z;
                  const d2 = dX*dX + dZ*dZ;
                  if(d2 < 9) {
                      const d = Math.sqrt(d2) || 0.001;
                      avoidX += (dX/d) * (3-d);
                      avoidZ += (dZ/d) * (3-d);
                  }
              });

              const vx = (dxc / distc) + avoidX * 0.5;
              const vz = (dzc / distc) + avoidZ * 0.5;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.x += vx * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.z += vz * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredRunnerMesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(vx, vz);

              // Squishy walk
              const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.014) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.88 + walkCycle * 0.24;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.12 - walkCycle * 0.24;
              hiredRunnerMesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.015)) * 0.1;
            }
            break;

          case 'depositing':
            // Switch to interact animation
            switchAnimation(hiredRunnerMesh, 'interact');

            ai.depositTimer += deltaTime;

            // Depositing rhythm squish
            const depositCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.02);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + depositCycle * 0.05;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - depositCycle * 0.04;

            if (ai.depositTimer >= 0.15) {
              ai.depositTimer = 0;

              if (ai.carryingBurgers > 0 && cashierBurgerStack.length < cashierConfig.maxBurgers) {
                ai.carryingBurgers--;
                const menuItem = removeBurgerFromRunnerStack();
                addBurgerToCashier(menuItem);
                // Pass menu item
                playSound('pickup_sound');
                updateCashierUI();
                // Quick deposit bounce
                squish.scaleY = 1.1;
                squish.scaleXZ = 0.9;
              }

              if (ai.carryingBurgers === 0) {
                ai.state = 'idle';
              }
            }
            break;
        }

        updateTray(hiredRunnerMesh, runnerBurgerStack);

        // Apply squish interpolation
        const squishSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
        squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * squishSpeed;
        squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * squishSpeed;
        hiredRunnerMesh.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);
      }

      function addBurgerToRunnerStack(menuItem = null) {
        if (!hiredRunnerMesh) return;

        const food = createStackItem(menuItem);
        const stackY = PLAYER_HEIGHT + runnerBurgerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT;
        food.position.set(0, stackY, 1);
        hiredRunnerMesh.add(food);
        runnerBurgerStack.push(food);
      }

      function removeBurgerFromRunnerStack() {
        if (runnerBurgerStack.length > 0) {
          const item = runnerBurgerStack.pop();
          const menuItem = item.userData.menuItem;
          hiredRunnerMesh.remove(item);
          item.traverse((child) => {
            if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
            if (child.material) {
              if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
              else child.material.dispose();
            }
          });
          return menuItem;
          // Return menu item for value tracking
        }
        return null;
      }

      // ============================================
      // VAULT COLLECTOR STAFF TILE UPDATE
      // ============================================

      function updateVaultStaffTile(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;

        const config = window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile;
        if (!config || config.deleted || config.staffHired || !vaultStaffTileMesh) return;

        // Check if player is in tile zone
        isInVaultStaffTile = isPlayerInZone(config);

        const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
        const totalDeposited = config.moneyDeposited + (config.moneyInFlight || 0);

        // Deposit money when in zone
        if (isInVaultStaffTile && vaultBalance > 0 && totalDeposited < config.hireCost) {
          vaultStaffDepositTimer += deltaTime;

          if (vaultStaffDepositTimer >= STAFF_HIRE_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
            vaultStaffDepositTimer = 0;

            const depositAmount = getDepositAmount(config.hireCost, moneyValue, totalDeposited);
            if (depositAmount > 0) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-depositAmount);
              config.moneyInFlight = (config.moneyInFlight || 0) + depositAmount;

              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };

              createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                {
                  x: config.x,
                  y: 0.5,
                  z: config.z,
                },
                'money',
                () => {
                  config.moneyInFlight = Math.max(0, (config.moneyInFlight || 0) - depositAmount);
                  if (config.staffHired) return;
                  config.moneyDeposited += depositAmount;
                  window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.moneyDeposited = config.moneyDeposited;

                  playSound('collect_sound');
                  updateVaultStaffProgress();
                  updateVaultStaffCostDisplay();

                  if (config.moneyDeposited >= config.hireCost) {
                    window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.staffHired = true;
                    config.staffHired = true;
                    playSound('upgrade_sound');
                    showHireNotification('vaultCollector');
                    createSmokeParticlesAt(config.x, 0.5, config.z);
                    createHiredVaultCollector();
                    destroyVaultStaffTileVisuals();
                  }
                },
                true
              );
            }
          }
        } else {
          vaultStaffDepositTimer = 0;
        }

        // Animate glow
        if (vaultStaffTileGlow) {
          const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          vaultStaffTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
        }

        const icon = vaultStaffTileMesh?.userData?.staffIcon;
        if (icon) {
          icon.position.y = icon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
        }
      }

      function updateVaultCollectorAI(deltaTime) {
        if (!hiredVaultCollectorMesh || !vaultCollectorAI) return;

        const ai = vaultCollectorAI;
        const vaultConfig = window.gameConfig.bankVault;
        const squish = hiredVaultCollectorMesh.userData.squishState || {
          scaleY: 1,
          scaleXZ: 1,
          targetScaleY: 1,
          targetScaleXZ: 1,
        };
        const now = Date.now();

        switch (ai.state) {
          case 'idle':
            // Switch to idle animation
            switchAnimation(hiredVaultCollectorMesh, 'idle');

            ai.idleTimer += deltaTime;
            if (ai.idleTimer > 0.5) {
              ai.idleTimer = 0;

              // If carrying money at capacity or no more to collect, go to vault
              if (ai.carryingMoney >= ai.maxCapacity) {
                ai.state = 'walkingToVault';
                squish.scaleY = 0.85;
                squish.scaleXZ = 1.15;
              } else {
                // Find cash pile with money to collect
                let targetPile = null;

                // Check cashier cash pile
                if (cashierCashPile.length > 0) {
                  targetPile = 'cashier';
                } // Check drive-thru cash pile
                else if (driveThruCashPile.length > 0) {
                  targetPile = 'driveThru';
                }

                if (targetPile) {
                  ai.targetCashPile = targetPile;
                  ai.state = 'walkingToCashPile';
                  squish.scaleY = 0.85;
                  squish.scaleXZ = 1.15;
                } else if (ai.carryingMoney > 0) {
                  // No more money to collect but carrying some - deposit
                  ai.state = 'walkingToVault';
                  squish.scaleY = 0.85;
                  squish.scaleXZ = 1.15;
                }
              }
            }

            // Idle breathing
            const breathe = Math.sin(now * 0.003);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + breathe * 0.04;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - breathe * 0.03;
            hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.y = Math.sin(now * 0.003) * 0.03;
            break;

          case 'walkingToCashPile':
            // Switch to run/carry animation
            switchAnimation(hiredVaultCollectorMesh, ai.carryingMoney > 0 ? 'walkCarry' : 'run');

            let targetX, targetZ;

            if (ai.targetCashPile === 'cashier' && cashierStallMesh) {
              targetX = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileX;
              targetZ = cashierStallMesh.userData.cashPileZ;
            } else if (ai.targetCashPile === 'driveThru' && driveThruBoothMesh) {
              targetX = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileX;
              targetZ = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileZ;
            } else {
              ai.state = 'idle';
              ai.targetCashPile = null;
              break;
            }

            const dxp = targetX - hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.x;
            const dzp = targetZ - hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.z;
            const distp = Math.sqrt(dxp * dxp + dzp * dzp);

            if (distp < 2) {
              // Arrived at cash pile - start collecting
              ai.state = 'collecting';
              ai.collectTimer = 0;
              squish.scaleY = 0.8;
              squish.scaleXZ = 1.2;
            } else {
              hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.x += (dxp / distp) * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.z += (dzp / distp) * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredVaultCollectorMesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dxp, dzp);

              // Squishy walk
              const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.014) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.88 + walkCycle * 0.24;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.12 - walkCycle * 0.24;
              hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.015)) * 0.1;
            }
            break;

          case 'collecting':
            // Switch to interact animation
            switchAnimation(hiredVaultCollectorMesh, 'interact');

            ai.collectTimer += deltaTime;

            // Collecting rhythm squish
            const collectCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.02);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + collectCycle * 0.06;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - collectCycle * 0.05;

            if (ai.collectTimer >= 0.2) {
              ai.collectTimer = 0;

              let collectedMoney = false;

              if (ai.targetCashPile === 'cashier' && cashierCashPile.length > 0) {
                // Collect from cashier cash pile
                const money = cashierCashPile.pop();
                scene.remove(money);
                money.traverse((child) => {
                  if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                  if (child.material) {
                    if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                    else child.material.dispose();
                  }
                });
                ai.carryingMoney++;
                addMoneyToVaultCollectorStack();
                collectedMoney = true;
                cashierEarnings = cashierCashPile.length;
                updateCashierUI();
              } else if (ai.targetCashPile === 'driveThru' && driveThruCashPile.length > 0) {
                // Collect from drive-thru cash pile
                const money = driveThruCashPile.pop();
                scene.remove(money);
                money.traverse((child) => {
                  if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                  if (child.material) {
                    if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                    else child.material.dispose();
                  }
                });
                ai.carryingMoney++;
                addMoneyToVaultCollectorStack();
                collectedMoney = true;
              }

              if (collectedMoney) {
                playSound('pickup_sound');
                squish.scaleY = 1.15;
                squish.scaleXZ = 0.85;
              }

              // Check if should continue or go deposit
              const currentPileEmpty =
                (ai.targetCashPile === 'cashier' && cashierCashPile.length === 0) ||
                (ai.targetCashPile === 'driveThru' && driveThruCashPile.length === 0);

              if (ai.carryingMoney >= ai.maxCapacity || currentPileEmpty) {
                if (ai.carryingMoney > 0) {
                  ai.state = 'walkingToVault';
                } else {
                  ai.state = 'idle';
                }
                ai.targetCashPile = null;
              }
            }
            break;

          case 'walkingToVault':
            // Switch to run/carry animation
            switchAnimation(hiredVaultCollectorMesh, ai.carryingMoney > 0 ? 'walkCarry' : 'run');

            if (!vaultConfig || vaultConfig.deleted) {
              ai.state = 'idle';
              break;
            }

            const vaultX = vaultConfig.x;
            const vaultZ = vaultConfig.z + vaultConfig.depth / 2 + 1.5;
            const dxv = vaultX - hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.x;
            const dzv = vaultZ - hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.z;
            const distv = Math.sqrt(dxv * dxv + dzv * dzv);

            if (distv < 2) {
              // Deposit money in vault
              ai.state = 'depositing';
              ai.depositTimer = 0;
              squish.scaleY = 0.8;
              squish.scaleXZ = 1.2;
            } else {
              hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.x += (dxv / distv) * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.z += (dzv / distv) * ai.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
              hiredVaultCollectorMesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dxv, dzv);

              // Squishy walk
              const walkCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.014) * 0.5 + 0.5;
              squish.targetScaleY = 0.88 + walkCycle * 0.24;
              squish.targetScaleXZ = 1.12 - walkCycle * 0.24;
              hiredVaultCollectorMesh.position.y = Math.abs(Math.sin(now * 0.015)) * 0.1;
            }
            break;

          case 'depositing':
            // Switch to interact animation
            switchAnimation(hiredVaultCollectorMesh, 'interact');

            ai.depositTimer += deltaTime;

            // Depositing rhythm squish
            const depositCycle = Math.sin(now * 0.02);
            squish.targetScaleY = 1 + depositCycle * 0.05;
            squish.targetScaleXZ = 1 - depositCycle * 0.04;

            if (ai.depositTimer >= 0.12) {
              ai.depositTimer = 0;

              if (ai.carryingMoney > 0) {
                ai.carryingMoney--;
                removeMoneyFromVaultCollectorStack();

                // Add to vault balance
                const depositValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
                modifyVaultBalance(depositValue);

                playSound('pickup_sound');
                squish.scaleY = 1.1;
                squish.scaleXZ = 0.9;
              }

              if (ai.carryingMoney === 0) {
                ai.state = 'idle';
              }
            }
            break;
        }

        // Apply squish interpolation
        const squishSpeed = 10 * deltaTime;
        squish.scaleY += (squish.targetScaleY - squish.scaleY) * squishSpeed;
        squish.scaleXZ += (squish.targetScaleXZ - squish.scaleXZ) * squishSpeed;
        hiredVaultCollectorMesh.scale.set(squish.scaleXZ, squish.scaleY, squish.scaleXZ);
      }

      function addMoneyToVaultCollectorStack() {
        if (!hiredVaultCollectorMesh) return;

        const money = createMoneyStackItem();
        const stackY = PLAYER_HEIGHT + vaultCollectorMoneyStack.length * MONEY_STACK_HEIGHT;
        money.position.set(0, stackY, 0);
        hiredVaultCollectorMesh.add(money);
        vaultCollectorMoneyStack.push(money);
      }

      function removeMoneyFromVaultCollectorStack() {
        if (vaultCollectorMoneyStack.length > 0) {
          const item = vaultCollectorMoneyStack.pop();
          hiredVaultCollectorMesh.remove(item);
          item.traverse((child) => {
            if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
            if (child.material) {
              if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
              else child.material.dispose();
            }
          });
        }
      }

      // ============================================
      // FLYING ITEMS SYSTEM (Vacuum & Throw Effects)
      // ============================================

      function createFlyingItem(sourcePos, targetPos, itemType, onComplete, throwDirection = null) {
        // Create visual for flying item based on type
        let visual;

        if (itemType === 'burger') {
          visual = createStackItem();
        } else if (itemType === 'money') {
          visual = createMoneyStackItem();
        }

        if (!visual) return;

        visual.position.set(sourcePos.x, sourcePos.y, sourcePos.z);
        scene.add(visual);

        const flyingItem = {
          mesh: visual,
          startPos: {
            x: sourcePos.x,
            y: sourcePos.y,
            z: sourcePos.z,
          },
          targetPos: {
            x: targetPos.x,
            y: targetPos.y,
            z: targetPos.z,
          },
          progress: 0,
          itemType: itemType,
          onComplete: onComplete,
          isThrow: throwDirection !== null,
          // true = throw arc, false = vacuum
          throwDirection: throwDirection,
        };

        flyingItems.push(flyingItem);
        return flyingItem;
      }

      function updateFlyingItems(deltaTime) {
        const playerX = player.position.x;
        const playerY = player.position.y;
        const playerZ = player.position.z;
        const stackHeight = playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT;
        const moneyHeight = moneyStack.length * MONEY_STACK_HEIGHT;

        for (let i = flyingItems.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
          const item = flyingItems[i];
          const mesh = item.mesh;

          // Get current target position
          let targetX, targetY, targetZ;

          if (item.isThrow) {
            targetX = item.targetPos.x;
            targetY = item.targetPos.y;
            targetZ = item.targetPos.z;
          } else if (item.itemType === 'burger') {
            targetX = playerX;
            targetY = playerY + PLAYER_HEIGHT + stackHeight;
            targetZ = playerZ;
          } else {
            targetX = playerX;
            targetY = playerY + PLAYER_HEIGHT + stackHeight + moneyHeight;
            targetZ = playerZ;
          }

          if (item.isThrow) {
            item.progress += deltaTime * (THROW_SPEED / 10);

            if (item.progress >= 1) {
              mesh.position.set(targetX, targetY, targetZ);
              if (item.onComplete) item.onComplete();

              scene.remove(mesh);
              mesh.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
              flyingItems.splice(i, 1);
            } else {
              const t = item.progress;
              const easeT = t < 0.5 ? 2 * t * t : 1 - Math.pow(-2 * t + 2, 2) / 2;

              mesh.position.x = item.startPos.x + (targetX - item.startPos.x) * easeT;
              mesh.position.z = item.startPos.z + (targetZ - item.startPos.z) * easeT;

              const arcProgress = Math.sin(t * Math.PI);
              const baseY = item.startPos.y + (targetY - item.startPos.y) * easeT;
              mesh.position.y = baseY + arcProgress * THROW_ARC_HEIGHT;

              mesh.rotation.y += deltaTime * 10;
              mesh.rotation.x += deltaTime * 5;
            }
          } else {
            const dx = targetX - mesh.position.x;
            const dy = targetY - mesh.position.y;
            const dz = targetZ - mesh.position.z;
            const distSq = dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz;

            if (distSq < 0.25) {
              // 0.5 squared
              if (item.onComplete) item.onComplete();

              scene.remove(mesh);
              mesh.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
              flyingItems.splice(i, 1);
            } else {
              const dist = Math.sqrt(distSq);
              const speed = getVacuumSpeed() * (1 + (1 - Math.min(dist / VACUUM_RANGE, 1)) * 2);
              const moveAmount = (speed * deltaTime) / dist;

              mesh.position.x += dx * moveAmount;
              mesh.position.y += dy * moveAmount;
              mesh.position.z += dz * moveAmount;

              const scale = Math.max(0.3, dist / VACUUM_RANGE);
              mesh.scale.setScalar(scale);

              mesh.rotation.y += deltaTime * 8;
            }
          }
        }
      }

      function throwItemToZone(itemType, targetPos, onComplete) {
        // Get player world position for the item
        const startPos = {
          x: player.position.x,
          y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + 0.5,
          z: player.position.z,
        };

        createFlyingItem(startPos, targetPos, itemType, onComplete, true);
      }

      // ============================================
      // GAME LOOP
      // ============================================

      function gameLoop(timestamp) {
        const deltaTime = Math.min((timestamp - lastTime) / 1000, 0.11);
        lastTime = timestamp;

        if (gameMode === 'play') {
          // Update autosave timer
          if (window.gameConfig.settings.autosaveEnabled) {
            autosaveTimer += deltaTime;
            if (autosaveTimer >= AUTOSAVE_INTERVAL) {
              autosaveTimer = 0;
              performAutosave().catch((err) => lib.log('Autosave error: ' + err.message));
            }
          }
          // Update animation mixers for 3D models
          updateAnimationMixers(deltaTime);

          updatePlayer(deltaTime);
          updateResourceNodes(deltaTime);
          updateCollection(deltaTime);
          updateGroundItems(deltaTime);
          updateSelling(deltaTime);
          updateMoneyZone(deltaTime);
          updateSpendZone(deltaTime);
          updateStaffHireTile(deltaTime);
          updateCleanerStaffTile(deltaTime);
          updateRunnerStaffTile(deltaTime);
          updateVaultStaffTile(deltaTime);
          updateCashierTile(deltaTime);
          updateCleanerAI(deltaTime);
          updateRunnerAI(deltaTime);
          updateVaultCollectorAI(deltaTime);
          updateCashierStall(deltaTime);
          updateCashierCashPile(deltaTime);
          updateGrillTile(deltaTime);
          updateDriveThruTile(deltaTime);
          updateTrashTile(deltaTime);
          updateVaultTile(deltaTime);
          updateFountainTile(deltaTime);
          updateFountain2Tile(deltaTime);
          updateFountainAnimation();
          updateSelfOrderKioskTile(deltaTime);
          updateSelfOrderKioskTiles(deltaTime);
          updateDriveThruBooth(deltaTime);
          updateDriveThruCashPile(deltaTime);
          updateDriveThruCarQueue(deltaTime);
          updateSelfOrderKiosks(deltaTime);
          updateRushHour(deltaTime);
          updateCustomerQueue(deltaTime);
          updateDiningTableTile(deltaTime);
          updateTrashCollection(deltaTime);
          updateTrashBin(deltaTime);
          updateBankVault(deltaTime);
          updateFlyingItems(deltaTime);
          updateSmokeParticles(deltaTime);
          updateDustParticles(deltaTime);
          updateStaffWalking(deltaTime);
          
          const updateDTStaffWalk = (staff, slotIndex) => {
            if (!staff) return;
            const dx = staff.targetX - staff.mesh.position.x;
            const dz = staff.targetZ - staff.mesh.position.z;
            const d = Math.sqrt(dx*dx + dz*dz);
            if (d < 0.3) {
                if (slotIndex === 0) hiredDriveThruStaffMesh = staff.mesh;
                else if (slotIndex === 1) hiredDriveThruStaffMesh2 = staff.mesh;
                else if (slotIndex === 2) hiredDriveThruStaffMesh3 = staff.mesh;
                switchAnimation(staff.mesh, 'idle');
                if (slotIndex === 0) driveThruStaffWalking = null;
                else if (slotIndex === 1) driveThruStaffWalking2 = null;
                else if (slotIndex === 2) driveThruStaffWalking3 = null;
            } else {
                staff.mesh.position.x += (dx/d) * staff.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
                staff.mesh.position.z += (dz/d) * staff.walkSpeed * deltaTime;
                staff.mesh.rotation.y = Math.atan2(dx, dz);
                switchAnimation(staff.mesh, 'walk');
            }
          };
          updateDTStaffWalk(driveThruStaffWalking, 0);
          updateDTStaffWalk(driveThruStaffWalking2, 1);
          updateDTStaffWalk(driveThruStaffWalking3, 2);

          const updateDTStaffAnim = (staffMesh) => {
             if (!staffMesh) return;
             if (driveThruServeTimer > 0 && driveThruServeTimer < 0.3) {
                switchAnimation(staffMesh, 'interact');
             } else {
                switchAnimation(staffMesh, 'idle');
             }
          };
          updateDTStaffAnim(hiredDriveThruStaffMesh);
          updateDTStaffAnim(hiredDriveThruStaffMesh2);
          updateDTStaffAnim(hiredDriveThruStaffMesh3);
          
          updateDriveThruStaffTile(deltaTime);
          updateDriveThruRunners(deltaTime);
          updateCityLights(deltaTime);
          lerpTileProgressBars();
          checkTutorialProgression();
          updateTutorialArrow(deltaTime);
          updateTutorialHint(deltaTime);

          if (tutorialCompleteShown) {
            tutorialCompleteTimer -= deltaTime;
            if (tutorialCompleteTimer <= 0) {
              const overlay = document.getElementById('tutorial-complete');
              if (overlay) overlay.classList.remove('show');
            }
          }
        } else {
          // Edit mode - still update visuals
          updateResourceNodes(deltaTime);
          updateEditorSelection(deltaTime);
          updateCityLights(deltaTime);

          // Animate sell zone
          if (sellZoneGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.05;
            sellZoneGlow.scale.setScalar(pulseScale);
          }

          if (sellZoneMesh) {
            const coinIndicator = sellZoneMesh.userData.coinIndicator;
            if (coinIndicator) {
              coinIndicator.rotation.y += deltaTime * 2;
              coinIndicator.position.y =
                coinIndicator.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.002) * 0.3;
            }
          }

          // Animate money zone
          if (moneyZoneGlow) {
            const moneyPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.03;
            moneyZoneGlow.scale.set(moneyPulse, 1, moneyPulse);
          }

// Animate spend zone
          if (spendZoneGlow) {
            const spendPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.005) * 0.04;
            spendZoneGlow.scale.set(spendPulse, 1, spendPulse);
          }

          // Animate self-order kiosks
          selfOrderKiosks.forEach((kiosk) => {
            if (kiosk.glow) {
              const pulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
              kiosk.glow.scale.set(pulse, 1, pulse);
            }
            if (kiosk.mesh && kiosk.mesh.userData.icon) {
              kiosk.mesh.userData.icon.position.y = 3 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.2;
              kiosk.mesh.userData.icon.lookAt(camera.position);
            }
          });

          // Animate cashier zone
          if (cashierStallGlow) {
            const cashierPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            cashierStallGlow.scale.set(cashierPulse, 1, cashierPulse);
          }

          // Animate cash pile zone
          if (cashierCashPileGlow) {
            const cashPilePulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            cashierCashPileGlow.scale.set(cashPilePulse, 1, cashPilePulse);
          }

          // Animate dollar icon on cash pile
          const dollarIcon = cashierCashPileMesh?.userData?.dollarIcon;
          if (dollarIcon) {
            dollarIcon.position.y = dollarIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
            dollarIcon.rotation.y += deltaTime * 1.2;
          }

          // Animate drive-thru booth
          if (driveThruBoothGlow) {
            const dtPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            driveThruBoothGlow.scale.set(dtPulse, 1, dtPulse);
          }

          if (driveThruCashPileGlow) {
            const dtCashPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            driveThruCashPileGlow.scale.set(dtCashPulse, 1, dtCashPulse);
          }

          const carIcon = driveThruBoothMesh?.userData?.carIcon;
          if (carIcon) {
            carIcon.position.y = 5.2 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          // Animate menu burger
          const menuBurger = cashierStallMesh?.userData?.menuBurger;
          if (menuBurger) {
            menuBurger.rotation.y += deltaTime * 1.5;
          }

          // Animate staff hire tile
          if (staffHireTileGlow) {
            const staffPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            staffHireTileGlow.scale.set(staffPulse, 1, staffPulse);
          }

          const staffIcon = staffHireTileMesh?.userData?.staffIcon;
          if (staffIcon) {
            staffIcon.position.y = staffIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          // Animate dining table tiles
          diningTableTileMeshes.forEach((tileEntry, i) => {
            const diningTableTileGlow = tileEntry.glow;
            const diningTableTileMesh = tileEntry.mesh;

            if (diningTableTileGlow) {
              const diningPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004 + i) * 0.05;
              diningTableTileGlow.scale.set(diningPulse, 1, diningPulse);
            }

            const tableIcon = diningTableTileMesh?.userData?.tableIcon;
            if (tableIcon) {
              tableIcon.position.y =
                tableIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003 + i) * 0.1;
              tableIcon.rotation.y += deltaTime * 0.5;
            }
          });

          // Animate trash bin
          if (trashBinGlow) {
            const trashPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            trashBinGlow.scale.setScalar(trashPulse);
          }

          const editTrashIcon = trashBinMesh?.userData?.trashIcon;
          if (editTrashIcon) {
            editTrashIcon.position.y =
              editTrashIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
            editTrashIcon.lookAt(camera.position);
          }

          // Animate bank vault
          if (bankVaultGlow) {
            const vaultPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            bankVaultGlow.scale.set(vaultPulse, 1, vaultPulse);
          }

          const vaultIcon = bankVaultMesh?.userData?.vaultIcon;
          if (vaultIcon) {
            vaultIcon.position.y = vaultIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.15;
            vaultIcon.lookAt(camera.position);
          }

          const vaultHandle = bankVaultMesh?.userData?.handle;
          if (vaultHandle) {
            vaultHandle.rotation.z += deltaTime * 0.5;
          }

          // Animate cleaner staff tile
          if (cleanerStaffTileGlow) {
            const cleanerPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            cleanerStaffTileGlow.scale.set(cleanerPulse, 1, cleanerPulse);
          }

          const cleanerIcon =
            cleanerStaffTileMesh &&
            cleanerStaffTileMesh.userData &&
            cleanerStaffTileMesh.userData.staffIcon;
          if (cleanerIcon) {
            cleanerIcon.position.y =
              cleanerIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          // Animate runner staff tile
          if (runnerStaffTileGlow) {
            const runnerPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            runnerStaffTileGlow.scale.set(runnerPulse, 1, runnerPulse);
          }

          const runnerIcon =
            runnerStaffTileMesh &&
            runnerStaffTileMesh.userData &&
            runnerStaffTileMesh.userData.staffIcon;
          if (runnerIcon) {
            runnerIcon.position.y = runnerIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          // Animate vault staff tile
          if (vaultStaffTileGlow) {
            const vaultStaffPulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            vaultStaffTileGlow.scale.set(vaultStaffPulse, 1, vaultStaffPulse);
          }

          const vaultStaffIcon =
            vaultStaffTileMesh &&
            vaultStaffTileMesh.userData &&
            vaultStaffTileMesh.userData.staffIcon;
          if (vaultStaffIcon) {
            vaultStaffIcon.position.y =
              vaultStaffIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          // Animate cashier tile
          if (cashierTileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            cashierTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const cashierTileIcon = cashierTileMesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (cashierTileIcon) {
            cashierTileIcon.position.y =
              cashierTileIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          // Animate grill tile
          if (grillTileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            grillTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const grillTileIcon = grillTileMesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (grillTileIcon) {
            grillTileIcon.position.y =
              grillTileIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          if (driveThruTileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            driveThruTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const driveThruTileIcon = driveThruTileMesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (driveThruTileIcon) {
            driveThruTileIcon.position.y =
              driveThruTileIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          if (trashTileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            trashTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const trashTileIcon = trashTileMesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (trashTileIcon) {
            trashTileIcon.position.y =
              trashTileIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          if (vaultTileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            vaultTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const vaultTileIcon = vaultTileMesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (vaultTileIcon) {
            vaultTileIcon.position.y =
              vaultTileIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          updateFountainAnimation();
          if (fountainTileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            fountainTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const fountainTileIcon = fountainTileMesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (fountainTileIcon) {
            fountainTileIcon.position.y =
              fountainTileIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          if (fountain2TileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            fountain2TileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const fountain2TileIcon = fountain2TileMesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (fountain2TileIcon) {
            fountain2TileIcon.position.y =
              fountain2TileIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          if (selfOrderKioskTileGlow) {
            const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            selfOrderKioskTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
          }
          const selfOrderKioskTileIcon = selfOrderKioskTileMesh?.userData?.icon;
          if (selfOrderKioskTileIcon) {
            selfOrderKioskTileIcon.position.y =
              selfOrderKioskTileIcon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
          }

          selfOrderKioskTileMeshes.forEach((tileEntry, index) => {
            if (tileEntry.glow) {
              const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004 + index) * 0.05;
              tileEntry.glow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
            }
            const icon = tileEntry.mesh?.userData?.icon;
            if (icon) {
              icon.position.y = icon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003 + index) * 0.1;
            }
          });
        }

        // Animate self-order kiosks (fallback for non-array contexts)
        selfOrderKiosks.forEach((kiosk) => {
          if (kiosk.mesh && kiosk.mesh.userData.icon) {
            kiosk.mesh.userData.icon.position.y = 3 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.2;
            kiosk.mesh.userData.icon.lookAt(camera.position);
          }
          if (kiosk.glow) {
            const pulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
            kiosk.glow.scale.set(pulse, 1, pulse);
          }
        });

        updateCamera();
        renderer.render(scene, camera);

        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
      }

      // ============================================
      // LEVEL EDITOR SYSTEM
      // ============================================

      function initLevelEditor() {
        if (gameMode !== 'edit') return;

        raycaster = new THREE.Raycaster();

        // Create selection highlight ring
        const highlightGeometry = new THREE.RingGeometry(1.5, 1.8, 32);
        const highlightMaterial = new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({
          color: 0x3498db,
          side: THREE.DoubleSide,
          transparent: true,
          opacity: 0.8,
        });
        selectionHighlight = new THREE.Mesh(highlightGeometry, highlightMaterial);
        selectionHighlight.rotation.x = -Math.PI / 2;
        selectionHighlight.position.y = 0.1;
        selectionHighlight.visible = false;
        scene.add(selectionHighlight);

        // Register editable objects
        registerEditableObjects();

        // Setup editor input handlers
        setupEditorInput();
        setupEditorToolbar();
      }

      function registerEditableObjects() {
        editableObjects = [];

        // Register player
        editableObjects.push({
          mesh: player,
          type: 'player',
          configKey: 'player',
          name: 'Chef (Player Start)',
          getData: () => ({
            x: player.position.x,
            z: player.position.z,
          }),
          setPosition: (x, z) => {
            player.position.x = x;
            player.position.z = z;
            window.gameConfig.player.startX = x;
            window.gameConfig.player.startZ = z;
          },
        });

        // Register sell zone
        if (window.gameConfig.sellZone && !window.gameConfig.sellZone.deleted) {
          editableObjects.push({
            mesh: sellZoneMesh,
            type: 'sellZone',
            configKey: 'sellZone',
            name: 'Service Counter',
            getData: () => ({
              x: sellZoneMesh.position.x,
              z: sellZoneMesh.position.z,
              radius: window.gameConfig.sellZone.radius,
            }),
            setPosition: (x, z) => {
              sellZoneMesh.position.x = x;
              sellZoneMesh.position.z = z;
              sellZoneGlow.position.x = x;
              sellZoneGlow.position.z = z;
              // Move customer indicator too
              const customer = sellZoneMesh.userData.coinIndicator;
              if (customer) {
                customer.position.x = x;
                customer.position.z = z;
              }
              // Move counter top
              scene.children.forEach((child) => {
                if (
                  child.geometry &&
                  child.geometry.type === 'CylinderGeometry' &&
                  child.position.y === 0.35 &&
                  child !== sellZoneMesh
                ) {
                  child.position.x = x;
                  child.position.z = z;
                }
              });
              window.gameConfig.sellZone.x = x;
              window.gameConfig.sellZone.z = z;
            },
          });
        }

        // Register money zone
        if (window.gameConfig.moneyZone && !window.gameConfig.moneyZone.deleted) {
          editableObjects.push({
            mesh: moneyZoneMesh,
            type: 'moneyZone',
            configKey: 'moneyZone',
            name: 'Money Collection Zone',
            getData: () => ({
              x: window.gameConfig.moneyZone.x,
              z: window.gameConfig.moneyZone.z,
              width: window.gameConfig.moneyZone.width,
              depth: window.gameConfig.moneyZone.depth,
            }),
            setPosition: (x, z) => {
              updateMoneyZonePosition(x, z);
            },
          });
        }

        // Register spend zone
        if (window.gameConfig.spendZone && !window.gameConfig.spendZone.deleted) {
          editableObjects.push({
            mesh: spendZoneMesh,
            type: 'spendZone',
            configKey: 'spendZone',
            name: 'Spend/Deposit Zone',
            getData: () => ({
              x: window.gameConfig.spendZone.x,
              z: window.gameConfig.spendZone.z,
              width: window.gameConfig.spendZone.width,
              depth: window.gameConfig.spendZone.depth,
            }),
            setPosition: (x, z) => {
              updateSpendZonePosition(x, z);
            },
          });
        }

        // Register cashier tile
        if (
          window.gameConfig.cashierTile &&
          !window.gameConfig.cashierTile.deleted &&
          cashierTileMesh
        ) {
          editableObjects.push({
            mesh: cashierTileMesh,
            type: 'cashierTile',
            configKey: 'cashierTile',
            name: 'Cashier Unlock Tile',
            getData: () => ({
              x: window.gameConfig.cashierTile.x,
              z: window.gameConfig.cashierTile.z,
              width: window.gameConfig.cashierTile.width,
              depth: window.gameConfig.cashierTile.depth,
            }),
            setPosition: (x, z) => {
              updateCashierTilePosition(x, z);
            },
          });
        }

        // Register grill tile
        if (window.gameConfig.grillTile && !window.gameConfig.grillTile.deleted && grillTileMesh) {
          editableObjects.push({
            mesh: grillTileMesh,
            type: 'grillTile',
            configKey: 'grillTile',
            name: 'Grill Unlock Tile',
            getData: () => ({
              x: window.gameConfig.grillTile.x,
              z: window.gameConfig.grillTile.z,
              width: window.gameConfig.grillTile.width,
              depth: window.gameConfig.grillTile.depth,
            }),
            setPosition: (x, z) => {
              updateGrillTilePosition(x, z);
            },
          });
        }

        // Register cashier stall
        if (window.gameConfig.cashierStall && !window.gameConfig.cashierStall.deleted) {
          editableObjects.push({
            mesh: cashierStallMesh,
            type: 'cashierStall',
            configKey: 'cashierStall',
            name: 'Cashier Counter',
            getData: () => ({

      function updateMoneyZonePosition(x, z) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.moneyZone;

        moneyZoneMesh.position.x = x;
        moneyZoneMesh.position.z = z;
        moneyZoneGlow.position.x = x;
        moneyZoneGlow.position.z = z;

        // Move border
        const border = moneyZoneMesh.userData.borderMesh;
        if (border) {
          border.position.x = x;
          border.position.z = z;
        }

        // Move coin indicator
        const sign = moneyZoneMesh.userData.signIndicator;
        if (sign) {
          sign.position.x = x;
          sign.position.z = z;
        }

        window.gameConfig.moneyZone.x = x;
        window.gameConfig.moneyZone.z = z;
      }

      function updateSpendZonePosition(x, z) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.spendZone;

        spendZoneMesh.position.x = x;
        spendZoneMesh.position.z = z;
        spendZoneGlow.position.x = x;
        spendZoneGlow.position.z = z;

        // Move border
        const border = spendZoneMesh.userData.borderMesh;
        if (border) {
          border.position.x = x;
          border.position.z = z;
        }

        // Move gem indicator
        const gem = spendZoneMesh.userData.gemIndicator;
        if (gem) {
          gem.position.x = x;
          gem.position.z = z;
        }

        // Move number indicator
        const number = spendZoneMesh.userData.numberIndicator;
        if (number) {
          number.position.x = x;
          number.position.z = z + config.depth / 2 - 0.5;
        }

        window.gameConfig.spendZone.x = x;
        window.gameConfig.spendZone.z = z;
      }

      function updateTrashBinPosition(x, z) {
        if (!trashBinMesh) return;

        trashBinMesh.position.x = x;
        trashBinMesh.position.z = z;

        if (trashBinGlow) {
          trashBinGlow.position.x = x;
          trashBinGlow.position.z = z;
        }

        // Move trash icon
        const trashIcon = trashBinMesh.userData.trashIcon;

      function updateBankVaultPosition(x, z) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.bankVault;
        if (!config || !bankVaultMesh) return;

        bankVaultMesh.position.x = x;
        bankVaultMesh.position.z = z;

        if (bankVaultGlow) {
          bankVaultGlow.position.x = x;
          bankVaultGlow.position.z = z + config.depth / 2 + 1.5;
        }

        // Move vault icon
        const vaultIcon = bankVaultMesh.userData.vaultIcon;
        if (vaultIcon) {
          vaultIcon.position.x = x;
          vaultIcon.position.z = z;
        }

        config.x = x;
        config.z = z;
      }

      function updateDriveThruBoothPosition(x, z) {
        const config = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
        if (!config || !driveThruBoothMesh) return;

        driveThruBoothMesh.position.set(config.x, 2, config.z);

        if (driveThruBoothGlow) {
          const depositZoneX = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 3;
          driveThruBoothGlow.position.x = depositZoneX;
          driveThruBoothGlow.position.z = z;
        }

        // Move inside counter
        const insideCounter = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.insideCounter;
        if (insideCounter) {
          const depositZoneX = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 3;
          insideCounter.position.x = depositZoneX;
          insideCounter.position.z = z;
        }

        // Move roof
        const roof = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.roof;
        if (roof) {
          roof.position.x = x;
          roof.position.z = z;
          roof.position.y = 4.15;
        }

        // Move window
        const serviceWindow = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.window;
        if (serviceWindow) {
          serviceWindow.position.x = x;
          serviceWindow.position.z = z + config.depth / 2 + 0.15;
          serviceWindow.position.y = 2.2;
        }

        // Move counter
        const counter = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.counter;
        if (counter) {
          counter.position.x = x;
          counter.position.z = z + config.depth / 2 + 0.5;
          counter.position.y = 1.2;
        }

        // Move sign
        const sign = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.sign;
        if (sign) {
          sign.position.x = x;
          sign.position.z = z;
          sign.position.y = 5.2;
        }

        // Move car icon
        const carIcon = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.carIcon;
        if (carIcon) {
          carIcon.position.x = x;
          carIcon.position.z = z + 0.15;
          carIcon.position.y = 5.2;
        }

        // Move speaker
        const speaker = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.speaker;
        if (speaker) {
          speaker.position.x = x - config.width / 2 - 3;
          speaker.position.z = z + 5;
        }

        // Move road
        const road = driveThruBoothMesh.userData.road;
        if (road) {
          road.position.x = x;
          road.position.z = 0;
          // Road stays centered along Z
        }

        // Move cash pile (inside restaurant)
        const newCashPileX = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 6;
        const newCashPileZ = z + 4;
        if (driveThruCashPileMesh) {
          driveThruCashPileMesh.position.x = newCashPileX;
          driveThruCashPileMesh.position.z = newCashPileZ;
        }
        if (driveThruCashPileGlow) {
          driveThruCashPileGlow.position.x = newCashPileX;
          driveThruCashPileGlow.position.z = newCashPileZ;
        }
        const cashBorder = driveThruCashPileMesh?.userData?.borderMesh;
        if (cashBorder) {
          cashBorder.position.x = newCashPileX;
          cashBorder.position.z = newCashPileZ;
        }

        // Update stored positions
        driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileX = newCashPileX;
        driveThruBoothMesh.userData.cashPileZ = newCashPileZ;

        window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth.x = x;
        window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth.z = z;

        if (hiredDriveThruStaffMesh) {
           const pos = window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth;
           hiredDriveThruStaffMesh.position.set(x, 0, z + pos.depth / 2 - 1.5);
        }
      }

      function deleteTrashTile() {
        if (window.gameConfig.trashTile) window.gameConfig.trashTile.deleted = true;
        if (trashTileMesh) {
          scene.remove(trashTileMesh);
          ['borderMesh', 'icon', 'progressBg', 'progressFill', 'costPlane'].forEach((key) => {
            const obj = trashTileMesh.userData[key];
            if (obj) scene.remove(obj);
          });
        }
        if (trashTileGlow) scene.remove(trashTileGlow);
        const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex((obj) => obj.type === 'trashTile');
        if (editIndex > -1) editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        trashTileMesh = null;
        trashTileGlow = null;
        deselectObject();
      }

      function createTrashTile() {
        const config = window.gameConfig.trashTile;
        if (!config || config.deleted || config.unlocked) return;

        const result = createBaseTile(config);
        trashTileMesh = result.tileMesh;
        trashTileGlow = result.glowMesh;

        createTileCostDisplay(trashTileMesh, config);
        updateTrashTileProgress();
        updateTrashTileCostDisplay();
      }

      function updateTrashTile(deltaTime) {
        if (gameMode === 'edit') return;
        const config = window.gameConfig.trashTile;
        if (!config || config.deleted || config.unlocked || !trashTileMesh) return;
        const inZone = isPlayerInZone(config);
        const moneyValue = window.gameConfig.settings.paperMoneyValue || 10;
        const totalDeposited = config.moneyDeposited + (config.moneyInFlight || 0);
        if (inZone && vaultBalance > 0 && totalDeposited < config.cost) {
          trashTileDepositTimer += deltaTime;
          if (trashTileDepositTimer >= STAFF_HIRE_DEPOSIT_DELAY) {
            trashTileDepositTimer = 0;
            const depositAmount = getDepositAmount(config.cost, moneyValue, totalDeposited);
            if (depositAmount > 0) {
              modifyVaultBalance(-depositAmount);
              config.moneyInFlight = (config.moneyInFlight || 0) + depositAmount;
              const startPos = {
                x: player.position.x,
                y: player.position.y + PLAYER_HEIGHT + playerStack.length * STACK_ITEM_HEIGHT,
                z: player.position.z,
              };
              createFlyingItem(
                startPos,
                {
                  x: config.x,
                  y: 0.5,
                  z: config.z,
                },
                'money',
                () => {
                  config.moneyInFlight = Math.max(0, (config.moneyInFlight || 0) - depositAmount);
                  if (config.unlocked) return;
                  config.moneyDeposited += depositAmount;
                  window.gameConfig.trashTile.moneyDeposited = config.moneyDeposited;
                  playSound('collect_sound');
                  updateTrashTileProgress();
                  updateTrashTileCostDisplay();
                  if (config.moneyDeposited >= config.cost) {
                    config.unlocked = true;
                    window.gameConfig.trashTile.unlocked = true;
                    playSound('upgrade_sound');
                    createSmokeParticlesAt(config.x, 0.5, config.z);
                    destroyTrashTileVisuals();
                    createTrashBin();
                    resetTileProgress(trashTileMesh);
                  }
                },
                true
              );
            }
          }
        } else {
          trashTileDepositTimer = 0;
        }
        if (trashTileGlow) {
          const pulseScale = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.004) * 0.05;
          trashTileGlow.scale.set(pulseScale, 1, pulseScale);
        }
        const icon = trashTileMesh?.userData?.icon;
        if (icon) {
          icon.position.y = icon.userData.baseY + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.1;
        }
      }

      function deleteSelfOrderKiosk(editable) {
        // Find kiosk ID from editable object or use selected
        const kioskId = editable?.kioskId;

        if (kioskId !== undefined) {
          const kiosk = selfOrderKiosks.find((k) => k.id === kioskId);
          if (kiosk) {
            // Mark as deleted in config
            if (kiosk.config) kiosk.config.deleted = true;

            // Remove mesh
            if (kiosk.mesh) {
              scene.remove(kiosk.mesh);
              kiosk.mesh.traverse((child) => {
                if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
                if (child.material) {
                  if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
                  else child.material.dispose();
                }
              });
            }
            if (kiosk.glow) scene.remove(kiosk.glow);

            // Clear queue
            kiosk.queue.forEach((c) => scene.remove(c.mesh));
            kiosk.queue = [];
            kiosk.leavers.forEach((c) => scene.remove(c.mesh));
            kiosk.leavers = [];

            kiosk.mesh = null;
            kiosk.glow = null;
          }
        }

        // Remove from editable objects
        if (editable) {
          const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex((obj) => obj.configKey === editable.configKey);
          if (editIndex > -1) editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }
        deselectObject();
      }
