      function setupEditorInput() {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('game-canvas');

        // Mouse events
        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', onEditorPointerDown);
        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', onEditorPointerMove);
        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', onEditorPointerUp);

        // Right-click context menu prevention (for camera pan)
        canvas.addEventListener('contextmenu', (e) => {
          if (gameMode === 'edit') {
            e.preventDefault();
          }
        });

        // Touch events
        canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', onEditorTouchStart, {
          passive: false,
        });
        canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', onEditorTouchMove, {
          passive: false,
        });
        canvas.addEventListener('touchend', onEditorTouchEnd);
      }

      function getPointerPosition(event) {
        const canvas = document.getElementById('game-canvas');
        const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect();

        let clientX, clientY;
        if (event.touches) {
          clientX = event.touches[0].clientX;
          clientY = event.touches[0].clientY;
        } else {
          clientX = event.clientX;
          clientY = event.clientY;
        }

        return {
          x: ((clientX - rect.left) / rect.width) * 2 - 1,
          y: -((clientY - rect.top) / rect.height) * 2 + 1,
        };
      }

      function getWorldPosition(pointerPos) {
        raycaster.setFromCamera(new THREE.Vector2(pointerPos.x, pointerPos.y), camera);

        // Create a plane at y=0 to intersect with
        const plane = new THREE.Plane(new THREE.Vector3(0, 1, 0), 0);
        const intersection = new THREE.Vector3();
        raycaster.ray.intersectPlane(plane, intersection);

        return intersection;
      }

      function onEditorPointerDown(event) {
        if (gameMode !== 'edit') return;

        // Right-click starts camera panning
        if (event.button === 2) {
          editorIsPanning = true;
          editorPanStart = {
            x: event.clientX,
            y: event.clientY,
          };
          editorCameraStart = {
            x: editorCameraOffset.x,
            z: editorCameraOffset.z,
          };
          return;
        }

        // Left-click for object selection/dragging
        if (event.button !== 0) return;

        const pointerPos = getPointerPosition(event);
        raycaster.setFromCamera(new THREE.Vector2(pointerPos.x, pointerPos.y), camera);

        // Get all meshes from editable objects
        const meshes = editableObjects.map((obj) => obj.mesh);
        const intersects = raycaster.intersectObjects(meshes, true);

        if (intersects.length > 0) {
          // Find which editable object was clicked
          let clickedObject = intersects[0].object;

          // Traverse up to find the root editable object
          while (
            clickedObject.parent &&
            !editableObjects.find((obj) => obj.mesh === clickedObject)
          ) {
            clickedObject = clickedObject.parent;
          }

          const editable = editableObjects.find((obj) => obj.mesh === clickedObject);
          if (editable) {
            selectObject(editable);

            // Start dragging
            editorIsDragging = true;
            const worldPos = getWorldPosition(pointerPos);
            editorDragStart = {
              x: worldPos.x,
              z: worldPos.z,
            };
            editorObjectStart = editable.getData();
            // If rotation buttons exist, ensure they are visible for this selection
            const rotLbtn = document.getElementById('rotate-left-btn');
            const rotRbtn = document.getElementById('rotate-right-btn');
            if (rotLbtn && rotRbtn && editable.type !== 'player') {
              rotLbtn.classList.remove('hidden');
              rotRbtn.classList.remove('hidden');
            }
          }
        } else {
          // Clicked on empty space - deselect
          deselectObject();
        }
      }

      function onEditorPointerMove(event) {
        if (gameMode !== 'edit') return;

        // Handle camera panning with right-drag
        if (editorIsPanning) {
          const dx = event.clientX - editorPanStart.x;
          const dy = event.clientY - editorPanStart.y;

          // Convert screen delta to world delta (scale based on camera distance)
          const panSpeed = 0.05;
          editorCameraOffset.x = editorCameraStart.x - dx * panSpeed;
          editorCameraOffset.z = editorCameraStart.z - dy * panSpeed;

          // Clamp camera offset to rectangular restaurant bounds
          const maxOffsetX = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2;
          const maxOffsetZ = RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2;
          editorCameraOffset.x = Math.max(-maxOffsetX, Math.min(maxOffsetX, editorCameraOffset.x));
          editorCameraOffset.z = Math.max(-maxOffsetZ, Math.min(maxOffsetZ, editorCameraOffset.z));
          return;
        }

        // Handle object dragging
        if (!editorIsDragging || !editorSelectedObject) return;

        const pointerPos = getPointerPosition(event);
        const worldPos = getWorldPosition(pointerPos);

        // Calculate new position
        const dx = worldPos.x - editorDragStart.x;
        const dz = worldPos.z - editorDragStart.z;

        let newX = editorObjectStart.x + dx;
        let newZ = editorObjectStart.z + dz;

        // Apply grid snapping (1 unit grid)
        const gridSize = 1;
        newX = Math.round(newX / gridSize) * gridSize;
        newZ = Math.round(newZ / gridSize) * gridSize;

        // Clamp to rectangular restaurant bounds
        const halfWidth = RESTAURANT_WIDTH / 2 - 2;
        const halfDepth = RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2 - 2;
        newX = Math.max(-halfWidth, Math.min(halfWidth, newX));
        newZ = Math.max(-halfDepth, Math.min(halfDepth, newZ));

        // Update position
        editorSelectedObject.setPosition(newX, newZ);
        updateSelectionHighlight();
      }

      function onEditorPointerUp(event) {
        editorIsDragging = false;
        editorIsPanning = false;
      }

      function onEditorTouchStart(event) {
        if (gameMode !== 'edit') return;
        event.preventDefault();
        onEditorPointerDown(event);
      }

      function onEditorTouchMove(event) {
        if (gameMode !== 'edit') return;
        event.preventDefault();
        onEditorPointerMove(event);
      }

      function onEditorTouchEnd(event) {
        onEditorPointerUp(event);
      }

      function selectObject(editable) {
        editorSelectedObject = editable;
        updateSelectionHighlight();
        showSelectionInfo(editable);
        openEditMenu(editable);
      }

      function deselectObject() {
        editorSelectedObject = null;
        if (selectionHighlight) {
          selectionHighlight.visible = false;
        }
        hideSelectionInfo();
        lib.editMenu.close();
      }

      function formatTimeAway(seconds) {
        const hours = Math.floor(seconds / 3600);
        const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60);

        if (hours > 0 && minutes > 0) {
          return `${hours} hour${hours > 1 ? 's' : ''} ${minutes} minute${minutes > 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
        } else if (hours > 0) {
          return `${hours} hour${hours > 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
        } else if (minutes > 0) {
          return `${minutes} minute${minutes > 1 ? 's' : ''}`;
        } else {
          return 'a few moments';
        }
      }

      function showOfflineEarningsPopup(timeAway, earnings) {
        const notification = document.getElementById('offline-earnings-notification');
        const timeAwayEl = document.getElementById('offline-time-away');
        const earningsAmountEl = document.getElementById('offline-earnings-amount');
        const collectBtn = document.getElementById('collect-offline-btn');

        if (!notification || !timeAwayEl || !earningsAmountEl || !collectBtn) return;

        const awayText = t('offline.timeAway', { time: formatTimeAway(timeAway) });
        const earningsText = t('offline.earnings', { amount: formatCurrencyAbbrev(earnings) });

        // Format and set content - earnings go to vault
        timeAwayEl.textContent = awayText;
        earningsAmountEl.textContent = earningsText;

        // Show notification
        notification.classList.add('show');
        playSound('sell_sound');

        // Setup collect button (just closes popup, money already in vault)
        const handleCollect = () => {
          notification.classList.remove('show');
          playSound('upgrade_sound');
          updateVaultUI();
          collectBtn.removeEventListener('click', handleCollect);
        };
        collectBtn.addEventListener('click', handleCollect);
      }

      function calculateAndAwardOfflineEarnings(savedState) {
        const now = Date.now();
        const lastPlayed = savedState.lastPlayedTime;

        // Calculate elapsed time in seconds
        let elapsedSeconds = (now - lastPlayed) / 1000;

        // Cap at 8 hours (28800 seconds)
        const maxOfflineTime = 8 * 60 * 60;
        elapsedSeconds = Math.min(elapsedSeconds, maxOfflineTime);

        // Only award if away for more than 5 minutes
        if (elapsedSeconds < 300) return;

        // Check if any staff is hired
        const hasCashierStaff = savedState.staffHireTile && savedState.staffHireTile.staffHired;
        const hasCleanerStaff =
          savedState.cleanerStaffTile && savedState.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired;
        const hasRunnerStaff = savedState.runnerStaffTile && savedState.runnerStaffTile.staffHired;

        if (!hasCashierStaff && !hasCleanerStaff && !hasRunnerStaff) {
          return;
          // No staff, no offline earnings
        }

        // Calculate earnings
        let earningsPerSecond = 0;

        // Base rate when cashier is hired: ~$17/second (50% of normal $33/second rate)
        // This is based on: 1 customer every 3 seconds, ~$100 per burger, with 50% offline efficiency
        if (hasCashierStaff) {
          const burgerPrice = window.gameConfig.resources.itemValue || 100;
          const offlineEfficiency = 0.5;
          // 50% of normal rate
          const customersPerSecond = 1 / 3;
          // 1 customer every 3 seconds
          earningsPerSecond += burgerPrice * customersPerSecond * offlineEfficiency;
        }

        // Bonus for having runner (helps collect burgers faster)
        if (hasRunnerStaff) {
          earningsPerSecond *= 1.2;
          // 20% boost
        }

        // Bonus for having cleaner (keeps tables clean for more customers)
        if (hasCleanerStaff) {
          earningsPerSecond *= 1.1;
          // 10% boost
        }

        // Apply vault offline earnings boost (25% per level)
        const vaultUpgrades = savedState.vaultUpgrades || window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades || {};
        const offlineEarningsBoost = 1 + (vaultUpgrades.earnings || 0) * 0.25;

        // Apply prestige multiplier
        const prestige = savedState.prestige ||
          window.gameConfig.prestige || {
            level: 0,
            profitBonus: 0.1,
          };
        const prestigeBoost = 1 + prestige.level * (prestige.profitBonus || 0.1);

        earningsPerSecond *= offlineEarningsBoost * prestigeBoost;

        const totalEarnings = earningsPerSecond * elapsedSeconds;

        // Award earnings TO VAULT instead of currency
        if (totalEarnings > 0) {
          // Add to vault balance
          modifyVaultBalance(totalEarnings);

          // Show popup
          showOfflineEarningsPopup(elapsedSeconds, totalEarnings);
        }
      }

      function updateSelectionHighlight() {
        if (!editorSelectedObject || !selectionHighlight) return;

        const pos = editorSelectedObject.getData();
        selectionHighlight.position.x = pos.x;
        selectionHighlight.position.z = pos.z;
        selectionHighlight.visible = true;

        // Adjust size based on object type
        let size = 2;
        if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'sellZone') {
          size = window.gameConfig.sellZone.radius + 1;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'moneyZone') {
          size =
            Math.max(window.gameConfig.moneyZone.width, window.gameConfig.moneyZone.depth) / 2 + 1;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'spendZone') {
          size =
            Math.max(window.gameConfig.spendZone.width, window.gameConfig.spendZone.depth) / 2 + 1;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'cashierStall') {
          size =
            Math.max(window.gameConfig.cashierStall.width, window.gameConfig.cashierStall.depth) /
              2 +
            1;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'staffHireTile') {
          size =
            Math.max(window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.width, window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.depth) /
              2 +
            1;
        } else if (
          editorSelectedObject.type === 'cleanerStaffTile' &&
          window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile
        ) {
          size =
            Math.max(
              window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.width,
              window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.depth
            ) /
              2 +
            1;
        } else if (
          editorSelectedObject.type === 'runnerStaffTile' &&
          window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile
        ) {
          size =
            Math.max(
              window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.width,
              window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.depth
            ) /
              2 +
            1;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'trashBin') {
          size = window.gameConfig.trashBin.radius + 0.5;
        } else if (
          editorSelectedObject.type === 'driveThruBooth' &&
          window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth
        ) {
          size =
            Math.max(
              window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth.width,
              window.gameConfig.driveThruBooth.depth
            ) /
              2 +
            2;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'diningTableTile') {
          size =
            Math.max(
              window.gameConfig.diningTableTile.width,
              window.gameConfig.diningTableTile.depth
            ) /
              2 +
            1;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'diningTable') {
          size = 2.5;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'bankVault' && window.gameConfig.bankVault) {
          size =
            Math.max(window.gameConfig.bankVault.width, window.gameConfig.bankVault.depth) / 2 +
            1.5;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'fountainTile' && window.gameConfig.fountainTile) {
          size =
            Math.max(window.gameConfig.fountainTile.width, window.gameConfig.fountainTile.depth) /
              2 +
            1;
        } else if (
          editorSelectedObject.type === 'fountain2Tile' &&
          window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile
        ) {
          size =
            Math.max(window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile.width, window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile.depth) /
              2 +
            1;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'fountain' && window.gameConfig.fountain) {
          size = window.gameConfig.fountain.radius + 1.5;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'fountain2' && window.gameConfig.fountain2) {
          size = window.gameConfig.fountain2.radius + 1.5;
        } else if (
          editorSelectedObject.type === 'selfOrderKioskTile' &&
          window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile
        ) {
          size =
            Math.max(
              window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile.width,
              window.gameConfig.selfOrderKioskTile.depth
            ) /
              2 +
            1;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'grill') {
          size = 2;
        } else if (editorSelectedObject.type === 'player') {
          size = 1.5;
        }

        selectionHighlight.scale.setScalar(size / 1.5);
      }

      function updateEditorSelection(deltaTime) {
        if (!selectionHighlight || !selectionHighlight.visible) return;

        // Pulse animation
        const pulse = 1 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.005) * 0.1;
        const baseScale = selectionHighlight.scale.x;
        selectionHighlight.material.opacity = 0.5 + Math.sin(Date.now() * 0.003) * 0.3;
      }

      function showSelectionInfo(editable) {
        const infoEl = document.getElementById('selection-info');
        const nameEl = document.getElementById('selection-name');
        const deleteBtn = document.getElementById('delete-selected-btn');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-selected-btn');
        const rotL = document.getElementById('rotate-left-btn');
        const rotR = document.getElementById('rotate-right-btn');

        nameEl.textContent = editable.name;
        infoEl.classList.remove('hidden');

        // Show delete/copy buttons for all deletable objects (everything except player)
        if (editable.type !== 'player') {
          deleteBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
          copyBtn.classList.remove('hidden');
        } else {
          deleteBtn.classList.add('hidden');
          copyBtn.classList.add('hidden');
        }

        // Show rotate controls for editable objects (not the player)
        if (rotL && rotR) {
          if (editable.type !== 'player') {
            rotL.classList.remove('hidden');
            rotR.classList.remove('hidden');
          } else {
            rotL.classList.add('hidden');
            rotR.classList.add('hidden');
          }
        }
      }

      function hideSelectionInfo() {
        const infoEl = document.getElementById('selection-info');
        const deleteBtn = document.getElementById('delete-selected-btn');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-selected-btn');
        const rotL = document.getElementById('rotate-left-btn');
        const rotR = document.getElementById('rotate-right-btn');

        infoEl.classList.add('hidden');
        deleteBtn.classList.add('hidden');
        copyBtn.classList.add('hidden');
        if (rotL) rotL.classList.add('hidden');
        if (rotR) rotR.classList.add('hidden');
      }

            },
          };
        } else if (editable.type === 'diningTable') {
          // Dining tables don't have many editable properties, just position
        } else if (editable.type === 'bankVault') {
          params['Width'] = {
            key: 'gameConfig.bankVault.width',
            type: 'slider',
            min: 4,
            max: 10,
            step: 1,
            onChange: (value) => {
              window.gameConfig.bankVault.width = value;
              // Would need rebuild but keeping simple for now
            },
          };
          params['Depth'] = {
            key: 'gameConfig.bankVault.depth',
            type: 'slider',
            min: 3,
            max: 8,
            step: 1,
            onChange: (value) => {
              window.gameConfig.bankVault.depth = value;
            },
          };
        }

        const menuOptions = {
          name: editable.name,
          params: params,
        };

        // Add copy/delete for grills
        if (editable.type === 'grill') {
          menuOptions.onCopy = () => duplicateGrill(editable);
          menuOptions.onDelete = () => deleteGrill(editable);
        }

        lib.editMenu.open(menuOptions);
      }

        if (selectSelfOrderBtn) {

            if (selfOrderEditable) {
              selectObject(selfOrderEditable);
            }
          });
        }

        const selectCashierBtn = document.getElementById('select-cashier-btn');
        if (selectCashierBtn) {
          selectCashierBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {

            if (cashierEditable) {
              selectObject(cashierEditable);

        const selectStaffTileBtn = document.getElementById('select-staff-tile-btn');

            // Focus on staff hire tile
            const staffTileEditable = editableObjects.find((obj) => obj.type === 'staffHireTile');
            if (staffTileEditable) {
              selectObject(staffTileEditable);
            }

        const selectDiningTileBtn = document.getElementById('select-dining-tile-btn');
        if (selectDiningTileBtn) {
          selectDiningTileBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            // First check if there's any active tile to focus on
            const activeTile = editableObjects.find((obj) => obj.type === 'diningTableTile');
            if (activeTile) {
              selectObject(activeTile);
            } else {
              // If no active tile exists, create a new one
              addNewDiningTableTile();
            }
          });
        }

        const selectTrashBinBtn = document.getElementById('select-trash-bin-btn');
        if (selectTrashBinBtn) {

            const trashBinEditable = editableObjects.find((obj) => obj.type === 'trashBin');
            if (trashBinEditable) {

            }
          });
        }

        // Cleaner staff tile button
        const selectCleanerTileBtn = document.getElementById('select-cleaner-tile-btn');
        if (selectCleanerTileBtn) {
          selectCleanerTileBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const cleanerTileEditable = editableObjects.find(
              (obj) => obj.type === 'cleanerStaffTile'
            );
            if (cleanerTileEditable) {
              selectObject(cleanerTileEditable);
            }
          });
        }

        // Runner staff tile button
        const selectRunnerTileBtn = document.getElementById('select-runner-tile-btn');
        if (selectRunnerTileBtn) {
          selectRunnerTileBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const runnerTileEditable = editableObjects.find(
              (obj) => obj.type === 'runnerStaffTile'
            );
            if (runnerTileEditable) {

            }
          });

        // Drive-thru booth button

            if (driveThruEditable) {
              selectObject(driveThruEditable);
            }
          });

        // Bank vault button
        const selectVaultBtn = document.getElementById('select-vault-btn');
        if (selectVaultBtn) {
          selectVaultBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const vaultEditable = editableObjects.find((obj) => obj.type === 'bankVault');
            if (vaultEditable) {
              selectObject(vaultEditable);
            }
          });
        }

        // Vault staff tile button
        const selectVaultStaffBtn = document.getElementById('select-vault-staff-btn');
        if (selectVaultStaffBtn) {
          selectVaultStaffBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const vaultStaffEditable = editableObjects.find((obj) => obj.type === 'vaultStaffTile');
            if (vaultStaffEditable) {
              selectObject(vaultStaffEditable);
            }
          });
        }

        // Prestige Layouts UI
        let currentEditPrestigeLevel = 1;
        const layoutLevelDisplay = document.getElementById('layout-level-display');
        const prevLayoutBtn = document.getElementById('prev-layout-btn');
        const nextLayoutBtn = document.getElementById('next-layout-btn');
        const saveLayoutBtn = document.getElementById('save-layout-btn');
        const loadLayoutBtn = document.getElementById('load-layout-btn');

        function updateLayoutDisplay() {
          if (layoutLevelDisplay)
            layoutLevelDisplay.textContent = `Lvl ${currentEditPrestigeLevel}`;
        }

        if (prevLayoutBtn) {
          prevLayoutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (currentEditPrestigeLevel > 1) {
              currentEditPrestigeLevel--;
              updateLayoutDisplay();
            }
          });
        }

        if (nextLayoutBtn) {
          nextLayoutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            currentEditPrestigeLevel++;
            updateLayoutDisplay();
          });
        }

        if (saveLayoutBtn) {
          saveLayoutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const currentLayouts = window.gameConfig.prestigeLayouts
              ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.prestigeLayouts))
              : [];

            // Collect current layout data
            const layoutData = {
              level: currentEditPrestigeLevel,
              grills: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.grills || [])),
              cashierStall: JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.cashierStall || {})),
              cashierTile: window.gameConfig.cashierTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.cashierTile))
                : null,
              grillTile: window.gameConfig.grillTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.grillTile))
                : null,
              staffHireTile: window.gameConfig.staffHireTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.staffHireTile))
                : null,
              cleanerStaffTile: window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile))
                : null,
              runnerStaffTile: window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile))
                : null,
              vaultStaffTile: window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile))
                : null,
              diningTableTiles: window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles))
                : null,
              trashBin: window.gameConfig.trashBin
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.trashBin))
                : null,
              vaultTile: window.gameConfig.vaultTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.vaultTile))
                : null,
              fountainTile: window.gameConfig.fountainTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.fountainTile))
                : null,
bankVault: window.gameConfig.bankVault
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.bankVault))
                : null,
              fountain: window.gameConfig.fountain
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.fountain))
                : null,
              selfOrderKiosks: window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks))
                : null,
              driveThruTile: window.gameConfig.driveThruTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.driveThruTile))
                : null,
              trashTile: window.gameConfig.trashTile
                ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(window.gameConfig.trashTile))
                : null,
            };

            // Update or add
            const existingIndex = currentLayouts.findIndex(
              (l) => l.level === currentEditPrestigeLevel
            );
            if (existingIndex >= 0) {
              currentLayouts[existingIndex] = layoutData;
            } else {
              currentLayouts.push(layoutData);
            }

            window.gameConfig.prestigeLayouts = currentLayouts;

            lib.log(`Saved Prestige Level ${currentEditPrestigeLevel} Layout`);

            // Show visual feedback on button
            const originalText = saveLayoutBtn.innerHTML;
            saveLayoutBtn.innerHTML =
              '<span class="btn-icon">✅</span><span class="btn-label">Saved!</span>';
            setTimeout(() => {
              saveLayoutBtn.innerHTML = originalText;
            }, 1500);
          });
        }

        if (loadLayoutBtn) {
          loadLayoutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const layouts = window.gameConfig.prestigeLayouts || [];
            const layoutData = layouts.find((l) => l.level === currentEditPrestigeLevel);

            if (layoutData) {
              applyPrestigeLayout(layoutData);
              registerEditableObjects();
              lib.log(`Loaded Prestige Level ${currentEditPrestigeLevel} Layout`);
            } else {
              lib.log(`No saved layout for Prestige Level ${currentEditPrestigeLevel}`);
            }
          });
        }

        if (deselectBtn) {
          deselectBtn.addEventListener('click', () => deselectObject());
        }

        // Delete selected object button
        if (deleteBtn) {
          deleteBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (editorSelectedObject) {
              deleteSelectedObject(editorSelectedObject);
            }
          });
        }

        // Copy/duplicate selected object button
        if (copyBtn) {
          copyBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (editorSelectedObject) {
              duplicateSelectedObject(editorSelectedObject);
            }
          });
        }
      }

      function deleteSelectedObject(editable) {
        switch (editable.type) {
          case 'grill':
            deleteGrill(editable);
            break;
          case 'sellZone':
            deleteSellZone();
            break;
          case 'moneyZone':
            deleteMoneyZone();
            break;
          case 'spendZone':
            deleteSpendZone();
            break;
          case 'cashierStall':
            deleteCashierStall();
            break;
          case 'staffHireTile':
            deleteStaffHireTile();
            break;
          case 'cleanerStaffTile':
            deleteCleanerStaffTile();
            break;
          case 'runnerStaffTile':
            deleteRunnerStaffTile();
            break;
          case 'vaultStaffTile':
            deleteVaultStaffTile();
            break;
          case 'trashBin':
            deleteTrashBin();
            break;
          case 'driveThruBooth':
            deleteDriveThruBooth();
            break;
          case 'diningTableTile':
            deleteDiningTableTile();
            break;
          case 'driveThruTile':
            deleteDriveThruTile();
            break;
          case 'trashTile':
            deleteTrashTile();
            break;
          case 'vaultTile':
            deleteVaultTile();
            break;
          case 'fountainTile':
            deleteFountainTile();
            break;
          case 'fountain2Tile':
            deleteFountain2Tile();
            break;
          case 'fountain':
            deleteFountain();
            break;
          case 'fountain2':
            deleteFountain2();
            break;
          case 'selfOrderKioskTile':
            deleteSelfOrderKioskTile();
            break;
case 'selfOrderKiosk':
            deleteSelfOrderKiosk(editable);
            break;
          case 'diningTable':
            deleteDiningTable(editable);
            break;
          default:
            lib.log('Cannot delete this object type');
        }
      }

      function duplicateSelectedObject(editable) {
        switch (editable.type) {
          case 'grill':
            duplicateGrill(editable);
            break;
          case 'sellZone':
            duplicateSellZone(editable);
            break;
          case 'moneyZone':
            duplicateMoneyZone(editable);
            break;
          case 'spendZone':
            duplicateSpendZone(editable);
            break;
          case 'cashierStall':
            duplicateCashierStall(editable);
            break;
          case 'staffHireTile':
            duplicateStaffHireTile(editable);
            break;
          case 'cleanerStaffTile':
            duplicateCleanerStaffTile(editable);
            break;
          case 'runnerStaffTile':
            duplicateRunnerStaffTile(editable);
            break;
          case 'vaultStaffTile':
            duplicateVaultStaffTile(editable);
            break;
          case 'trashBin':
            duplicateTrashBin(editable);
            break;
          case 'driveThruBooth':
            duplicateDriveThruBooth(editable);
            break;
          case 'diningTableTile':
            duplicateDiningTableTile(editable);
            break;
          case 'driveThruTile':
            duplicateDriveThruTile(editable);
            break;
          case 'trashTile':
            duplicateTrashTile(editable);
            break;
          case 'vaultTile':
            duplicateVaultTile(editable);
            break;
          case 'selfOrderKioskTile':
            if (editable.configKey && String(editable.configKey).startsWith('selfOrderKioskTiles.')) {
              if (typeof duplicateSelfOrderKioskTiles === 'function') {
                duplicateSelfOrderKioskTiles(editable);
              }
            } else {
              duplicateSelfOrderKioskTile(editable);
            }
            break;
          case 'diningTable':
            duplicateDiningTable(editable);
            break;
        }
      }

      function deleteSellZone() {
        if (window.gameConfig.sellZone) window.gameConfig.sellZone.deleted = true;

        // Remove sell zone from scene
        scene.remove(sellZoneMesh);
        scene.remove(sellZoneGlow);

        const customer = sellZoneMesh.userData.coinIndicator;
        if (customer) scene.remove(customer);

        // Find and remove counter top
        scene.children.forEach((child) => {
          if (
            child.geometry &&
            child.geometry.type === 'CylinderGeometry' &&
            child.position.y === 0.35
          ) {
            scene.remove(child);
          }
        });

        // Remove from editableObjects
        const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex((obj) => obj.type === 'sellZone');
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }

        sellZoneMesh = null;
        sellZoneGlow = null;

        deselectObject();
      }

      function deleteMoneyZone() {
        if (window.gameConfig.moneyZone) window.gameConfig.moneyZone.deleted = true;

        scene.remove(moneyZoneMesh);
        scene.remove(moneyZoneGlow);

        const border = moneyZoneMesh.userData.borderMesh;
        if (border) scene.remove(border);

        const sign = moneyZoneMesh.userData.signIndicator;
        if (sign) scene.remove(sign);

        // Remove ground money items
        groundMoneyItems.forEach((item) => {
          scene.remove(item);
        });
        groundMoneyItems = [];

        const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex((obj) => obj.type === 'moneyZone');
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }

        moneyZoneMesh = null;
        moneyZoneGlow = null;

        deselectObject();
      }

      function deleteCashierStall() {
        if (window.gameConfig.cashierStall) window.gameConfig.cashierStall.deleted = true;

        scene.remove(cashierStallMesh);
        scene.remove(cashierStallGlow);
        scene.remove(cashierCashPileMesh);
        scene.remove(cashierCashPileGlow);

        const counterTop = cashierStallMesh.userData.counterTop;
        if (counterTop) scene.remove(counterTop);

        const register = cashierStallMesh.userData.register;
        if (register) scene.remove(register);

        const tray = cashierStallMesh.userData.tray;
        if (tray) scene.remove(tray);

        const menuBoard = cashierStallMesh.userData.menuBoard;
        if (menuBoard) scene.remove(menuBoard);

        const menuBurger = cashierStallMesh.userData.menuBurger;
        if (menuBurger) scene.remove(menuBurger);

        const dollarIcon = cashierCashPileMesh?.userData?.dollarIcon;
        if (dollarIcon) scene.remove(dollarIcon);

        const cashPileBorder = cashierCashPileMesh?.userData?.borderMesh;
        if (cashPileBorder) scene.remove(cashPileBorder);

        // Clear cashier state
        cashierBurgerStack.forEach((b) => scene.remove(b));
        cashierBurgerStack = [];
        cashierCashPile.forEach((m) => scene.remove(m));
        cashierCashPile = [];
        customerQueue.forEach((c) => scene.remove(c.mesh));
        customerQueue = [];

        const editIndex = editableObjects.findIndex((obj) => obj.type === 'cashierStall');
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }

        cashierStallMesh = null;
        cashierStallGlow = null;
        cashierCashPileMesh = null;
        cashierCashPileGlow = null;

        deselectObject();
      }

      function deleteDiningTable(editable) {
        const index = editable.tableIndex;
        const tableEntry = diningTableMeshes[index];

        if (!tableEntry) return;

        // Remove from scene
        scene.remove(tableEntry.mesh);
        scene.remove(tableEntry.trashMesh);

        tableEntry.mesh.traverse((child) => {
          if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
          if (child.material) {
            if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
            else child.material.dispose();
          }
        });
        tableEntry.trashMesh.traverse((child) => {
          if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
          if (child.material) {
            if (Array.isArray(child.material)) child.material.forEach((m) => m.dispose());
            else child.material.dispose();
          }
        });

        // Remove from arrays
        diningTableMeshes.splice(index, 1);
        window.gameConfig.diningTables.splice(index, 1);

        // Remove from editableObjects
        const editIndex = editableObjects.indexOf(editable);
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }

        // Update indices for remaining tables
        editableObjects.forEach((obj) => {
          if (obj.type === 'diningTable' && obj.tableIndex > index) {
            obj.tableIndex--;
            obj.name = `Dining Table ${obj.tableIndex + 1}`;
          }
        });

        deselectObject();
      }

      function addNewEquipment(equipmentType = 'grill') {
        // Find a position for the new equipment in the kitchen area (back of restaurant)
        const x = (Math.random() - 0.5) * (RESTAURANT_WIDTH - 10);
        const z = -RESTAURANT_DEPTH / 2 + 5 + Math.random() * 10;
        // Kitchen area at back

        // Add to config
        const equipmentId = `${equipmentType}_${nextGrillId++}`;
        window.gameConfig.grills.push({
          id: equipmentId,
          x,
          z,
          equipmentType: equipmentType,
        });

        // Create the equipment
        const index = resourceNodes.length;
        createResourceNodeAt(x, z, index, equipmentType);

        // Register as editable
        const node = resourceNodes[resourceNodes.length - 1];
        const typeName =
          equipmentType === 'drink_station'
            ? 'Drink Station'
            : equipmentType.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + equipmentType.slice(1);
        const newEditable = {
          mesh: node.group,
          type: 'grill',
          configKey: `grills.${index}`,
          grillIndex: index,
          grillId: equipmentId,
          name: `${typeName} ${index + 1}`,
          getData: () => ({
            x: node.position.x,
            z: node.position.z,
          }),
          setPosition: (newX, newZ) => {
            node.group.position.x = newX;
            node.group.position.z = newZ;
            node.position.x = newX;
            node.position.z = newZ;
            node.group.rotation.y = Math.atan2(-newX, -newZ);
            window.gameConfig.grills[index].x = newX;
            window.gameConfig.grills[index].z = newZ;
          },
        };
        editableObjects.push(newEditable);

        // Select the new equipment
        selectObject(newEditable);
      }

      function duplicateGrill(editable) {

      function deleteGrill(editable) {
        if (resourceNodes.length <= 1) {
          lib.log('Cannot delete the last grill!');
          return;
        }

        const index = editable.grillIndex;
        const node = resourceNodes[index];

        // Remove from scene
        scene.remove(node.group);
        node.group.traverse((child) => {
          if (child.geometry) child.geometry.dispose();
          if (child.material) {
            if (Array.isArray(child.material)) {
              child.material.forEach((mat) => mat.dispose());
            } else {
              child.material.dispose();
            }
          }
        });

        // Remove from arrays
        resourceNodes.splice(index, 1);
        window.gameConfig.grills.splice(index, 1);

        // Remove from editableObjects
        const editIndex = editableObjects.indexOf(editable);
        if (editIndex > -1) {
          editableObjects.splice(editIndex, 1);
        }

        // Update indices for remaining grills
        editableObjects.forEach((obj) => {
          if (obj.type === 'grill' && obj.grillIndex > index) {
            obj.grillIndex--;
            obj.name = `Grill ${obj.grillIndex + 1}`;
          }
        });

        // Deselect
        deselectObject();
      }

      function createResourceNodeAt(x, z, index, equipmentType = 'grill') {
        const node = {
          group: new THREE.Group(),
          position: {
            x,
            z,
          },
          isReady: true,
          regenTimer: 0,
          grillMesh: null,
          emptyMesh: null,
          equipmentType: equipmentType,
        };

        node.group.position.set(x, 0, z);

        // Create equipment based on type
        node.grillMesh = new THREE.Group();
        node.emptyMesh = new THREE.Group();

        if (equipmentType === 'grill') {
          createGrillEquipment(node);
        } else if (equipmentType === 'fryer') {
          createFryerEquipment(node);
        } else if (equipmentType === 'drink_station') {
          createDrinkStationEquipment(node);
        } else {
          // Default to grill
          createGrillEquipment(node);
        }

        node.emptyMesh.visible = false;
        node.group.add(node.grillMesh);
        node.group.add(node.emptyMesh);

        // Face forward (toward customers)
        // allow saved rotation on grills (degrees) or default to facing forward
        const grillCfg =
          (window.gameConfig && window.gameConfig.grills && window.gameConfig.grills[index]) ||
          null;
        const grillRot =
          (grillCfg && (grillCfg.rotation || grillCfg.rotationDeg || grillCfg.rotationY)) || 180;
        node.group.rotation.y = THREE.MathUtils.degToRad(grillRot);

        scene.add(node.group);
        resourceNodes.push(node);
      }

      function rebuildSellZone() {
        // Store references to cleanup
        const oldCustomer = sellZoneMesh.userData.coinIndicator;

        // Remove old meshes
        scene.remove(sellZoneMesh);
        scene.remove(sellZoneGlow);
        if (oldCustomer) scene.remove(oldCustomer);

        // Find and remove counter top
        scene.children.forEach((child) => {
          if (
            child.geometry &&
            child.geometry.type === 'CylinderGeometry' &&
            child.position.y === 0.35
          ) {
            scene.remove(child);
          }
        });

        // Recreate
        createSellZone();

        // Re-register editable
        const sellEditable = editableObjects.find((obj) => obj.type === 'sellZone');
        if (sellEditable) {
          sellEditable.mesh = sellZoneMesh;
        }

        updateSelectionHighlight();
      }

      function loadAssetImages() {
        // Load coin icon for UI
        const coinAsset = lib.getAsset('coin_icon');
        if (coinAsset && coinAsset.url) {
          document.getElementById('coin-icon').src = coinAsset.url;
          document.querySelectorAll('.cost-icon').forEach((el) => {
            el.src = coinAsset.url;
          });
        }
      }

      async function loadGameState() {
        try {
          const response = await lib.getUserGameState();
          if (response.state) {
            const savedState = response.state;

            // Restore currency
            if (savedState.currency !== undefined) {
              currentCurrency = savedState.currency;
              window.gameConfig.currency = savedState.currency;
            }

            // Restore staff hire states
            if (savedState.staffHireTile) {
              if (savedState.staffHireTile.staffHired !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.staffHired = savedState.staffHireTile.staffHired;
              }
              if (savedState.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired =
                  savedState.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired;
              }
              if (savedState.staffHireTile.staffHired) {
                createHiredStaffAtCashier();
                if (staffHireTileMesh && !window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.extraStaffHired) {
                  destroyStaffHireTileVisualsKeepConfig();
                }
              }
              if (savedState.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited =
                  savedState.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.cleanerStaffTile) {
              if (savedState.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired =
                  savedState.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired;
                if (savedState.cleanerStaffTile.staffHired) {
                  createHiredCleaner();
                  if (cleanerStaffTileMesh) {
                    destroyCleanerStaffTileVisuals();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.cleanerStaffTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.moneyDeposited =
                  savedState.cleanerStaffTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }
            if (savedState.runnerStaffTile) {
              if (savedState.runnerStaffTile.staffHired !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.staffHired =
                  savedState.runnerStaffTile.staffHired;
                if (savedState.runnerStaffTile.staffHired) {
                  createHiredRunner();
                  if (runnerStaffTileMesh) {
                    destroyRunnerStaffTileVisuals();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.runnerStaffTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.moneyDeposited =
                  savedState.runnerStaffTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }
            if (savedState.cashierTile) {
              if (savedState.cashierTile.unlocked !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.cashierTile.unlocked = savedState.cashierTile.unlocked;
                if (savedState.cashierTile.unlocked) {
                  if (cashierTileMesh) {
                    destroyCashierTileVisuals();
                    createCashierStall();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.cashierTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.cashierTile.moneyDeposited =
                  savedState.cashierTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.driveThruTile) {
              if (savedState.driveThruTile.unlocked !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.unlocked = savedState.driveThruTile.unlocked;
                if (savedState.driveThruTile.unlocked) {
                  if (driveThruTileMesh) {
                    destroyDriveThruTileVisuals();
                    createDriveThruBooth();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.driveThruTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.moneyDeposited =
                  savedState.driveThruTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }
            if (savedState.trashTile) {
              if (savedState.trashTile.unlocked !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.trashTile.unlocked = savedState.trashTile.unlocked;
                if (savedState.trashTile.unlocked) {
                  if (trashTileMesh) {
                    destroyTrashTileVisuals();
                    createTrashBin();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.trashTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.trashTile.moneyDeposited = savedState.trashTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.vaultTile) {
              if (savedState.vaultTile.unlocked !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.vaultTile.unlocked = savedState.vaultTile.unlocked;
                if (savedState.vaultTile.unlocked) {
                  if (vaultTileMesh) {
                    destroyVaultTileVisuals();
                    createBankVault();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.vaultTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.vaultTile.moneyDeposited = savedState.vaultTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.fountainTile) {
              if (savedState.fountainTile.unlocked !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.fountainTile.unlocked = savedState.fountainTile.unlocked;
                if (savedState.fountainTile.unlocked) {
                  if (fountainTileMesh) {
                    destroyFountainTileVisuals();
                    createFountain();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.fountainTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.fountainTile.moneyDeposited =
                  savedState.fountainTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.fountain2Tile) {
              if (savedState.fountain2Tile.unlocked !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile.unlocked = savedState.fountain2Tile.unlocked;
                if (savedState.fountain2Tile.unlocked) {
                  if (fountain2TileMesh) {
                    destroyFountain2TileVisuals();
                    createFountain2();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.fountain2Tile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile.moneyDeposited =
                  savedState.fountain2Tile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.grillTile) {
              if (savedState.grillTile.unlocked !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.grillTile.unlocked = savedState.grillTile.unlocked;
                if (savedState.grillTile.unlocked) {
                  if (grillTileMesh) {
                    destroyGrillTileVisuals();
                    const grillCount = window.gameConfig.grills.length;
                    for (let i = 0; i < grillCount; i++) {
                      createResourceNode(i, grillCount);
                    }
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.grillTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.grillTile.moneyDeposited = savedState.grillTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.vaultStaffTile) {
              if (savedState.vaultStaffTile.staffHired !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.staffHired = savedState.vaultStaffTile.staffHired;
                if (savedState.vaultStaffTile.staffHired) {
                  createHiredVaultCollector();
                  if (vaultStaffTileMesh) {
                    destroyVaultStaffTileVisuals();
                  }
                }
              }
              if (savedState.vaultStaffTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.moneyDeposited =
                  savedState.vaultStaffTile.moneyDeposited;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.driveThruStaffTile) {
               if (savedState.driveThruStaffTile.staffHired !== undefined) {
                  window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.staffHired = savedState.driveThruStaffTile.staffHired;
               }
               if (savedState.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff1Hired !== undefined) {
                  window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff1Hired = savedState.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff1Hired;
               }
               if (savedState.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff2Hired !== undefined) {
                  window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff2Hired = savedState.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff2Hired;
               }
               
               if (window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.staffHired || window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff1Hired || window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff2Hired) {
                  createHiredDriveThruStaff();
                  if (window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.extraStaff2Hired && driveThruStaffTileMesh) {
                     destroyTileVisuals(driveThruStaffTileMesh, driveThruStaffTileGlow);
                     driveThruStaffTileMesh = null;
                  }
               }
               if (savedState.driveThruStaffTile.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                  window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.moneyDeposited = savedState.driveThruStaffTile.moneyDeposited;
               }
            }

            // Restore dining tables
            if (savedState.diningTables && Array.isArray(savedState.diningTables)) {
              window.gameConfig.diningTables = savedState.diningTables;
              // Tables will be created in the main initialization
            }

            // Restore dining table tiles money deposited and deleted state
            if (savedState.diningTableTiles && Array.isArray(savedState.diningTableTiles)) {
              savedState.diningTableTiles.forEach((tileState, index) => {
                if (window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[index]) {
                  if (tileState.moneyDeposited !== undefined) {
                    window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[index].moneyDeposited =
                      tileState.moneyDeposited;
                  }
                  if (tileState.deleted !== undefined) {
                    window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles[index].deleted = tileState.deleted;
                    if (tileState.deleted) {
                      destroyDiningTableTileVisuals(index);
                    }
                  }
                }
              });
            }

            // Restore vault balance and upgrades
            if (savedState.vaultBalance !== undefined) {
              vaultBalance = savedState.vaultBalance;
              currentCurrency = vaultBalance;
              window.gameConfig.currency = vaultBalance;
              if (window.gameConfig.bankVault) {
                window.gameConfig.bankVault.balance = vaultBalance;
              }
            }

            if (savedState.totalMoneyGained !== undefined) {
              totalMoneyGained = savedState.totalMoneyGained;
            }

            if (savedState.vaultUpgrades) {
              window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades = savedState.vaultUpgrades;
              // Apply VIP bonus from vault upgrades
              if (savedState.vaultUpgrades.tips) {
                if (!window.gameConfig.vipCustomers) window.gameConfig.vipCustomers = {};
                window.gameConfig.vipCustomers.spawnChance =
                  0.15 + savedState.vaultUpgrades.tips * 0.05;
              }
            }

            // Restore prestige
            if (savedState.prestige) {
              if (!window.gameConfig.prestige) {
                window.gameConfig.prestige = {
                  baseCost: 5000,
                  costMultiplier: 2.5,
                  profitBonus: 0.1,
                };
              }
              window.gameConfig.prestige.level = savedState.prestige.level || 0;
            }

            if (savedState.decorationUpgrades) {
              window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades = savedState.decorationUpgrades;
              createNeonSigns();
            }

            if (savedState.tutorialHasCleanedTable !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.tutorialHasCleanedTable = savedState.tutorialHasCleanedTable;
            }
            if (savedState.tutorialCompleted !== undefined) {
                window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted = savedState.tutorialCompleted;
            }

            updateTotalMoneyUI();
            createNeonSigns();

if (savedState.selfOrderKiosks) {
              window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks.forEach((config, index) => {
                if (savedState.selfOrderKiosks[index] && savedState.selfOrderKiosks[index].deleted !== undefined) {
                  config.deleted = savedState.selfOrderKiosks[index].deleted;
                  if (config.deleted && selfOrderKiosks[index] && selfOrderKiosks[index].mesh) {
                    deleteSelfOrderKiosk({ configKey: `selfOrderKiosk_${index}`, config: config });
                  }
                }
              });
            }

            // Calculate offline earnings (after vault balance is restored)
            if (savedState.lastPlayedTime) {
              calculateAndAwardOfflineEarnings(savedState);
            }

            lib.log('Game state loaded successfully');

            // Update UI after loading
            updateCurrencyUI();
            updateUpgradeUI();
            updateStackUI();
            updateVaultUI();
            updateTotalMoneyUI();
            if (staffHireTileMesh) {
              updateStaffHireProgress();
              updateStaffHireCostDisplay();
            }
            if (cleanerStaffTileMesh) {
              updateCleanerStaffProgress();
              updateCleanerStaffCostDisplay();
            }
            if (runnerStaffTileMesh) {
              updateRunnerStaffProgress();
              updateRunnerStaffCostDisplay();
            }
            if (vaultStaffTileMesh) {
              updateVaultStaffProgress();
              updateVaultStaffCostDisplay();
            }
            if (cashierTileMesh) {
              updateCashierTileProgress();
              updateCashierTileCostDisplay();
            }
            if (vaultTileMesh) {
              updateVaultTileProgress();
              updateVaultTileCostDisplay();
            }
            if (grillTileMesh) {
              updateGrillTileProgress();
              updateGrillTileCostDisplay();
            }
            diningTableTileMeshes.forEach((tileEntry, index) => {
              updateDiningTableTileProgress(index);
              updateDiningTableTileCostDisplay(index);
            });
          }
        } catch (error) {
          lib.log('Failed to load game state: ' + error.message);
        }
      }

      async function performAutosave() {
        try {
          // Validate and sanitize all data before saving
          const saveData = {
            currency: Number.isFinite(currentCurrency) ? currentCurrency : 0,
            lastPlayedTime: Date.now(),
            upgrades: {
              capacity: window.gameConfig.upgrades?.capacity?.level || 0,
              speed: window.gameConfig.upgrades?.speed?.level || 0,
              collection: window.gameConfig.upgrades?.collection?.level || 0,
            },
            cashierTile: {
              unlocked: window.gameConfig.cashierTile?.unlocked || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.cashierTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.cashierTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            grillTile: {
              unlocked: window.gameConfig.grillTile?.unlocked || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.grillTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.grillTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            driveThruTile: {
              unlocked: window.gameConfig.driveThruTile?.unlocked || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.driveThruTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.driveThruTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            trashTile: {
              unlocked: window.gameConfig.trashTile?.unlocked || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.trashTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.trashTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            vaultTile: {
              unlocked: window.gameConfig.vaultTile?.unlocked || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.vaultTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.vaultTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            fountainTile: {
              unlocked: window.gameConfig.fountainTile?.unlocked || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.fountainTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.fountainTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            fountain2Tile: {
              unlocked: window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile?.unlocked || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.fountain2Tile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            staffHireTile: {
              staffHired: window.gameConfig.staffHireTile?.staffHired || false,
              extraStaffHired: window.gameConfig.staffHireTile?.extraStaffHired || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.staffHireTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.staffHireTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            cleanerStaffTile: {
              staffHired: window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile?.staffHired || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.cleanerStaffTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            runnerStaffTile: {
              staffHired: window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile?.staffHired || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.runnerStaffTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            vaultStaffTile: {
              staffHired: window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile?.staffHired || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.vaultStaffTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            driveThruStaffTile: {
              staffHired: window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.staffHired || false,
              extraStaff1Hired: window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.extraStaff1Hired || false,
              extraStaff2Hired: window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.extraStaff2Hired || false,
              moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile?.moneyDeposited)
                ? window.gameConfig.driveThruStaffTile.moneyDeposited
                : 0,
            },
            diningTables: Array.isArray(window.gameConfig.diningTables)
              ? window.gameConfig.diningTables.map((table) => ({
                  id: table.id || '',
                  x: Number.isFinite(table.x) ? table.x : 0,
                  z: Number.isFinite(table.z) ? table.z : 0,
                  occupied: !!table.occupied,
                  hasTrash: !!table.hasTrash,
                }))
              : [],
            diningTableTiles: Array.isArray(window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles)
              ? window.gameConfig.diningTableTiles.map((tile) => ({
                  moneyDeposited: Number.isFinite(tile.moneyDeposited) ? tile.moneyDeposited : 0,
                  deleted: !!tile.deleted,
                }))
              : [],
            vaultBalance: Number.isFinite(vaultBalance) ? vaultBalance : 0,
            totalMoneyGained: Number.isFinite(totalMoneyGained) ? totalMoneyGained : 0,
            vaultUpgrades: window.gameConfig.vaultUpgrades || {
              earnings: 0,
              capacity: 0,
              tips: 0,
              speed: 0,
              cook: 0,
              serve: 0,
              cashpile: 0,
            },
            tutorialHasCleanedTable: !!window.gameConfig.tutorialHasCleanedTable,
            tutorialCompleted: !!window.gameConfig.tutorialCompleted,
            prestige: {
              level: window.gameConfig.prestige?.level || 0,
              profitBonus: window.gameConfig.prestige?.profitBonus || 0.1,
            },
            decorationUpgrades: window.gameConfig.decorationUpgrades || {},
            selfOrderKiosks: window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks
              ? window.gameConfig.selfOrderKiosks.map((k) => ({ deleted: k.deleted || false }))
              : [],
          };

          // Await the save operation
          await lib.saveUserGameState(saveData);
          lib.log('Game autosaved successfully');
        } catch (error) {
          lib.log('Autosave failed: ' + error.message);
        }
      }

      function initGameState() {
        currentCurrency = window.gameConfig.currency || 0;
        currentStackCount = 0;
        currentMoneyCount = 0;
        incomingBurgers = 0;
        incomingMoney = 0;
        totalMoneyGained = totalMoneyGained || 0;
        playerStack = [];
        moneyStack = [];
        cashierBurgerStack = [];
        cashierCashPile = [];
        cashierEarnings = 0;
        customerQueue = [];
        customerSpawnTimer = 0;
        cashierServeTimer = 0;

// Initialize drive-thru state
        driveThruBurgerStack = [];
        driveThruCashPile = [];
        driveThruCarQueue = [];
        driveThruCarSpawnTimer = 0;
        driveThruServeTimer = 0;

        // Initialize self-order kiosks
        initSelfOrderKiosks();

        // Initialize money grid tracking
        initMoneyGrid();

        // Give starting cash if configured
        const startingCash = window.gameConfig.settings.startingCash || 0;
        if (startingCash > 0 && vaultBalance === 0) {
          modifyVaultBalance(startingCash);
        }

        updateCurrencyUI();
        updateStackUI();
        updateMoneyStackUI();
        updateCashierUI();
        updateUpgradeUI();
        updateTotalMoneyUI();
      }

              step: 0.05,
